title: Senator Barajas Hotel
address: C. del Galeón, 27, Barajas, 28042 Madrid
descriptions: Casual rooms in a laid-back hotel with a restaurant, a cafe/bar & a seasonal outdoor pool.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Keith Sumner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJSG9sS74uo6M6hmvqdYN0NOgYhH8kC8kwM-5DhjWRE6Hditg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Rooms are nice. One of the things that I did not like was all the people smoking at the front entrance.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Trip.com Member","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeCck1CfANpZm9bBk3PHtP97Kh9k25HZfvq9yAWlN3BaIyjSHUPEfWkhAJmuYiJsH-_6g=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Free shuttle bus from the airport. €5 per person to go back to the airport from the hotel with the earliest shuttle at 5am.Good enough to spend over night stay. Pizza restaurant on the ground floor wad so good! True italian styled!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Giorgio Mangeruca","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIfKFyVVLezhHRvyNcclEx8yo6TgzZF9YdJkeWgQXIrSYGynQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Unfortunately, my stay at the hotel was far from satisfactory.
I had to request a room change three times before finding one where it was possible to have a decent stay.
In the first room, there was a strong sewage smell.
Despite that, I tried flushing the toilet and decided to simply close the bathroom door - I managed to sleep fairly well.
However, the next morning I woke up to the same unpleasant smell, only much stronger.
I explained the situation to the reception, where the staff were very kind and professional, and they arranged for a room change upon my return to the hotel.
When I entered the new room, luckily there was no bad smell, but as you can see from the photos, the overall condition of the room — especially the cleanliness of the bathroom — was definitely not up to the standard of a four-star hotel, or even a basic one.
As soon as I noticed these issues, I went back to the reception to request another room change, showing them the photos as well. Once again, they were polite and professional, and they did their best to find an alternative even offering me a complimentary upgrade to an executive room.
Unfortunately, as soon as I entered the third room, the same nauseating sewage smell appeared again. At this point, I believe the hotel has a serious plumbing issue on one side of the building, because although the rooms were on different floors, they were in the same location.
Once again, I informed the reception about this major issue. This time, however, they seemed a bit annoyed by my complaints.
As I told the receptionist:
when someone books a room in a four-star hotel, they expect a four-star experience.
Unfortunately, that was not the case for me.
The fourth and final room was finally livable, and I was able to spend the rest of my stay in a decent way.
I'm honestly very disappointed and disheartened by the overall cleanliness and the state of the infrastructure. I don't think l'Il be returning to this hotel.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD8wg8tnruoZZvULl8MfeF-&fid=0x0:0xc07008176be84901"],"When":"2025-11-9"},{"Name":"kdgAiken","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QdGDJ6WBs5CBoNVcQAwShh25kntoFa0rN3szxhkmmJHnXagNPuSfO1BRpzbnKc5wyCe_g=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"The hotel is very dated, but also very clean.  It is well located, close to the airport.  We enjoyed the bar/restaurant and the bartender was very helpful and friendly.  The furniture in the room is is dated but had good linens and towels.  The shuttle service was efficient and on time (it does cost 5 dollars per person). This hotel is a good choice for an affordable one night stay close to the airport.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Will De Jager","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLhTh5di6s9TdnaNQ4ZqNUkJQiRnqIyvvYD3LlpTXXRjbd_-g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"After staying two out of six nights in the  Senator Barajas Hotel, my impressions. It is close to the airport. If you travel light, you can walk within thirty minutes to terminal 1, 2 or 3 crossing the road over a food bridge. I checked in on line and got the keycard to room 539 quickly. The staff seems professional and speaks decent English, so I didn't have to use the limited Spanish I learned in school many years ago. But if you want to call reception from your room (704) nobody ever bothers to pick up the phone. The room is large and clean enough. It has a balcony (without table or chairs), a safe and a fridge with two bottles of water in it upon arrival. The bottles are not replaced with new ones after using them, but a Mercadona Supermarket is within a five minute walk. The bed is comfortable, but the pillows are very thin and soft. I travel alone and put the two on top of each other. There is daily housekeeping. The bed is made, but the floor is not vacuumed, leaving hairs and dust. The bathroom is small, but adequate with and in bath shower. The hotel is within a ten minute walking distance of a metro station giving access to line 5, fifteen stations and approximately thirty minutes to the centre of Madrid (Gran Via). There are plenty of restaurants and bars in the immediate area. The hotel has a pool outside, so to cold in October and a gym. The restaurants and bar in the hotel are overpriced. But if you walk five minutes, you pay half the price for the same food and drinks. The two main issues are the Wi-Fi and the poor insulation. There is  no Wi-Fi signal in room 539. I have to use roaming and 4G/5G to connect my devices. Not a problem for a citizen from the EU with a large bundle, but very expensive if not covered by the contract in your home country. And even basic and cheap insulation like a door hinges to prevent room doors from slamming shut is missing. The walls are paper thin, so you can constantly hear other guests and the hotel is frequently visited by tour buses with alarms sounding when they back-up in parking in the evening arriving and early morning departing. A lot of groups of tourists use this hotel for one night and they are are not quiet, shouting in the corridor and slamming their doors until well after midnight and again from 6 am onwards. So, even with earplugs you will be lucky to get some sleep. Upon arrival, I requested a quiet room and I got a room facing the steet on a floor with a lot of loud touring people staying for one night and cars and buses pushing their claxon and sounding there alarms. Now, these problems are known to management and addressed in a lot of previous reviews. But if the management only replies to these reviews by apologising and doesn't follow this apology up with even taking the most basic measures, like installing cheap door hinges to prevent doors from slamming shut, these replies are useless and apologies empty. There is no need for a big renovation. With a little investment you can tackle some of the noise issues and guarantee guests a beter nights sleep. Not doing so, shows a lack of interest and leads to bad reviews. For the price paid, more thant €100 a night, guests are allowed to expect more. The price-quality ratio just isn't right. In a hotel being able to get a good nights sleep is the most important thing. A shame really, because with a little effort from the management this really has the potential to be the four star hotel they are claiming to be. For now, three stars is as far as I can go and even then I am being generous.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBk1laWCMFKQ5KYP1ZBBl6n&fid=0x0:0xc07008176be84901"],"When":"2025-10-24"},{"Name":"Ελευθερια Φουστερη","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJOuoHdmmGCuhkO8UrFFdXOWMbqzYx6xrL96dBBkCvCl4niMg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The hotel is very old, despite being advertised as a four-star property. There is a strong sewer smell upon entering, and the reception service is poor, with rude staff and limited English. The rooms also smell unpleasant, especially when the air conditioning is on.The only positive aspect of the hotel is the breakfast, which is fairly varied. The swimming pool, although advertised, is very small and was closed during our stay.Overall, the hotel offers a poor experience and does not meet four-star standards.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Trip.com Member","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeCck1CfANpZm9bBk3PHtP97Kh9k25HZfvq9yAWlN3BaIyjSHUPEfWkhAJmuYiJsH-_6g=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"A very decent hotel within a short taxi/uber ride to the airport. There are a supermarket and a few restaurants with 10 minute walk. The neighbourhood is clean and safe. The only negatives are that the check-in procedure is unreasonably long, and there were large tour groups that were making a lot of noise in the corridor, and were leaving all at once with loads of luggage occupying all available lifts. Also, very oddly there weren't any USB plugs in the room. The bar fridge wasn't working, but they promptly sent a technician to fix it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Eduardo Silveira","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCUEhNlp6Jy7Mm35BF77pqDYcI66cTqSxqhsainJIIacciBszy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I've had an initial bad experience with the hotel but after reaching out to the Hotel Group they were really cordial and fast on solutionating our problem.
Now I updated this review to leave my appreciation on their effort and let you know tha you can count on them on any demand.

I can assure the Hotel have worked hard to help me and I recommend this hotel and I hope to stay here again on another occasion.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Hotel Avenue Madrid
address: Av. de Aragón, 362, San Blas-Canillejas, 28022 Madrid
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mario Garcia Martin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKwMb2w-ziIsNOkdhnQua9U8qP8VVUez9vA5HFCIt-n5T5wEw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Reserve para pasar la nochevieja 12 horas, previamente por whatsap. Al llegar, el numero de reserva no existe pero teniamos la habitacion correctamente. Buena limpieza, suite escultura bonita y decorado como le pedi.
Se oyen ruidos de puertas. Al salir del hotel, hay que llamar a recepcion y estuvimos llamando mas de 30 min para que nos atendieran y poder salir. Un poco caro, aunque buena privacidad.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ian García Pacheco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIzf2SSW9xCmeka5tunntb0d6yDN8cmI2S3cW24u4UWGEtabw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Hemos tenido una muy mala experiencia.

Al llegar no funcionaba el código de la reserva, nos hacen esperar en la puerta del parking 30 minutos (la reserva era a las 22:00 y nos abrieron a las 22:30).

Para variar el jacuzzi no funcionaba y no estaba limpio. Estuvimos esperando 1 hora h media al llegar para que se encendiese el jacuzzi , cuando se llenó vimos que no estaba limpio y había pelos por todas partes. Bastante mal.

Al día siguiente estuvimos esperando 3 horas para poder utilizar el jacuzzi de nuevo. Desde las 16:00 hasta las 19:00 no nos activaban el jacuzzi, muy frustrante para el precio que cuesta.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ainara parriga hijes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJTzpc1PFNjVEutRMsUtzbBMhC9-lxPBJY27Js0IcSCBlgf1w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Un poco decepcionada tienen mucho q aprender de loob o zouk la verdad, no tienes tarjeta para entrar , no hay una simple neverita, la limpieza bueno teníamos la carta pegada y no me quiero imaginar de que sería, las almohadas malísimas, la zona del jacuzzi olía a humedad q echa para atrás todo el suelo empapado y con cuidadito si no te matabas ahí, el jacuzzi no se vaciaba y tarda mucho en calentarse y escuchabas a los vecinos, y el desayuno pagado? Tostadas con tomate de pan Bimbo en serio? Y un capuchino….. en fin creo q no volveré y el servicio tarda mucho en traer las cosas, para el dinero q es deja mucho q desear la verdad!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jaime Andrés Giraldo Botero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVS6vMVh2kJRb-DgLNpPBnuQ_yxDr-R07o268bBAhsb6y_inHY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Experiencia extremadamente decepcionante y confusa – Publicidad claramente engañosa

Reservé con el # 5.2.3.1.9.5.5.5.2.5 un alojamiento que Booking describe como Hotel Avenue – Lovely Hotel. Mi experiencia en este establecimiento fue profundamente frustrante. Reservé con antelación confiando en la información publicada, donde se presenta como Hotel . Sin embargo, al llegar con mi padre descubrimos que no se trataba de un hotel, sino de un m.o.t.e.l , situación que jamás fue informada de manera clara ni visible en la plataforma.

El nivel de ambigüedad en su identificación es desconcertante: incluso la letra que aparenta ser una “M” en el aviso físico del lugar no corresponde a una “M” tradicional, lo que genera aún más confusión para cualquier huésped que llegue buscando un hotel convencional.

Al expresar nuestra incomodidad, se nos indicó que simplemente canceláramos la reserva. Lo hicimos de inmediato… pero el establecimiento se negó a devolvernos los 800 euros pagados, argumentando que “estaba claro” que eran un motel, pese a que su propia presentación NO lo indica de manera explícita ni transparente.

Como viajero frecuente, jamás había enfrentado una situación en la que la descripción comercial fuera tan contradictoria y en la que el establecimiento desestimara una solicitud legítima de reembolso, sabiendo que la experiencia real no coincidía con lo ofrecido.

Recomiendo a futuros viajeros revisar minuciosamente este alojamiento, ya que la falta de claridad en cómo se promocionan puede llevar a confusiones graves y pérdidas económicas injustificadas.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"angel yañez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKbdBSXS2c2UqRv9hRCe16SwMi3jbjDDiBqLHFBYXny1kAelQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Es la segunda vez que visitamos el """"hotel"""" el marketing engañoso prefiero dejarlo para otro día... El caso es que realizamos una petición de reserva por whatsapp, al no responder decidimos llamar y pedir la reserva por teléfono, nos dan el ok de la suite que pedimos nos indican que hemos tenido suerte y que queda una ultima y que si no llegamos a la hora de la reserva en 15 min nos la quintan y que nos responderán al whatsapp con el numero de reserva, hasta ahí todo bien y normal.

Cuando llegamos nos paramos en la pantalla nos pide el numero de reserva que obviamente jamás mandaron, bueno no pasa nada llamamos por teléfono y le indicamos que esta pasando y de primeras nos dice que no tenemos reserva... le indicamos que hemos hablado por whats app y por teléfono con la compañera y que nos había confirmado dicha reserva y de la nada nos dice ah si si tienen! pero es la que tiene piscina... le indicamos que no que además en los mensajes esta detallado que queríamos una suite X con jacuzzi, la mujer muy mal educada lejos de dar una solución nos dijo que es lo que había que si lo queríamos bien y si no "pues dese la vuelta" con las mismas y sus buenas formas eso hicimos darnos la vuelta, y recomendar a todo el mundo que lea esta reseña que hay mejores suites por Madrid que este """"Hotel"""" y con personas mucho mas educadas que esta gente.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tian W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFSa-mS53ukXu_DA1xHnh78IK5pcrMKDGBVzk31JN3yXXRcKxH=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Ha sido una experiencia muy buena en general, le faltan algunas cosas como podría ser caja fuerte y nevera. As for their other hostel Rio who have cancelled our reservations and caused us so much trouble yesterday, I will write my review for them in every detail. So disrespectful and so unprofessional.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Zahidul Hridoy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXvb4wNiWvSs_2Ikk8mv6WhDgdtxeWCC2Pq4FhhbG69Mb51b9FX=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Expedia or any other booking platform should remove this hostel from the platform. This place does not deserve to be on any reputed booking platform.

Customer Service :

There is an old lady who helped me check in, but she does not speak a word of English. English is my second language, and I believe everyone doesn’t need to learn English, but knowing some essential but fundamental words like Identity documents/ Passport and booking number would help if you are the first point of contact for a hostel where you welcome foreign nationals who don’t speak your language. She took help from another guy to find my booking on the hostel side of the Expedia app. This whole thing happened in a lobby(!) where the lady was sitting on a bench, and I was standing confused. She was making faces; she was upset that I couldn’t understand Spanish. Other guests were standing or sitting in chairs, and they became part of the conversation while she was making remarks about me in Spanish. Everyone laughed at my expense. I would have gotten offended, but I was not expecting much, as I read the Google reviews on my way to the hostel when I tried to commute to the hostel from Madrid's town centre.
I don't think the lady is a bad person, but I think she is not the concerned person to help me to check in, or she is wearing multiple hats as I saw her cleaning the toilets as well.

Infrastructure :
They checked me in by filling out all my information on an A4 page in a row where everyone could see what was written on the other rows—a big GDPR violation. I could see all the other information on that page. The lady took a photo of my passport and visa on the phone. I am not sure whether it was a company phone or a personal phone.

There is only one toilet, shower area, and sink for everyone. I am not sure how many people they can accommodate at a maximum, but in my room, there were 12 beds. They at least have four rooms. Please do the math.

The ventilation of the room I was in was horrible. To make everything worse, the person who was staying in the first bed was stinking very badly, either from the clothes or the bedsheets. I didn't see anyone staying in that bed for the whole night. I am not sure why none of the staff attempted to clean it. I had a 100 ml body spray, and I think I sprayed more than half of it in the room, but it didn't help much.

The beds were not comfortable at all, but after all I had experienced, it didn't bother me much.

Unfortunately, it was late at night when I reached the hostel and experienced everything; it was too late for me to find new accommodation and move, especially when I had an early morning flight to catch.

I would highly recommend Expedia and other booking platforms remove this hostel or make a surprise visit to see its condition and make a decision based on its state.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"RosTeK Vlog","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUv-Pp6RYzir9DIfZLclcQsyJc95DgQUPzdYbqreHotoxfO_NHK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The worst Hostel I ever been and I been on many. [{"Name":"Louise Mulhern","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZFPgrT3TS77nxXQiN4NlSbi8e2Xm-K8jMBmP9wNYBZwIeu392LQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"5 min cab from the airport, room was clean bed was very comfy,set up of rooms was great. Locker under your bed for suitcase, had a private shower and toilet in the room so only used by the people in the dorm.  Vending machines,microwave etc in lobby.  Nice patio area outside with a small pool.  Stayed as a stop over due to change of flight would highly recommend for this or if trying to visit on a budget","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Julia Hall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCOrigYTcb29-Z-GXp4N9BRoOa-sSF46bhYd0S6eCVVP7pjZGDgA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Clean, secure, and walking distance from Terminal 2/3

24-hour check-in was friendly and spoke English, which is so helpful when you're exhausted in between stages of travel

I took Bolt from Chamartin train station - at midnight on a Wednesday it took less than 20 minutes and costed around €16

They provide sheets/pillow/duvet on the bunk and a large towel for showering.

I walked to Terminal 2 around 6am using walking directions from Google maps. There isn't anyone else on the street at this hour and I didn't feel any sense of concern about the safety of my surroundings. It took me 20 minutes to reach the security checkpoint in Terminal 2. I travel with a backpack so the walk was easy, with rolling luggage it would be a little more annoying but doable if you're determined.

Shower and toilet (separate rooms) are attached to the dormitory so it's possible that other travelers might make noise while you're sleeping. My roommates were very respectful  and I enjoyed a few hours of sleep before my flight.

There is a common area and kitchen on the ground floor, I used this space to make coffee (I brought my own) and reorganize my bags before my flight.

Bed 10/10 clean
Shower 8.5/10 clean
Convenience 9.5/10","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jasmina Orlowska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPmRwjaEOpAS9Pgl6rJwdBNc5GxVVmR8GCkkVd35EtbW6hMYQZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very clean hostel, the bathrooms are fine, the beds are comfortable, the towels are new and fresh. Everything one needs to stay for one night between the flights. The area around is also nice, very calm.
There are two things that I think could be improved:
- there should be guides on how to get to the hostel, the name suggests it is 5 min away from the airport - in fact it is 25 min by foot (and the uber is 10€...)
- the light in the bathroom is VERY annoying - it goes down every 30 seconds unless one is in constant movement","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jainendra sinha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXw8tTypKiRUwbK_oIOxqb9NwvvqEr_PABxcVi219NNY70uO1Xn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Decent hostel close to the airport

The hostel is conveniently located near the airport. There are self-service kiosks for coffee, tea, chips, and chocolates, and even some free food options with basic ingredients like pasta and rice — you can cook your own meals in the open kitchen. The Wi-Fi is good, and the overall ambience is pleasant for a hostel stay.

However, walking through the nearby lanes can feel a bit unsettling as the area is usually deserted. One concern worth mentioning — the lady at the reception during the daytime behaves quite rudely, especially toward non-white guests, which was disappointing. The rest of the staff, though, are polite and helpful.

The biggest issue is the sensor-based lighting, particularly in the bathrooms. The lights turn off every 30 seconds to a minute, leaving you in complete darkness — it’s honestly frustrating. Also, they don’t clean or change the bedsheets daily.

Overall, it’s a decent stay if you value proximity to the airport and a cozy hostel vibe, but there’s definitely room for improvement in hospitality and facilities.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Deniz Erkmen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUHTdFzOb8tAnCEKa8Z59vqzQnj8I70MST9KfpMEb_ChjnIHDKnlg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For one night close to the airport, it's great. Good price, clean. They give you a body towel and provide a locker with a lock. Beds have curtains. Would be nice if they had thicker blankets and provided an additional towel for hands/face.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anton Inshakov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWruclxuf14PiiILJrM8cBiJH0nFnSJOYrdURyPbx6dAtzs22U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It is, indeed, walking distance away from T2/T3. However, the T3 and nearby exits are closed during the night, so i had to walk from the middle of T2. It took around 15 minutes to find the place.

It has some parking space infront for like 10-15 cars. The checkin was fast. The staff speaks many languages and are very welcoming and kind.

The room was amazing. Rooms are card-key locked.

The room had a shower, sink and toilet inside, all separated. Everything is squicky clean. Towel was provided, shower had gel and toilet had paper.

The bed frame was rock solid. It didnt make any sound even when a person climbed to the upper bed. There is a dimmed room light enough to see everything and not bother others. Bed has a socket and a personal bright light. There is also a card locked locker. Room, shower and toilet had decent sound isolation.

Though this is the best hostel i ever stayed, i couldn't really sleep because of the mattres. However, it was much better than sitting in the airport.

It could've been nice to have extra sink in toilet or shower room to not bother sleeping people if you","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"goncalonsilva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0Qexe1uajF-TSqvbHLzgtUk80BSJEirwlZxdhwIhHVVewMbFHRaNf97WJ3b7Rq47i8M9nA=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Hostel right next to the airport, you can walk 10min to the metro station and then ride the subway for 1 stop and get into all terminal pretty quickly. Very clean and tidy. Nice common spaces and staff. Just be aware that if you are carrying big luggages (like I did) you might have to call a cab to the airport. Apart from that everything was great","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Eff Nym","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1HUT_CykoiCwq3p2BdXQSgFHGBNRLzjgU924Y2nY4-a3XQ2U=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great as an in and out place. Super clean and modern. You can walk to/from the airport. There are a lot of restaurants aeound. The only reason I gave a 4 instead of a 5 is because it is really an in and out place which doesn't allow for the same social vibe as other hostels. However, it does what it does the best possible way.","Images":null,"When":""}]

While staying at Los 5 Pinos, we were also able to drive relatively easily into and out of Madrid proper (about a 25 minute drive, this was also about a 35E Uber). ||||The hotel offered a 15% discount on the attached cafe, staff was very friendly, and rooms were comfortable and spacious! title: Compostela Suites
address: C. Zambrana, 4, San Blas-Canillejas, 28022 Madrid
descriptions: Modern apartments in a relaxed hotel offering a bar, a playground & an outdoor pool.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Daniel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1R_mG-g13JIIvSrvltHsp5tQiN0vB2zkCWMIceXbCJkq7OcA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am surprised by the average rating here and booked via trip.com not being aware. We as a family 2+1 (4 yrs old) missed nothing. Good rooms for the price (~105 EUR per night) with a bathtub and a sufficiently equipped kitchen for 1-2 nights. It was indeed noisy in the hallway and you need to close the door of the bedroom if you have one - but after that it was perfectly fine.

I liked the vending machines where you can get coffee, water or a sandwich. If you need more there is a Shell petrol station 5 min away by walk or a huge mall (Plenilunio) with a Mercadona supermarket and many food spots.

Good option for transit passengers travelling via Barajas airport in Madrid, better option than some run-down places in the Barajas district next to the airport IMO, although it would be great to have some kind of airport transfer organized by the hotel for an extra fee. If there is one, I was not informed by any means. There is no real direct connection from/to the airport. From the airport cost us 15 EUR with Uber. To the airport it was 8 EUR.

Protip: if you have a morning flight from Terminal 1, drive to Terminal 2 and take a walk (due to traffic).

Remark/what can be done better: Cafeteria personel did not understand a basic order in English for "black tea". I mean this was absolutely not a sophisticated order.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steve Cárdenas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL6m4YRMPQDS5hDYHZvUqiY2TmrIqAuKduYp4eFTA_KbKZrlw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had an incredibly disappointing experience at these 'suites' and would not recommend them to anyone. We traveled as a family of three (two adults and one child), and from the moment we arrived, the service was unacceptable.
The check-in process was a struggle; the receptionist was quite rude and flatly refused to let me briefly use the parking area just to unload our heavy luggage. Once we got to the room, things only got worse. Instead of the double bed we expected, we found two single beds pushed together and a sofa bed. The mattresses were as hard as rocks, and the frames were so noisy that none of us could sleep. We all woke up with significant back pain. To make matters worse, the walls are paper-thin; we could hear every conversation from the neighboring rooms and all the noise from the street.
The 'flat' was also missing basic necessities. We discovered there was no cookware at all. When we asked reception about this, we were rudely told we had to pay a €20 deposit. For that price, we were given one rusty, dirty black pan, one dirty pot, and three basic utensils. After paying a premium price for the room, being charged extra for filthy, substandard equipment felt like a total scam.
The only positive part of the entire stay was the checkout. The lady and gentleman at the desk were amazingly fast and friendly, which was a refreshing change, but it wasn't enough to save the experience. This stay was a complete waste of money and we will definitely not be returning.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Veselin Popov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIAxQC1lGEsyT8_5_z8xyCU30GS5aZoRMRUY26VYWsiATj3sw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The size of the room was good and they are not very clean.

They don't have a place to put your luggage for the period between check out and transfer.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Manuel Oliveira","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDHyLWAFejXXS_4EIwvAD8l9ddvBR2ZYaHyrXycxquUFvUL9ZK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"1 star is obviouly too much for this facility! title: Hostal Aeropuerto
address: Av. de Logroño, 102, Barajas, 28042 Madrid
descriptions: Straightforward airport hotel featuring simple rooms, plus free Wi-Fi & parking.

It is convenient, though still 10-15 minutes.....lots of traffic.  Breakfast and rooms are nice.......nothing that is super memorable but certainly on par with other Hiltons.  It has a lounge which was great, I must say......food offerings were as limited as you can imagine ......basically a few snacks in jars,  a few little tiny jar salads and one hot dish and rolls.........drinks and wine/beer were generous and very nice..........not very big so maybe that's part of the problem.  Lounge staff were super friendly, but, must say wish their lounge attendance was better .........random people coming in and taking drinks and such by the arm loads back to their room....no one checking to see if they have privileges","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matt Baldwin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWR5NhG3IwOYyXRwRClfzX372m_p4uD1E5lNWckXrnBxAbHuHy4EQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"A disappointing experience. We chose the hotel for its indoor pool, so we were incredibly disappointed to be told shortly before arrival that the pool was going to be closed for routine maintenance. No compensation offered. They should have advised us at the time of booking or offered compensation if the closure was unforeseen. We complained and they offered us free breakfast, when breakfast was already included in our room rate. So they offered us access to the executive lounge, which was something but with young kids the lounge was of limited use to us.

We had lots of luggage and the kids in arms but they don't help you get bags to your room. Pretty incredible that this simple service isn't available.

We booked adjoining rooms, and one of them wasn't ready when we arrived, despite it being past the advertised check-in time.

The air conditioning system in both rooms was deafening and didn't actually cool. Don't stay in summer.

So I wouldn't say the service was good or the hotel met expectations.

On the plus side, useless air con aside, the suite was very comfortable, breakfast was pretty good, and the airport shuttle service did the job.

I wouldn't stay again. For the price, you would expect much better.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Grahamarb","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QdHDxxyBDO6igPA51sqxYAI1TTeuGvapT1sWSCJfPSgzOZltNlMhWmUDpj2A3v7zAw89g=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"This hotel is excellent. The airport transport worked perfectly. If we are fortunate to return to Madrid we will stay at this hotel the night before our trip home.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"k brenen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRfLZMd418UhJmAx0vgOP1PkwtJvlq1rjosvg491R7zSJQi33D=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to end a trip if you have an early morning flight. Will stay here again when we return.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Viklo S.L
address: C. Mar Mediterráneo, 20, Hortaleza, 28033 Madrid
user_reviews: [{"Name":"María E. Diaz de Vivar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUb1cQY2eizDUuSwLYKM4Q-dFaHR_OZj3iZMoUnnrk7NhKBd73X=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"La experiencia de alojarnos en este lugar fue tan decepcionante, que no se por donde empezar... lo primero es decir que fue el peor por lejos, de cualquier alquiler temporal al que fui. Ya arranca mal porque la puerta de entrada principal, la que da acceso al edificio, no funciona, esta siempre abierta, con lo cual les aseguro que llegar sola por la noche daba bastante miedo. El piso estaba helado, no había calefacción central, solo aires acondicionados. El living tenía un sillón sucio que daba asco sentarse, el aire acondicionado de ahí hacía un ruido como si fuera una alarma, no lo podíamos prender. El wifi nunca funcionó. En una de las habitaciones no funcionaba el aires acondicionado (que son frío calor), tuvimos días de 2º, pasamos mucho frío, las mantas no eran suficientes, y algunas tenían más de 50 años seguro. La cocina carece de elementos básicos, si jarra eléctrica para calentar agua, nada, de todos modos no podíamos estar ahí del frío que hacía. Las camas de los dormitorios con los colchones vencidos, no te podías mover del ruido que hacían. En uno de los cuartos, las mantas eran como las que te dan en el avión, imposible sentirse abrigado con eso. Y ahora vamos al tema del baño, cuando llegamos la ducha se caía, no te podías duchar, a demás de que había cantidad de hongos. El secador de pelo decide cuando apagarse... El mueble del baño esta podrido abajo por el agua. La ducha es diminuta. La decoración puede ser anecdótica en todo este caos, pero poner cuadros sucios y rotos, para eso mejor no poner nada. En este lugar no cuidan al cliente ni les interesa que pases una buena estancia. A nuestros reclamos a su whatssapp la respuesta fue: \"Entendemos la situación y le pedimos disculpas nuevamente por los inconvenientes ocasionados. En este momento nos encontramos aguardando la respuesta de nuestros superiores para poder brindarle una solución a la brevedad.\" Por suerte ya estoy en mi casa, pero les aseguro que fue la peor experiencia en un viaje.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhArAe_fo705XUGidABjDBBj\u0026fid=0x0:0x433aaa6c84d57839"],"When":"2026-1-29"}]

Empezando por la atención, fue una reserva de última hora y llamé para poder aclarar un par de temas. Eva me atención con un calidez maravillosa, me dio soluciones e incluso me buscó alojamiento para un día que me había quedado sin opciones. También estuve hablando con Rafa sobre el tema del check inn y me comentó que era un negocio familiar que llevaban como unos 40 años, y ahí lo entendí todo. Ese trato que estaba recibiendo es el tipo de trato que recibía como guía cuando hace casi 20 años me alojaba con grupos en hoteles familiares.
A mí llegada me recibieron son sonrisas y sabiendo quien era. ¡De verdad, esto ha hecho mi estancia algo de lo más especial! no puedo estar más agradecida por las sonrisas, las charlas y el cariño que he recibido.
Me he quedado tanto en los apartamentos como en el hostal.
El hostal está muy bien, las habitaciones limpias y actualizadas. Pero los apartamentos son de otro nivel. impolutos, con una decoración cálida, y la cama y la ducha de 10.

Eva, Pedro, Manoli, Rafa y a todas las chicas del equipo de limpieza: ¡sois la caña, y el año que viene vuelvo! guardadme mi apartamento ;)

Por cierto, fue una reserva de última hora a dos días de empezar FITUR (la feria internacional de turismo), para que os hagáis una idea, para esos días he visto un hostal de mucha menor categoría que el Hostal Aeropuerto por 500€ la noche, así que el precio que tienen, tanto del apartamento como del hostal, es coherente para esas fechas, y se nota que no van a abusar, como he visto en otros establecimientos.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"AnabelSP","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-kFpX70Dej3G82w2lsqgJzU7ULZbqrcp8TrbzYwAVznGoO4ti=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Muy bien. The hall looks nice, we haven't tried them but there is a gym, a restaurant and a bar. The hotel is conveniently located next to the airport. The rooms are clean and spacious, however....

Inside of your room, you will hear every conversation in the hallway (and there will be people talking super loud there until 2am at least). You will be startled awake everytime someone will open or close their room door. On the night we were, the people on the room above moved furniture around and dropped stuff in the floor all night long which, again, startled us awake a bunch of times.
The neighborhood appears to be a bit sketchy because we were also awoken several times by firecrackers (or gunshots, impossible to tell) and police sirens (it felt a bit like sleeping in GTA).

Finally, the wall and door to the bathroom are glass. So you will hear everything and see a little bit. No privacy at all is possible. If you are spending the night with you special someone, get ready for the most romantic poops of your life. The location is obviously fantastic, and as we were arriving in Madrid late and flying out early the following morning – it was perfect.

The service and welcome were very friendly, and once we got the keys to the room, it was all as expected. The rooms are well-sized and offer a comfortable overnight stay. It was all very modern and surprisingly quiet considering you're in an airport.

I did find the air conditioning wasn't great, however, and found the room a little bit too warm for my liking. I also thought the price was fairly steep for what was offered – but you are paying for the location, which was fantastic.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDI7O2uGQ&fid=0x0:0x50be5ab7a80c7d64"],"When":"2025-4-8"},{"Name":"NFH","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeNj0UTN0yIrCGyJ0JhWwDODOg5QjAH0gdfB9Ji-oFl0zWFI-YVmhNAr-FGLycdpIjFmw=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"The hotel is deep underneath the terminal 4 entrance on the same level as the metro ticket machines and barriers. It appears to be just above the mainline train station, because we could repeatedly hear trains passing underneath throughout the night. This makes it not the right location within the airport for a hotel. It ought to be on a high floor, not buried close to the metro and mainline train station. The breakfast was disappointing, despite the modest charge of €8.50 per person. Nevertheless it's very useful to have this hotel available without leaving the airport, for example before an early morning flight, particularly if an airline is funding the cost under EU261. The rooms are functionally well designed with plenty of power sockets in the right places, although I would prefer the air conditioning to have a numeric temperature setting.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"swimbikerun_10","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeSe9ibNVY65MpgeQh70I370foM0-7tEPyVc9CIfSq5Ekli093sZJVPBoLD5d5qPK_2rw=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Perfect for what I needed. My flight arrived to Madrid at 6am and I needed to wait for a friend arriving around 12:30 prior to leaving by bus to Salamanca. This was a great place to rest my head, get a few hours of sleep and a shower before continuing on my journey.||The location is tricky to find - from the arrivals area of Terminal 4 (once you've fully exited the secure area) look for signs to the Metro and Renfe trains. Take the escalator/moving ramp down to that level and behind the escalator/moving ramp is the entrance to this hotel.||Check in and out was quick and easy. The room was very clean. If I needed to, I'd certainly stay here again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vanessa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0-NPLNuUMrUl2DTCffNt1ucnGu3amC1tWphnXn8ytGurOAuo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"You pay for convenience! We had a flight that landed at 10:45pm and a connecting flight at 10:45am the following morning. Since we were traveling with kids, this option was our saving grace. Though the price was extremely high, we didn’t have many other options. We reserved for the executive room which gave us two beds. There was an option to add another bed for $40 extra dollars. We already booked the room for $250 and another $40 for a bed? My goodness, we were hesitant to even use the lotion they provided! Nevertheless, we needed it so we paid for it. There’s a minibar in the room, and guess what? There’s a price sheet above it. While we aren’t expecting a hand out, they could at least provided free water to their customers! A pitcher of water at front the entrance with plastic cups would have been better than trying to profit off every single  item!

My overall review- you pay for what you get. You will get a room at the airport. Don’t expect the hospitality hotel feel. You’ll get the room, beds, key, and convenience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQ3dfqtQE&fid=0x0:0x50be5ab7a80c7d64"],"When":"2025-3-13"}]

We had a great time, thank you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"VeenaH47","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QewvQXK08PhtQgCu1fT7TcdWcgcaXdOmFk48xW5xlmLo-Eqy0UOp2YqveGvl0etYz5BzA=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"My husband and I stayed at the hotel for 3 nights.the location is close to a metro station and there are also plenty of restaurants and bars close by, also a supermarket. The reception staff were very friendly and helpful, we were made to feel very welcome every time we came into reception, they made every effort to answer any questions. The room was simple but very comfortable and clean. The bathroom was a good size with everything we needed for our stay. We paid 8€ each for breakfast each morning, this was provided in a cafe 2 minutes from the hotel was very good value. There was a good choice of breakfast ranging from a fry up to churros, a hot drink and orange juice were included in the price. We enjoyed our breakfasts in this neighbourhood cafe, speaking a little Spanish helped. I highly recommend this hotel, it was very simple but provided all we needed for a comfortable stay.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: TRAVELODGE MADRID COSLADA AEROPUERTO
address: Av. de la Constitución, 75, 28821 Coslada, Madrid
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"nandakumaran ganesan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbQJKRFXVP5yIQ8DIRz6jVg_3eXzB0P8GzzxygnQFL4e2QSGggQg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A Business traveler hotel in the Coslada neighbourghood, with shops, restaurants, local pharmacy and the metro station all within a 15minute walk.

The hotel was to the point, clean, well presented, spacious, presentable and cozy comfortable for business travellers without too much frills and hassle.

if you need anything, a kettle, an iron or just about anything, ask the front desk and they will be readily help you with your need.

Simple and efficient breakfast spread with good choices for EUR 12, remember to bring your card as all cash payments are done in Front Desk only.

This is my first visit to Spain and the Hospitality of the front desk team was absolutely amazing. They smiled and greeted you on every encounter and also shared great ideas and travel tips when necessary.

Special shout out to Fer for answering and helping me with my quirky questions and Roberto for giving me a heads up on the travel by metro. I will say, the team at the front desk did a great job in ensuring this tourist was well taken care of.

I would also take the time to give a 5star review to the Housekeeping team, for always ensuring i came back to a clean room, that i know was messy. you guys are great.

Thanks and hopefully we can meet again in my future travels

Nanda","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bre Trowbridge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU84C6TG6PbQydvSWUMN3O6f-GYogYghtGKCqw47eqDmxBpI4xj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"There is a first for everything!!! Absolutely zero ammenities in the room. No jug, no coffee, no tissues, no water etc. I went to reception to ask for boiling water for a babies bottle & got told they can’t provide it but they can let me borrow a jug over night for $20. The room doors slam close, could hear all the other rooms down the hall slamming shut over night.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tyra Myrick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXk9BN1t7AL3BeSu24hRR-dY3-ZUkEfd1T5jFiqi-9cU5otF4A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My daughter (17), son (10), and I had a  spacious room that accommodated 3 people. The staff was  very friendly, helpful,  and always greeted us with smiles, Breakfast was included and quite delicious. The public transportation system getting to Madrid was a little tricky. However, once you figure it out, it's a breeze. I would definitely stay here again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKDe-OD6yd-C1AE&fid=0x0:0x8be41a2cc7788ddd"],"When":"2025-5-11"},{"Name":"Alex Sandro Prado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJE6ODgr0KzLrf3pwp6tr2kU1-hRYnFvsru78F7l0L_ioIoCw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an excellent experience at Travelodge, and I want to especially highlight the outstanding service we received from Fernanda at the front desk. Our situation was quite stressful — our flight to London was diverted due to a power outage, and after more than 24 hours without sleep and traveling with a baby, we arrived at the hotel much earlier than expected.

I asked if there was any possibility of an early check-in, and Fernanda went above and beyond to help us. She was incredibly kind, understanding, and efficient, and managed to arrange a room for us as soon as possible so we could finally rest. It made all the difference and turned a difficult day into a moment of relief and gratitude.

The room itself was spotless, comfortable, and truly amazing for the price. We couldn’t have asked for more.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"claudia De S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKSwXoJP2pLjSk96zt7Zp-36HkQFQ-7tf1vqYyJV7qY2S6Yrw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"By far amazing, lovely staff very helpful. Hotel is clean and smells amazing in all rooms. Front staff exceptional Fran is a star very helpful and catering. Would highly recommend a stay. Have been here for a week and it's been great. Rooms get cleaned and refreshed everyday. Food is amazing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Felix Bonet","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTstgsSYdev4m9qy4phkotBb-2U9rYu2nONjxDgArnzJTKeJuc6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The must!!
Wow I’m still impressed with the service, it was so clean!
Close to the airport, great rooms, the breakfast delicious
The front desk always there for you, if you arrive before the check in, and there is any room available they give you even 4hrs before Manuel and Fran are amazing!!
Congrats because you have in your staff person like them
My next time in Madrid will be here for sure!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steve","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIXT9rpLI1gEYRfauTuKIzhMwmwnlsEl8QIIsit5_57iHg45w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just perfect for a late night arrival or setting off early the next morning...Even good for just staying a few days to discover Madrid,as trains into central Madrid are a 10 minute walk from the hotel.
The staff are so friendly, from the night porter who welcomes with a smile after a long journey, to Francisco who helped with so many aspects of our onward journey and helps us with day to day aspects of our trip, thanks so much . A great team.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daniela Cavazos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1qN94ZtM7a0xKI0mvM2x4D28iy0nEi4TF7avg0ibZg_awsw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Travelodge Madrid Coslada Aeropuerto offers a comfortable stay with a charming location near a park adorned with restaurants, a beautiful fountain, and ample walking areas. As a pet-friendly hotel, we were able to travel with our furry friend, which was a big plus. Our room featured three clean and cozy single beds. The only downside was the TV signal issue, but overall, it didn't detract from our experience. Additionally, the on-site parking is available for a fee of 10 euros for the duration of your stay, and the reception staff were exceptionally friendly and helpful. Plus, they have 24-hour pizza service, perfect for satisfying those late-night munchies.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Hospedaje Los Rosales
address: Av. de Logroño, 130, Barajas, 28042 Madrid
descriptions: Straightforward rooms with TVs in a laid-back budget hotel offering a terrace & a garden.
user_reviews: [{"Name":"Kyle Fields","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLbwX7oXYWnpMTziGx55lZ7CC56DtlfKIdTry3Wkrrx4wIWiQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very, very impressed with the woman at the front desk. The room was very clean and had everything I needed. It's easy to get to and there's food and transportation all around. I stayed for an overnight layover and I'm very happy I found it. Completely worth it and would stay again!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MurciaDivechick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0Qf66pF81jsVXBxevYxxL5FsdlDsKAngAUpJVE-hAwai1rl8J0QnYqktKV3UGdpbmNlc_A=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Google maps takes you to a side street, which directs you with a sign to the main road, where the reception is. There are a few rooms there, but we were taken back down the side road and round the corner to a separate room on the ground floor.|So the check in was a bit of a faff when you’ve no idea where you’re going, but in actual fact the room was perfect for our one night before a flight. It wasn’t cheap, nowhere in Madrid is nowadays, but it was one of the cheapest in the area. |Ground floor meant meany no logging bags up stairs. The bed was comfy, shows and bathroom good, plus it had a kettle in the room, so we even got a cup of tea. |Numerous restaurants, bars and shops in the area, plus a 5 minute walk to Barajas tube station.|We would definitely book this again next time we fly from Madrid","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"paulcorneliusphl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QfzjVLsS8e-67WTk0n2dtmoLvjFzQd1pnSZl8AzVxF0EXF41tQWWb2Gu3UnsT1rmBrWdQ=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"We stayed in this hotel for only one night, since we arrived in Madrid airport very late and felt that it was best to stay here and head to the city center during the day.||||Hospedaje is about a 5 minute drive from the airport. It provides reasonable comfort and amenities given its fairly low price. The bathroom was well kept and had towels.||||Even as we arrived past 12 MN, there was someone in the front desk that assisted us. Language was a challenge but he handled everything with a smile.||||The room had a TV, a heater that could do a little better, and a comfortable enough bed. WiFi strength is average, although the connection is fast enough. Room size is quite okay. It's not small but not huge as well. It works just fine.||||The window blind was the best we've seen; it can literally turn the entire room dark. The surrounding area was a bit noisy in the morning, and you could hear some noise coming from the hallway. There is a Metro station approximately 300 meters away. Took us about 8 or so minutes to get there, with quite heavy luggage in tow.||||Overall the hotel is okay, and suffices for quick transitory stays to or from the airport. The staff when we checked out was already very friendly. Language was again a challenge, for which online translation sites proved useful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brittany Graybill","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVSH-utkBKHfV1J8PTWqxY0Z1O5LHyHSKO9RGX1MlPpN9jwhjHg5A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Only stayed for one night but it was fabulous. My private room was ready by noon so I could check in early. The room had a full sized bed, was spacious, and had air conditioning. Also included a private bathroom. All for just $55/night! Everything was clean and I felt safe. There was a great cafe/bar directly across the street from the hostel and a delicious sushi place right down the road (sushi and buey). Also close to a supermarket. Definitely recommend this hostel.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Catarina Dias","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIVZJ5tZ9x6KwjGUXlrxDPVrpoyGucAumuXyWAA13usL4-drw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing hospitality. We stayed there during a 11-hour stop over in Barajas airport. Instead of staying at the airport for this amount of time, we decided to go to this place for a shower and relaxing time. The price was below hotel average, and cost was 56 Euros. We kept our expectations low. However, it was a pleasant surprise!!  This is a 2-star hostel, so the rooms are simple, no luxuries or anything of the sort. But for a quick rest if you have a long stop over, and don't want to stay hours on end at the airport, I recommend this place. It is about 2 km away from the airport. I recommend taking an Uber to get there, as it is cheaper than a taxi. This hostel is extremely clean, the staff is very friendly, and lots of tapas restaurants in its vicinity.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"NeRudeBoy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeNj0UTN0yIrCGyJ0JhWwDODOg5QjAH0gdfB9Ji-oFl0zWFI-YVmhNAr-FGLycdpIjFmw=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"This hotel was recommended to us because of it's location. We found this hotel quite easily from Barajas metro station.||||The staff were friendly, the room was clean \u0026 reasonable, nothing fancy but with air conditioning. The bathroom was a bit small, but again we were only there one night.||||There was no breakfast included in the price, but there are several cafes in the area.||||There also appears to be a hotel bar outside although it wasn’t open when we returned home in the evening.||||If you want to stay somewhere in Madrid with easy access to the airport, then I definitely recommend this hotel.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"WillaK339","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QcKrc8e2JnTu8c7_hmoZKea10RMTDbKaR4QZbjFBwR43DXTBpqzkG_SGZrLD47rFdkvjQ=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"We had one night only in Madrid and stayed here because it was so close to the airport and so reasonably priced. In fact we walked across the street and turned right down the first street - which looked like an alley — and had tapas and drinks at Travesía de Algemesi, 7. (That’s the address — I cant remember the name. Delicious though!)|The staff at Rosales was very nice and friendly and made us feel at home. Very comfortable beds and sparking clean space.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"647Chris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeWB0GIG9gGd6g9zDFXwjE9TRuKRtAO6HvwA5jEdK_CrOJXcVxp8esjQRYTFMjay2JK=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Acceptable good value accommodation close to the airport. title: Ibis Budget Madrid Aeropuerto
address: Pegaso Tres, C. dos Provisional Iveco, 27, San Blas-Canillejas, 28022 Madrid
complete_address: {"borough":"San Blas","street":"Pegaso Tres, C. dos Provisional Iveco, 27","city":"Madrid","postal_code":"28022","state":"Madrid","country":"ES"}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Brian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPo8x-2FsW_AXqgiMfi6ka5cUbuCDGgJfyZUYNKDDXq_oDLSWU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I stayed here on an international layover. From the reviews I didn’t have high hopes. I even considered sleeping in the airport for 5 hours, but I’m glad I didn’t.

While this isn’t the most spectacular place out there, it was everything I needed that night. I was exhausted. Getting in at 2300, the front desk staff were friendly and accommodating. The room was small and had a bed, that was what I needed. I had a high floor and didn’t hear a sound. I got a few hours of sleep before continuing my journey. I can’t imagine how I would have felt being on the airport floor.

It’s not as close to the airport as it seems but I’d compare that to some US airports that are far removed from the hotels as well. Uber and taxi will be a factor in your booking, but that’s not the hotels fault.

Thanks for the quiet few hours sleep I needed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gabriela Lander-Castro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjhfBo-rUCRlv9apCQD0joyOAT6-tFjb2E5IPoGeZrOc50bdSDxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The hotel was ok, small but ok. We really needed extra pillows badly but they didn’t have any. We needed extra blankets but they only had one. Besides that our stay was fine. I wish there was an actual bathroom for more privacy. It would be nice if the toilet “door” had a lock or at least a magnet to keep the door in place. I wish there were more towels, they only leave one showering per person and that’s it, none for the face or hands. It would be nice if they had those folding luggage racks. Price was good for a 6 day stay. Room service was good everyday. Customer service was good","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ruth Valle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxI_QTZQOHPs15hzHfVmcWXWzcSa2XXuiA7ZiUjMzvgmBNAcmyWQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I rather enjoyed my stay at the Ibis hotel, especially with the spectacular view out the window from the 6th floor. The vending machine stole 2 euros from me though and I didn't report it because I thought I would look stupid doing so. I then no longer made further attempts, like to get coffee out of the machine. I thought it was weird that the girl at the restaurant couldn't inderstand that I wanted French fries and gave me chips instead. I said patatas fritas. How is that chips??? Anyway, I survived that miscommunication and I pride myself to have taught Spanish for like 30 years in the US. Well, you can't blame the hotel for that, still, weird experience. I also loved the location right by the Restaurante National. Great place to have eaten my lunch, menú de día for $16, very reasonable I thought and well done. No communications issues at that place. Ok, the room itself was nice. I loved the concise small layout. I posted a review on my YouTube channel for my subscribers. Oh, good thing they have a 5 euro airport shuttle because the taxi ride is 28 euros. Overall great place and I will visit again on my next Spain trip this summer. Maybe the vending machine will work out better for me.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nicole Luong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIXBkA4fwtatmAYQbde3AO6jEI-DAwAy6yIIZOVEAXOqWY6=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"i had an overnight layover at the airport and booked this hotel for rest. upon entry, the rooms and clean and simple. one other review wrote that the light kept turning on in the middle of the night and waking them up but i ignored the warning and booked it anyway. well that also happened to me as the card sensor for the light stopped sensing the card in the middle of the night and the default bright lights came on and woke me up. had horrible sleep because of this. sleep was the only reason i booked the hotel and sleep i did not get.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bobdobb","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QfHhPp0vyvo1Wo3WY4NH1G5QOPAHGBMv_XiebXLZtHzVwVa3wkRhb3dykyKrUCZPlawDA=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Modem hotel with good facilities, including bar, restaurant and dedicated hotel to airport shuttle. ||Rooms are modern snd distinctive, with good blackout blinds -something essential for a good night’s sleep. Many hotels get this so wrong by providing poorly fitted curtains that leak light. Well done, Ibis for getting this right! ||Breakfast, food and drinks offer were good and cost effective. ||Overall a good choice for visiting Madrid but be prepared to use taxis to and from the city, as public transport is a bit tricky.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bob Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0JqZU6x4YPJNnC89CnBs6mtDnTVmnXWT9vR0Ie66LbjWY81w3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It's a reasonable place for the location and money. Nothing spectacular but neither are the other options. The rooms feel like they
were designed by engineers and accountants with durability being the main concern. A bit like a fancy prison cell.

There is an insanely long check-in procedure.  The poor staff have to spend 5+ minutes for each person.  A modern hotel like this should be efficient but they're not.  Seems like there's always a queue just to check in.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marco Puliatti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmyK0AdBCB9u4tZya2kCVL-N8oHtFwIP91fEzhDMK5OF1MXBZLag=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We were quite disappointed with the service we received during our stay.
When we arrived, the receptionist who greeted us seemed unhappy to be there and welcomed us with, “What do you need?” which felt unprofessional.

Upon entering our room, we discovered that the window had been left open. As it was around midnight and close to 0°C outside, the room was extremely cold and uncomfortable. We returned to reception to report the issue, the staff member on duty did not seem concerned and did not offer any solution. When we requested extra blankets, we were told that none were available, which was surprising for a hotel. Instead, we were offered additional pillows. A pillow?
The overall attitude of the staff made us feel uncomfortable, and rather than receiving an apology or assistance, we felt dismissed.
Could you please clarify whether your hotel is part of the Accor group? The level of service we experienced did not align with the standards we would expect from an Accor-branded property.yhe","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vibhu Verma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNfV-g5UA4Ny1XUQC8bMcIAKU79qM0WBSvEwAZPeRbKo_ttawn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The rooms have no intercom and every problem needs to be discussed by physically going at reception. While outside in Madrid, I called the hotel to check about food availability but nobody picked up the phone despite being on hold for 7-8 min twice. The ceiling wasn't even plastered and cracks were evident but reception claimed it was "industrial look". Breakfast was good and receptionist was cordial while sharing information.","Images":null,"When":""}]

The staff exhibit exemplary professionalism and are consistently attentive and cooperative. Our apartment was spotless upon arrival and meticulously maintained throughout the stay. Housekeeping services, including cleaning and linen replacement, are carried out with impressive consistency and precision.

When someone sneeze in the other room/floor it is like it is in your ear. Reception didn’t do anything about it. I want my money back. Don’t come here!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tony Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyE0_oDGt57wU8WGCstzZcf89HerXyxDSXqDS6Y1aEY2REOP0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Really close to the airport, parking is great, simple basic and clean, good place to spend an overnight","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daniel Cluxton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKwoGcOAPlLAbhWRrdO4-xnJrxRLYXIEWFTs9G_hENk-Fm1Cw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Stayed for one night before my flight out of Madrid to be closer to the airport.

Location
While the hotel looks close to the airport on the map, it's actually a fifteen minute drive to the airport and just in general it's pretty out of the way.

There is an airport shuttle to take you to and from the airport, but they charge you 10€ for the right to use it. I understand this is clearly stated on their website, but Booking.com made no mention of this, and in general I find it odd an airport hotel would charge for the shuttle in the first place. Most airport hotels would offer this as a free service to encourage you to stay at their hotel, but I digress.

Additionally, both of the Ubers we used to get to and from the hotel struggled to get there due to the confusing layout. So, if you do end up staying here, I would recommend having a car if you plan on doing anything but spending the night.

Rooms
I am not too nitpicky about rooms in general, but to sum it up the rooms feel more like a dated motel than a proper airport hotel. All the plugs in the room we stayed in were loose, there was no desk, no mini-fridge, and the bare minimum of amenitites. Our bathroom also had a leaky pipe that was constantly dripping water onto the floor, but that might just be bad luck on our part.

Also, while this isn't the fault of the hotel, there is no elevator on the property, so if you have a second floor room you'll have to lift your bags up there yourself or ask the staff for help.

It's nothing too bad if you're just going to spend a night, but anything longer and I would look in to finding somewhere else.

Service
The service is the one thing I will praise the hotel for. Everyone we interacted with, from the airport shuttle driver to the employees who helped us at the front desk were excellent. They made sure we had a shuttle back to the airport in time for our flight and were happy to answer any questions we had. They even offered to help carry our bags up to our second floor room. Super friendly people.

Summary
Given the poor location and poor quality rooms, I can't say I would recommend this hotel for anything other than a cheap, one night stay before an early morning flight. Even then, for the price point I'd honestly consider staying at the nearby Marriott or Hilton instead (which were only 10-20€ per night more expensive at the writing of this review).","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Spark by Hilton Madrid Alcalá

user_reviews:

The only thing that was missing was to put a regular kettle in the kitchen in addition to coffee machines.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Niyazi Hummatov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLyHYe3HOFbQKPyHqxuvIhiItvttlujsoXyrjaZtcJnGfV46w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"DO NOT BOOK THIS PLACE if you care about your well-being!

Our experience was one of the worst we’ve ever had.

First of all, this is not a hotel—that’s a big lie. It’s not even an apartment or a shared stay. It’s something else entirely.

We stayed in the room called “Prague,” and it was terrible. The walls are extremely thin, and since the place is located on the ground floor, you can hear every single conversation and every time someone enters or exits the building. Throughout the entire night, you can hear the sound of water running from other rooms. Every time someone enters or leaves the building or the so-called “hotel” (if you can even call it that), it wakes you up.

I’ve included photos to illustrate what I mean by the ground-floor location and to show where the room is situated.

The room is right next to the street, which made our experience even worse. We barely managed to sleep a few hours each night during our stay.

Another issue is the pillows—they’re extremely cheap and uncomfortable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCgut7YdQ&fid=0x0:0x8610e3eb4c711e36"],"When":"2025-2-16"},{"Name":"Raimund S.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5lTDPaz0m770pxaM6hQ7rtYf29TJOfTmtHmznIF3u1hfWswC3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Hotel seemed to be in the middle of nowhere, but 2 Metro-Staions are close by.

Good rooms, spacious, clean, the only thing is that they don’t have any windows.
Good service too.
You can hear other people in the hall of the hotel and you can feel the metro too.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrew Auton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSAWB69YBJ9D00F0PUZnn85P_zTuiXk8_ggSarROcPO4G7DK4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Very expensive for a hotel with no amenities included…€300 no breakfast, no bar, no restaurant.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Thierry Clain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJfXmoQErUUknCUghYq3BgDT-XMT7a0Wn8jK1jBDLlG-lq74Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Mauvaise expérience avec Booking et Aerotel. Ma fille étudiante Erasmus a réservé une nuit dans l’hôtel Aerotel Madrid Airport situé dans le terminal 4 de l’aéroport de Madrid le 02 Juillet 2025. À son arrivée à l’hôtel, on lui a signifié que l’hôtel était complet et en surréservation. Elle a été obligée de passer une nuit blanche dans le terminal à attendre son vol du lendemain. Pourtant dans les conditions générales de Booking il est spécifié que l’hôtel est dans l’obligation de trouver une alternative au client ce qui n’a pas été fait. Lors de la réclamation auprès de cet hôtel, ils ont osé dire qu’elle ne s’était jamais présentée à la réception ce qui est faux. J’appelle les parents d’étudiants européens qui se trouvent hors de leur pays à la plus grande prudence car ces entreprises ne pensent qu’à l’argent est à leurs actionnaires et se fichent du bien-être des gens. Quand vous leur demandez le remboursement pour une prestation que vous n’avez pas eu, l’hôtel et Booking se renvoient la balle. Booking c’est fini pour moi. Ce qui est incroyable dans l’histoire, c’est que l’hôtel a été payé deux fois pour la réservation d’une seule chambre par deux clients différents et j’appelle ça du vol. J'attends toujours mon remboursement.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Adriana Aguirre","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIC4FJasJ2QyczvHAoYmeMod8CUsW_hM_q9RKWPIUJd0RggbQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"BUENA UBICACION PERO MAL ORGANIZADO.

EL HOTEL NECESITA "MEJORAS", PAREDES MALTRATADAS, FOCOS APAGADOS, NADA DE "ATENCION PERSONAL" EN EL BAÑO.
SUELOS SUCIOS.
LES FALTA MUCHO QUE APRENDER A LA NUEVA EMPRESA CHINA QUE COMPRO EL HOTEL.
PRECIOS EXAGERADOS POR LO QUE OFRECEN.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"nicolas de pierola","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIxA3oWUkbsg_xkpe3PxA6HhNgm8dwuU-rRhnOQw4svw5jIj44=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Mucho desorden para los pasajeros falta atención personalizada","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ahmed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZ13Cv8_CA1JgxlltqkJLidLwYJZxmS1w1FENIQBBt998lsg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]
