owner: {"id":"113013093983411928073","name":"Holiday Inn Express Madrid - Airport by IHG (Owner)","link":"https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113013093983411928073"}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"JoMich","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0Qdx0CtChWdL4amzhVtedU6JgNzs3A9KzPS8K998c7-u-mDeTb-7WQwuTD-PPX6BcVA5wg=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"The hotel is what we have come to expect of a Holiday Inn express – clean, comfortable, and a great price! The breakfast was wonderful, a typical European breakfast with many different hot and cold options, including lovely fresh melon, and great breads and pastries. My only suggestion is not to have the chic sink in the bathroom that is difficult for a shorter people like me, or else to have a little footstool because the bowl of the sink is so high. The faucet also sprays very forcefully, which makes it splash around. Otherwise, this was an excellent hotel, conveniently located very close to the airport.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yuli Skorobogat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocISD_28kOJa0ewTATxWozC8g7K4Lwxg4V-LcofYe__B7Fl87Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is an excellent airport hotel that meets the standard Holiday Inn Express expectations. The rooms, while a bit small, are perfectly sufficient, the beds are comfortable, the breakfast is simple but good, and the room was surprisingly quiet despite its proximity to Madrid Airport (MAD). Crucially, the staff is very friendly and helpful, adding significant value to the stay.
​Although other guests often complain about the lack of a frequent daytime shuttle, this isn't an issue. An Uber or Bolt to the airport costs around €10, making it comparable to the hotel's own shuttle fee of €5 per person.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joseph K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvWK4DBxhBEvnq3l5hfB9i0QJ82ZkuWux85QdKDP9eWU671EuU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I typically have nothing but good things to say about Holiday Inn Express and hotels apart of the IHG family. This Madrid “Airport” hotel left a lot to be desired and left me second guessing my loyalty to the IHG brand.

This is not an Airport Hotel. IHG app and hotel website say they offer a shuttle. The shuttle runs only a few times a day every few hours, someone pointless. Taxi from Airport terminal to hotel was 45 Euro. Shuttle service in the morning back to the Airport did not run at a time that was convient, UBER ride was 25 Euro. The entire reason we booked this specific hotel was because of shuttle service and it was labeled at the airport. We had a 12 hour layover and would just have stayed at a hotel in or actually at the airport.

Additionally:
Hotel towels had obvious set staining. Which should have been tossed or taken out of use for rooms.

Bed was just okay and seemed towards the end of when the hotel would replace it.

Breakfast buffet was very good, probably ranked in the top 3 of IHG hot breakfasts I have had at a Holiday Inn Express. Hotel common areas were clean.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDGg1LS_zm_7UkcX902gm99&fid=0x0:0xa2f02d0af50a02b6"],"When":"2026-2-7"},{"Name":"nsrosie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeiIm6t64oXJwlfKKV-SU2ENLb40SwZCvBWRts5o7WimonLggB5R8bs4qOdTbCTDXjyRQ=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"I cannot recall how I settled on this particular airport hotel.  We had no complaints and the building seemed nice and new for an airport hotel.  The main issue is probably the distance from the airport.  Certainly it is closer than Madrid but it might be 10 or 15 minutes from the airport on the highway.  The hotel has a shuttle that you can reserve and pay for but we took an Uber for more flexibility.  There is a restaurant that gets decent reviews right next to the hotel.  Unfortunately they ended up closing early the night we stayed.  There is nothing else around the area at all.  Thankfully the hotel serves some dinner.  It was fine in a pinch and we were glad they had it for sure because other than going back into town, options were very limited in the area.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amjad Mashal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLnaGMOfJOw6Jl02Gl12w8nFo-5s-N3f-b5j2WD8xNAL1AJog=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I got this hotel assuming it would be convenient and shuttle service back and forth to the airport. Usually it’s free but they charge for this service and you have to book in advance which I did. I booked it for my old aunt who was struggling on her own after a canceled flight. I told her to be at the bus stop by 9 pm and then her phone died. Turns out the service never went to pick her up and she waited 30 minutes in the cold for nothing and I lost money on the hotel as well and she slept in the airport. Management doesn’t care to help or refund me my money either. Do yourself a favor and go somewhere else.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Trip.com Member","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeCck1CfANpZm9bBk3PHtP97Kh9k25HZfvq9yAWlN3BaIyjSHUPEfWkhAJmuYiJsH-_6g=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"I had a pleasant stay at the hotel. The rooms were clean, well-maintained, and equipped with all the essential amenities. The staff was professional, courteous, and always willing to assist with any request. The location was convenient, making it easy to access key areas in the city. Overall, it was a comfortable and hassle-free experience. I would recommend this hotel to both business and leisure travelers.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mike Simpson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWtt4ocUqnJd-iPQmHcbLq2Hu9GSNzgn8_b6xcFkThDwfXjILZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Rooms, Service, Location - and Food!!
We travel a lot all over the world, currently staying on our way to work and play in Peru, and while we rarely eat in a hotel, we’re very glad we did. It was superb, sensibly priced, well presented and delivered by great staff in a quiet, pleasant venue.
Far beyond what you (or we) might expect from a chain. Well done everyone, and thank you!☺️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"aaa sss","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJLRUAyCvwthzNmB_QeQ7OIjyeqqzBCMGtfQBXmtnDY1sgBYw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This is by far the worst Holiday Inn branch I have stayed at, and I have visited many!

The room was very small and lacked basic amenities such as a fridge and slippers. The breakfast was extremely basic, with the same limited selection repeated every day. Additionally, the hotel charges guests for parking, which is disappointing.

The only positive aspect of this stay was the friendly and helpful staff, kudos to them.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: AXOR Barajas Hotel Madrid
address: C/ de Campezo, 4, San Blas-Canillejas, 28022 Madrid
descriptions: Laid-back rooms with sleek decor, along with a restaurant, a spa & airport transfers.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Julia C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK3NKK-Lr68aOPrgzpwRkTUpk-LXqPXVa63AIM87NOnNpIVRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I stayed at Hotel Axor Barajas after injuring my leg and undergoing surgery. I chose this hotel through Expedia because of its good reviews, expecting professional and considerate service. Unfortunately, my experience was extremely disappointing.

Upon arrival, I was told that my payment had not gone through and was asked to pay again. I had already completed the payment, and only after I showed proof did they finally provide the room. This caused unnecessary stress and showed a lack of proper management.

When making the reservation, I clearly requested wheelchair assistance due to recent leg surgery. No wheelchair was prepared. There was also no luggage cart available. As a result, I had to struggle with my luggage while in significant pain.

The condition of the room was also unacceptable. There was visible dust throughout the room, and the bathroom door would not close properly and kept opening on its own. For a hotel that advertises itself as an airport hotel with good standards, this level of cleanliness and maintenance is simply not acceptable.

Overall, the hotel demonstrated a lack of organization, poor attention to detail, and little consideration for guests with medical needs. I would not stay here again and cannot recommend it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristijan Topalov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIRuPKLmzoF7BNRyW-vrDLf0N80lXj4Pl16Gwe04sHJRTM6eA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The hotel is conveniently located close to the airport, which makes it great for short stays or layovers. The area is quiet, so you can get a good rest without much noise. The rooms are average in size and have almost everything you might need for a comfortable stay. However, the amenities felt a bit low quality — it would be nice if they upgraded them a bit. Overall, it’s a decent place for a night or two if you need something practical and close to the airport.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB8DU0Mpghk6MmnGKL5_Tmj&fid=0x0:0xcf433a02430e3ceb"],"When":"2025-10-16"},{"Name":"helenfUk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QfsTQkcy2KndgDISqLavaj05iVMNn3XOI6udcho2AN-fABBAw5poEMIHSoJIZdEEshKkA=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"We had a one night stay as we'd travelled from the south east of Spain to fly from Madrid on a long haul flight. |The food in the restaurant was good. When we tried to plug in the hotel kettle it exploded and there were sparks of fire . And it cut the electricity in our room. We called my reception about our problem and it took them 20 min to send someone to fix the electricity in our room. The fridge is not cold at all and the shower changes temperature every 2 seconds (without turning the knob) making it uncomfortable. I would not go here again. Worse hotel stay","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Trip.com Member","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeCck1CfANpZm9bBk3PHtP97Kh9k25HZfvq9yAWlN3BaIyjSHUPEfWkhAJmuYiJsH-_6g=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Lovely hotel for a stop over. Lovely staff, but well under staffed. Poor barman was run off his feet trying to do too many tasks. Consequently the bar waiting time was ridiculous. Management seriously need to look at staffing levels. It just is not acceptable.Otherwise a lovely hotel with a fantastic FREE airport currier service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shannon Cox","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtho7fdk2niocaLHHwzq6uXdvWlAZSqdcXCs7gjNdp5Sp9b1M_wA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"If you need one night to sleep near the Madrid airport but have low expectations then this hotel is fine for one night.  It is near NOTHING except the airport so thankfully we just stayed one night and took the free shuttle to the Madrid airport the next morning. The staff is not super friendly unlike every other hotel we stayed during our month-long trip to Spain.  They gave us (family a four) a smoking room with two twin beds so we had to go back downstairs and stand in line AGAIN to change rooms.  We booked through a third party booking service and had requested a room with 4 beds.  We were then changed to a room with two twin beds (that would be for my husband and I) and my teenage boys got two twin bunk beds that were barely long enough for them to sleep.  Does this hotel not have Queen or King beds??  Room service took almost 2 hours and the lady who answered room service was unfriendly and impatient because i told her i was just ok with canceling it because it took so long.  She told me 'all the food is premade' and there is no cooking - just heating whatever you order - gross.  We ordered a pastrai sandwich and after and hour i called and she said 'oh i have been trying to call you - we don't have that'.  How was she trying to call me - my phone never rang?  Hotel is dark, rooms are odd, beds just don't work for most adult humans unless you are short and want to sleep alone in a kid bed, and the staff is perpetually annoyed.  The best part of the hotel was the airport shuttle driver.  He was so friendly and so happy he sang all the way to airport.  He was my favorite part of this hotel because he was a genuinely happy person.  Airport hotels are never going to get high marks this one is about a 20-25 minute cab ride from the Salamanca District, but this one is not high on my list at all.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin WANDERMAN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ_2JkPzKXRt0FnI92dTc754k_6jW3_mpmwAQkustrTzVcxwQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"At the recommendation of QATAR Business Class Cabin crew, I decided to give this hotel a go during my recent transit in Madrid. The hotel is conveniently located just 10 minutes (by car) from Madrid International airport. The hotel provides free shuttle van service to and from airport for hotel guests. The studio that I checked-in to is nicely laid-out and functional. The front desk team is ever friendly and ready to assist. Special mention to Martina, Martha and Alba - who walked the extra mile to make my stay there ever more comfortable. Not to forget the F&B team led by Javier - whom I counted on for memorable dining experience at the in-house restaurant. I was pleasantly surprised by the delicious and qualitative seasonal chef’s specials menu on offer during the period of my stay.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDIjF80eeTLQ5tTSxQ8qLTU&fid=0x0:0xcf433a02430e3ceb"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"Brisa Gonzales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLhTKkbMW4b1DZEbqg2WAuY9FZE2q1Fh55VAIA3vcKNy4kuYQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"This hotel for sure is no four star hotel.

First off, the girl at the front desk gave me wrong information serval times. First regarding breakfast, as to whether this was included with my reservation. She didn’t ask what room number, just said to show up and it’s free. That it WAS included in my room which she had just helped check us into. So, I figured she had seen it on there.

Therefore, the next morning I wake up my family for breakfast to find out once we’re downstairs it’s not included. Fine, whatever, had it anyway. Eighteen euros per person.

I wait for her shift once I see her the next night, to ask her again specifically since she’s the one who said it was included to begin with. Then she actually looks up my information to tell me it’s not. Ok, I accept it and move on.

Then I ask if there’s a laundromat on site here at the hotel and she (same girl), tells me yes but I have to bring my own detergent. Ok, again, no problem. Walk with my family all the way to Aldi and back, to find out what she told me was, yet again, incorrect. So frustrating!

The hotel does have laundry services but obviously you can’t do it on your own. Which is what I specifically asked her for.

The iron we were provided barely worked. The bathrooms have a frosted glass door that does not lock, which was inconvenient because we had additional family staying in our room. The rooms are comfortable I will say, but the bedding is itchy and the fabric just felt irritating to sensitive skin which both my daughter and I have. Air conditioning just doesn’t cool the room down and if you take out your card while you leave the room it’ll completely turn off everything. Keep that in mind if you stay during the summer. Card must be kept in to run the ac while gone.

When we came in we didn’t know how to turn the lights on, which they forgot to explain at the time we checked in.
Oh and also on our walk to the grocery store, random cops stop my mother and I asking for our passports since this street which the hotel is on is a well known area for prostitution. Yes, that was shocking in plain mid day. Apparently alot of the nearby apartments hotels are used by the hour and this is common in this area. I asked one of our Uber drivers to be informed after the incident.

The pool was unopened and unable to use. The gym had far too little equipment for my husband. This was just way too much money for the experience we had here. Never again. I thought it would be super nice and make life easy for us but no, I should’ve just done an air bnb for much less in a better location.

Finding the shuttle from the airport to the hotel was a bust also so keep that in mind. I don’t know why they assume you’ll just automatically know where and what to look for when you get off the plane. We followed the instructions and definitely struggled with the kids lugging around luggage to find it and make it to where pick up is. Just to get there and the shuttle was full so we had to grab a taxi.

Definitely would not recommend this place to anyone. We stayed three nights but I will never come back here again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC13wI0CfAVmC6-CxBFQfvP&fid=0x0:0xcf433a02430e3ceb"],"When":"2025-10-27"}]

title: ibis Madrid Aeropuerto Barajas
address: Av. General, 49, Barajas, 28042 Madrid
descriptions: Unfussy airport lodging offering free Wi-Fi plus a 24-hour bar & a restaurant.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Arie Zur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJpkrbMBZJ3Q-_uv9CzScdmC-VVaVTSmA41wATPoJ_V86gLHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"In a nut shell: Good Hotel Near the Airport.
The hotel is in the Barajas area, not far from Madrid Airport. There’s a metro station about a 10-minute walk away, and it’s just one stop from the terminals, though you do need to walk about 10 minutes with your luggage to reach the metro.
The hotel looks nice and is kept in good condition. Our room, like most IBIS rooms, wasn’t very big, but it was comfortable and practical. The bed, just like the room, was compact but very comfortable. The shower was great, and the room had a decent A/C, a hair dryer, and very good Wi-Fi.
The service was very good. Breakfast is simple but tasty and enough to start the day. It is served daily between 4 am to 10:30 am.
Prices are reasonable too.
Overall, this is a good choice for an overnight stay between flights. We arrived early in the morning and left the next day at noon, and getting to the city center by metro was easy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC8nHEV8qecxhy3Cey2a0a2&fid=0x0:0xec98beb202d82911"],"When":"2025-11-17"},{"Name":"Trip.com Member","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeCck1CfANpZm9bBk3PHtP97Kh9k25HZfvq9yAWlN3BaIyjSHUPEfWkhAJmuYiJsH-_6g=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"A decent hotel for those who need to stay near the airport and have an early or late-night flight, as was my case. Next time I’ll look for a better hotel by paying 20€ and save me the extra costs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"valeria sosa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIakYizJ765F-h1y7bMtH6iiIf1GwD9i-MeV3uf0R98inY-dQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"WORST HOTEL EXPERIENCE EVER STAY FAR AWAY

If I could give zero stars I would. This place completely ruined my entire trip. B&B Hotels in the outskirts of Madrid is hands down the worst dump I have ever stayed in. It is near the airport, yes, but it is in the middle of nowhere surrounded by sketchy and dangerous people. You do not even feel safe walking outside.

Let’s start with the front desk girl with brownish hair and glasses. She is the rudest and most unprofessional person I have ever met. If she hates her job that much no one is forcing her to stay. Her attitude alone should be enough reason for anyone to never book here.

The hotel itself reeks of a disgusting smell that hits you as soon as you walk in. The bathroom has visible mold and the shower feels like you are standing in a swamp. They give you one towel for your entire stay. No extras no amenities nothing. For the price they charge this place should not cost more than 100 euros a night if even that.

It gets worse. Employees entered our room twice without permission while me and my partner were out. When we came back we noticed things missing. So yes they go through your stuff. Absolutely unacceptable and creepy.

They also lie about having AC saying it is only heat. Total scam. And to top it all off the room was infested with mosquitos. I got bitten all over my body to the point that I now need to see a doctor when I get home. The walls and floors are filthy and the so called breakfast they serve looked old and moldy.

Avoid this hotel at all costs. It is disgusting unsafe and a complete scam. I would not stay here again even if it were free. Save yourself the nightmare there are plenty of better hotels in Madrid that actually respect their guests.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Prasad Perera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVNFhzj5LDjWBOLVyk2VPWTIhd4jcAo1GtThN5jjCDk98HTV1p=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I stayed at B&B HOTEL Madrid Aeropuerto T1 T2 T3 from in Sep 2025. The location is not very convenient at all. Although it’s called an “airport hotel,” it actually takes about 10–15 minutes by taxi, you cannot walk. And with traffic it can easily turn into 20–30+ minutes — which I experienced on my way back to the airport. Public transport is also not ideal: to catch a bus to the city, you need to walk at least 15–20 minutes to the nearest station, and connections are not straightforward. There’s no metro nearby either.

The room itself was compact and basic — fine for a short stay, but lacking small essentials like bottled water or even a glass in the room. Overall, my experience was not very positive, mainly due to the inconvenient location. There are better hotels closer to the airport if you plan to stay in this area, and if your focus is the city, you’ll find hotels with much easier access there.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"María Cuacos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIY0i3sPqzD0l6Z6CAIzjgiliJyyVf7Mx3U742YOqBBooTQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Room full of mosquitos!!! user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Alex Iuga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIkDXtiBejBbceDZJkimM1Rf8Use_ks0Dpd5pd_-2JGXvcC0g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great stay, perfect for transit and city visits

The hotel is conveniently located near the airport and offers a free shuttle service until 12:30 AM, which makes it ideal both for transit stays and for exploring the city. The metro station is very close, so getting into Madrid is quick and easy.

The staff was extremely friendly and helpful, and the room was exactly what we needed after a long flight — clean, comfortable, and quiet. Breakfast was good and offered a decent variety.

We really enjoyed our stay and will definitely come back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Abdelaal Mohammed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVOigbqiYlo21y_10QObaZexvIg8WUC_7VroFGfqWJ_qCscHt0N=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Unsafe Experience & Poor Response from Staff
I stayed at this hotel recently, and unfortunately the experience was very disappointing. While I was inside the hotel restaurant, I experienced a distressing situation that significantly affected my comfort and enjoyment.

What made the situation even worse was the hotel’s reaction:
– Staff did not review the CCTV footage
– No internal report was filed
– No support or apology was offered

For a hotel that is part of an international chain, this lack of safety and unprofessional handling of incidents is unacceptable.
***************************
Thank you
My review reflects my experience with the NH brand during my stay. Since your hotel is part of the same NH group, the feedback is relevant to the overall guest experience across the brand — not just a single location.
Saying that “this did not happen at our hotel” does not change the fact that it occurred at an NH property. My intention is simply to share what I experienced with the brand, honestly and respectfully.

No one from the hotel contacted me afterwards, and I received no support or apology. The experience impacted how safe I felt and left a lasting effect. I share this feedback because it matters, not to assign blame unnecessarily, but to ensure the brand maintains the level of safety and care guests expect from NH.

**************
Dear General Manager,

I have reviewed your response, and I would like to clarify my position directly, as your message does not fully reflect what we experienced as guests affected by this incident.

First, while you mentioned that an apology was extended to the Embassy of Egypt, this does not help us as the guests who were personally impacted. Unfortunately, no direct or personal apology was offered to me or to any member of our group at the time of the incident or afterward. In such a situation, acknowledgment and empathy toward the affected guests are essential.

Second, I would like to clarify that our personal belongings were not left in a public place outside the hotel. They were inside the hotel restaurant, which is part of your property. As guests, we reasonably expected a basic level of security within a hotel-operated facility, or at the very least, immediate and active assistance from hotel management to respond to the situation and help identify the individual responsible.

What happened was not simply the loss of personal belongings. The incident had a serious emotional and psychological impact on all of us. It caused stress, anxiety, and a strong sense of discomfort, not only for those directly affected but for the entire group traveling together. As a result, the overall experience of our trip was significantly damaged, and the sense of safety and comfort we expected during our stay was lost.

I am writing this message out of genuine disappointment, not escalation. I expected a more compassionate and guest-focused response that reflects the standards and reputation of an international hotel.

I still hope this matter can be reviewed from a more human perspective, and that it can be handled in a way that helps restore some level of trust and goodwill.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"marianellao268","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QftlnsLB8VReEIa8q3x-FUIWL9jAVnw9OiPzFml0xLx7k1DporKgZdMXGALflbNzntF3w=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"I am so happy I stayed in this Hotel for my connection flight. Según salimos de aquí nos fuimos a otra agencia del Corte Inglés y menuda diferencia, el hombre estuvo con nosotros 2 horas explicándonos todo, asesorando, dándonos opciones que podían cuadrarnos más, en fin, haciendo su trabajo y muy bien hecho.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZT9yECvuE1-e9PDDoTR6BCQLhzJ3KpasQfcCD14iggWlAAw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Fuimos para que nos dieran un presupuesto para hacer un viaje a Tailandia y al decirles que íbamos con nuestra perrita nos dijeron que no trabajaban con hoteles dog friendly","Images":null,"When":""}]

Given the minibus fits 20 people and comes every half an hour, it would have taken us at least 1:30hr before getting on. A taxi took 5mins, but overcharged us EUR33 for the 5min journey… The hotel desperately needs a bigger vehicle or to run the shuttles more frequently. There was zero effort made to deal with this issue.

When we arrived to the hotel, there was a huge queue of people waiting to check in. Thankfully I had checked-in online and was able to get a room card from one of the automated machines, but otherwise it would have been another 20-30mins.

The room itself was modern, in great shape and spacious. The bed was comfortable. A lot of light leaked in through the door from the corridor, but other than that the room was dark. The temperature was pleasant. The free minicar is a nice touch.

Apart from the toilet, the bathroom is open and only has a curtain to separate it from the room. Everything worked well, however.

We had some snacks at the hotel’s Yatta street food restaurant. Two baos and two tacos came to EUR28 - I’d recommend going to the Burger King opposite instead. Service was slow, these two basic dishes took 20mins to arrive.

Return journeys to the airport in the shuttle can be pre booked and we made it back easily and quickly in the morning.

Overall, a solid hotel that desperately needs to work on its shuttle service and how to operate when it’s busy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Heather Milne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUS726LLDGZhxdA72I4Nmrj94brQzVWWI5EHOq0-YotPAZFO4OH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very good airport hotel. The hotel is beautiful and rooms are spacious and quiet. I liked the area. It was very walkable.

Cons:
Unfortunately I can’t say I received good service.

I called the front desk for water and the gentleman kindly said to come get some downstairs. When I arrived, the woman said that they don’t do that. When I explained, she spoke to him and firmly said it was a one time exception. I felt like I was bothering them. I was happy to buy some, but they weren’t very nice about it.

title: ARTIEM Madrid
address: C. de Juan Pérez Zúñiga, 20, Cdad. Lineal, 28027 Madrid
descriptions: Bright rooms in a relaxed wellness hotel with contemporary lounges, a restaurant & a fitness center.
user_reviews: [{"Name":"David Jones","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLUQF_4NVKoLR-Jf9Bqc23CbGEBlGsNOJRETHJ3sd63IskOLw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I loved my stay at the Arteim Madrid! As a regular traveller I like to be as fair and balanced as possible but I must say this is one of the best hotels I have stayed for price to quality ratio. On arrival I was greeted by the friendly check in staff and it was all very quick as I had done the process online beforehand. I had a deluxe room which was big and generally very quiet even though it was at the front towards the road. I could occasionally hear children's footsteps above and other guests until quite late at night but compared to many Spanish accomodation it was quiet. The breakfast choice and quality was very good although a better choice for hot options and especially for vegetarians would have been welcome. The Green Room was fantastic and offering free drinks and snacks 24/7 was amazing! The hotel is quite far way from the centre but I am a keen walker and still managed to do it all on foot although bus and metro options exist. On arrival I took the 200 bus from the airport to a nearby bus stop at a cost of 5 Euros payable on the bus. On the return I got a direct Uber to T1 and it was only 9.5 Euros. Overall what a great place and thanks to all the lovely staff.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"marciog423","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QftlnsLB8VReEIa8q3x-FUIWL9jAVnw9OiPzFml0xLx7k1DporKgZdMXGALflbNzntF3w=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"We were pleasantly surprised by the quality of Hotel Artiem Madrid. Breakfast is really good with plenty of choice.
I would choose it again!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jens-Kaidar Liiu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkB3iFkutGFhkmqBPuklWn5PKsN1pDKXVNcFCDRMDYnNb44sm-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice hotel in a great location. Away from the busy city centre and it's really easy to get everywhere using metro service (~15 min to city center, ~25 min to airport, ~30min to Bernabeu). Metro station is basically almost next to the hotel.

Room is spacious, has everything you need. TV has wide selection of local channels + radio channels and also option to mirror your own device screen. Breakfast was delicious and we were pleasantly surprised how wide the selection was. Didn't expect a rather smaller hotel like this to have such a good selection.

Also the reception staff was really friendly and spoke English fluently, which we found out during our stay is not so common everywhere in Madrid. Even the hotel's General Manager spoke to us during the breakfast and was interesed in how are we enjoing our stay and breakfast selection.

Only downside was that the room and the floors were a bit cold and when we wanted to heat up the room the AC was really noisy and the room got hot really quickly so we needed to then again turn it off and could use it only periodically in shorts stints. But since seems like Madrid is going through a unusual and heavy rain season right now in March (it was raining heavily all the time, every day during our stay), we as people from Northern Europe kind of expect and hope that this is just something that hotels in warm climate countries like Spain are not really used to and built for.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"B3168BOrobertl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QfHhPp0vyvo1Wo3WY4NH1G5QOPAHGBMv_XiebXLZtHzVwVa3wkRhb3dykyKrUCZPlawDA=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Their name may be "Petit", but there's nothing small about the customer service and experience provided by Chema and his team.  From the moment we arrived they worked tirelessly to ensure that we were comfortable, with him personally helping us with our bags to our room.  The breakfast buffet was AMAZING each day, with prompt and efficient wait staff attending to our every need.  During the afternoon/evening period if we needed additional cutlery, use of the microwave, hot water, or ice, all was available.  They also helped us to plan our trip to the Royal Palace using the Metro, something with which we were not familiar.  Overall, their warmth, hospitality, and genuine kindness not only makes us want to stay by them again, but to see more of Spain in general!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"bcM8911TC","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0Qdvd3mFTmnQslJajBtyC7hGXBv5KKEN_7z5ZnXByEfDkAAFDmgEV3HW1P9_iXApXyf1XA=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"I stayed here for 2 weeks with my mother as I was getting surgery at a nearby hospital and needed to stay in the area for 2 weeks for initial recovery. the hotel staff helped in any way they could, provided a loan of a wheelchair, and allowed my mother to bring me a tray from the breakfast room when I was still unable to go downstairs. the breakfast food was delicious and there was all day tea and coffee. the room was satisfactorily clean and neat and there was shampoo, conditioner, etc provided.","Images":null,"When":""}]

We picked this hotel mainly for its location near the airport since it was our last day in Spain. After traveling through Madrid and a couple of other countries, this place turned out to be a really good choice.

✨ What I liked:
•	Comfortable & clean: The room was spotless and very cozy.
•	Facilities: Enjoyed the minibar and overall amenities. Everything felt well-kept and modern.
•	Food: We had dinner at the hotel restaurant and it was excellent. We ordered a lot, and every dish was tasty.
•	Airport shuttle: Super convenient — one of the main reasons we chose this hotel, and it makes departures stress-free.

🛏️ What I didn’t like:
The bed setup. They combined two smaller beds instead of one big one, which isn’t my favorite style. Not a dealbreaker, but definitely something I’d change.

Final thoughts:
✔️ Great location for airport access
✔️ Clean, comfortable, and modern
✔️ Excellent dinner
✔️ Shuttle bus service is a big plus
❌ Only downside: the two-bed setup instead of a larger bed

Overall, it was a very good experience and I’d recommend it, especially for travelers looking for a comfortable last stop before flying out.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB1jJ-_hQsGd0hI-bMKRSXe&fid=0x0:0xc469196792303ec"],"When":"2025-8-17"},{"Name":"Mr. Doe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtVgKboBD_IXIWE0crEyuGSaAtJnV2SEMh_Z1WBw8OOHCCYuy7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️☆
I really enjoyed my stay at Meliá Avenida América. Check-in was fast and smooth, even though I arrived late at night—no problems at all. The bed was super comfortable, though I wasn’t a big fan of the two mattresses pushed together (my wife kept falling into the middle gap 😅).

The room was spacious, the bathroom very nice, and overall the hotel felt modern and clean. The biggest highlight—and main reason I booked—was the airport shuttle, which made everything so much easier and stress-free compared to taking a taxi or Uber.

During my trip I stayed at three hotels between Madrid and Valencia, and this was definitely the second-best. (Valencia was the worst 😬.)

The location is excellent with plenty of restaurants and bars within short walking distance, there is also a grocery store right around the corner.  I stayed here twice and the hotel staff was provided both times an excellent check-in and check out process.  Upon arrival, if needing transportation for the next day, simply let them know what time you would like to take the shuttle.  I also used the shuttle coming from the airport to the hotel from Terminal 4, that was very easy as well, simply wait at the \"Hotel Bus\" stop and look for the shuttle with the hotel name on it.  After you book your reservation, you can send a message to the property and they will provide you with the instructions on where the stops are and the timetable.  The breakfast was excellent and provided a lot of options both sweet and savory.  During my first stay, I forgot my phone charger with adapter in the room and I called them promptly to see if they could intercept it.  They were very communicative and responded to me that they had located it and would keep it there for me until my return for my outgoing stay.  Here's a tip if you booked a room with breakfast included but are leaving before breakfast is served: they will pack a \"picnic bag\" for you, this included a ham and cheese sandwich, a drinkable yogurt, orange juice, and apple or banana.  Finally, the room was fantastic -- exceptionally clean with all the right amenities:  in-room safe, small fridge, kettle and assorted teas/instant coffee.  It seems this hotel has been recently renovated and it was beautiful and comfortable.  And to my surprise, the room was very quiet. Truly an A+++ experience as far as airport hotels go.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Linda Frost","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-k6pUNhmA3Gir9McO_YEHpvc7slb3hB4YXWvUqPtZ3qsiXw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The location closed to the airport was great, the rooms and bed comfortable and I liked the terrace too. The bed for me was the comfiest bed I have ever stayed in a hotel. The very thoughtful water dispenser at the lifts was also great as we filled our water bottles up before we left. Fruit basket also very thoughtful.

We will stay here again as was perfect for us.  Staff were all very helpful and polite, Hotel smelt clean, lovely aroma from fist moment we arrived.

Seems to be possibly a British thing, again is obviously down to your preference etc, and i will plan for this next time we visit.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luís Oliveira","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpsNmN37I3d7uEkrba0FPHJmRQBwPgkHKpGcGtB4Bx0gmrHXa3=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I didn’t give it five stars because there were some issues with hot water in the shower during the stay. Other than that, everything was excellent. The staff were very nice, the breakfast was very good, and the location is great, especially if you’re going to IFEMA. If you want to go to the center of Madrid, it’s a bit far (Uber costs around €25) but there’s a metro line right at the door.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"coolkiwi79","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSgqtqtwBpS3ckto4UV9NilVITNYHhg8IZdaALyIRUUXyV6Ew=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I'm an Accor member, so obviously gravitate towards staying at their hotels. I had originally booked at the Pullman, but it closed for renovations and I had issues accessing my booking, so I had to cancel it online but re-booked at the Novotel.

On arrival, we were booked into the Deluxe Suite (had paid for that) which was in the newly renovated part, but my parents-in-laws (same booking in a standard room) were in the Novotel next door. They were honest, said there would be some noise but it was the separation that we didn't want so chose to (effectively) downgrade to the older part of the hotel.

Lim on reception was brilliant and very helpful during our stay. Our room was older but at least convenient to our family across the hallway.

We did have a few issues though;
The door around the corner to the patio and pool area (closed in January obviously) was kept open the whole time (except one night) which made the corridors cold and seemed to be a waste of heat.
The water in our showr/bath was tepid, just hot enough to shower but not comfortably (the basin water was fine), so we had to boil water in the kettle to warm up a bath to bathe our two toddlers. However, the plug didn't seal well so the water drained out slowly so it was a race to heat the water and bathe the kids before it all ran out LOL.

Otherwise, the room was fine for our needs with the sofa bed made up and a queen(?) sized main bed too.

A few other minor issues but these were sorted in the end, a big thanks to Noelia on front desk along with Lim.

Overall, a few niggling issues so I knocked a star off, but it is very convenient to the Metro, 3 stops to the Airport and easy to get into central Madrid with only 1 change on the metro. So, location is handy although it is a commercial area - very large park nearby to go running/take the kids if you wish. An El Corte Inglés only 10mins walk away too for a bit of shopping.

I'm sure it would have been nice staying in the new rooms, they look nice in the photos, despite some issues I would return in the future. Strange that I didn't recieve the usual email request for a review from Accor, although I did receive a standard 'thanks for staying' email ;)","Images":null,"When":""}]

Thanks to a very helpful receptionist and Monika.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhApxlhbwZC41S3tFSPWOY0d&fid=0x0:0xf33df7b032e0afb0"],"When":"2026-1-14"},{"Name":"Claudia Gómez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWHN1TVx8md2hRriUQTm62er67Ik427G-UngoK3m7KgHptzEsZ4FA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I didn’t have a good experience travelling to Madrid on a business trip, unfortunately.
Avoid if arriving late and have a flight the next morning. Which is the purpose of this hotel being so close to the airport, but they lack of basic practicalities and common sense.

Check in took a long time at 10pm on 28/01.
Breakfast options weren’t offered even after asking the staff about breakfast times. I had assumed it was included in the reservation, as always on my business trips.
In the morning stuff said they couldn’t ask/remind customers they offered breakfast at extra every time customers checked in? Because that’d be too much to expect from a hotel, I guess?
Having an international bank card means that I may or not pay a fee every time I use it, so if you are charging for the room, you can explain/ remind about breakfast to give clients the option to pay it at check in.

I asked about the shuttle bus, and they said I had to come and “get a ticket”, so at check out I said, I’ll have breakfast (when I happily thought it was included) and come back when is time to leave but apparently I had to be there 15 min before and I couldn’t get a ticket before. The way the shuttle bus works is ridiculous. I had to take a taxi to the hotel for 22 euros and luckily I was able to get an Uber to the airport again for around 7 euros, don’t bother with the shuttle bus if you don’t have time to spare and deal with their little non sense rules.

Very hyped and pictures are nice but once you are in it’s not that nice.

I had another reservation on the way back tomorrow but I just cancelled it. Don’t bother with this hotel.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lighthouse Tai Chi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2_LXJGpqjzZ3zuwgvTeM8SB3Ryh-2HoGVq7Nqy6gmhunEJPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A perfect stay over after a late flight. We booked a superior room with breakfast from the jotel website. The room was very clean with an excellent walk in shower and comfortable bed. It was quiet and we slept well. Breakfast was plentiful with lots of choice and excellent service from Nieve and the team. Really impressed by the whole experience so we've booked 2 more stays for later in the year.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kaouech Hedi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKY6fe9XJryAweOixOBAE3btKz6dgpK5SAzZmMeCLD7BYLC_g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After missing our flight, we arrived in a stressful and exhausting situation, and the ibis Styles team was absolutely amazing.
They welcomed us with great kindness and even offered us a day-use room so we could pay less and rest while waiting for our next flight.

A special thank you to Javier for his warm welcome, kindness, and professionalism. In moments like these, it truly makes all the difference.
Highly recommended!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ag","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKbxKWijOZTL2RYUjhHuRch0Ky6ZE90Zdgl3UCw3_MATT2M0g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good location near the airport. But shuttle pickup at airport had to wait quite a while. Also they completely ran out of toothpaste when I check in.  a little disappointed for a well known hotel.  The room is clean and comfortable and the breakfast is good. Good for those taking early flight out","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aragorn Arathorn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUamXgqzDDfQCdandof1q1DuaIQKJ6y3gX8VkqPV-OCrpTzmGY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"New hotel opened this year and we stayed one night as layover flight next day from MAD.
Check in was a little long but not too bad (pity no online check in option). Room clean and bed comfortable but room felt quite tight (we had superior double). When running shower and closing door it seems to sweep out water onto the floor! Breakfast choice ok and guests asked to clear tables when finished onto tray stacks.  Overall suited our needs for one night and you get what you pay for.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Hotel DWO Yuste Alcalá
address: C. de Miguel Yuste, 14, San Blas-Canillejas, 28037 Madrid
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Rebecca Dean","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjyI1sL_W2I4HYB4yvNT2RsPMJJAa9CtsDxTbmX4cqRNqkZw7q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really nice & clean hotel with helpful staff. The rooms were nice and comfy. Rooms had a safe.

Breakfast included and was delicious. Breads, meats, cheeses, and fruits are brought to the table. Other meals can be ordered.

While the hotel is not downtown, it’s just down the block from a metro station. Uber picks up easily as well. I would absolutely stay here again as the price was reasonable!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"pool22","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QfzjVLsS8e-67WTk0n2dtmoLvjFzQd1pnSZl8AzVxF0EXF41tQWWb2Gu3UnsT1rmBrWdQ=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Had a great 4 night stay at DWO Yuste Alcala. Check in quick & friendly, Room clean, modern with a few hangers & shelf for clothes. Quiet fridge & effective air con. Modern & large shower. Dove handwash, shampoo & bodywash in the bathroom. Powerful hairdryer (most of the above points are unlike many higher starred hotels we've stayed in). Comfy bed with a new mattress. Quiet hotel internally, as only around 40 rooms over 4 floors. Didn’t have breakfast as went into City for food & a nearby cafe which was lovely. 25 mins straight into City centre on metro. Only 20-25 mins taxi from airport €16-22, (unsure why 2 prices but still reasonable). Only issue is the windows let all noise in but lucky it’s a fairly quiet street apart from bar over road.|Highly recommend for city break & would stay again if in Madrid!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alistair McAdam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL8QyEwF7zxwXzt7ZK4F-1oYYTinGWnbbfB2CYeNIuztkZqsA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We found the hotel location to be close to the metro station, which enabled quick links to most of the city, including central. The hotel, although located near garage workshops etc, was quiet and we had undisturbed sleep in comfortable beds. The shower was great and quite powerful.
Breakfast provided was plentiful and tasty and overall facilities in the hotel were ideal for our needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bülent Yalcin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIioyA_C-svXi33BC6IR4w91iY1H7uccZdu6C6k2Ddaqzc-iA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very nice hotel and staff. It is in a area where mostly car mechanic services are located. So, on the weekend full of parking space while most of the car services are closed. In 10-15 minutes you can reach the center of Madrid with the bus or train. Nice bakery and cafés and restraurants all in walking distance  The hotel staff is just gorgeous. They took care of my luggage which arrived after I departed. I am so grateful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"CallMehRiver","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPtzRvy28D4lUgKjUQRVMJ_VAbBX3mswlnvkQ0TwNWONvtdatt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"As a group of three, the room was way too small. Two double beds had been pushed together, making it so either two people could share a bed, or the third person sleeps between the two. The walls were covered in shoe marks and dirt when we first entered. For a three star hotel, the food was nice, but not much of a variety. Each day we were served a different type of fruit, some breads, and some cheeses with ham.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kuba Pelc","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIuwhwUpl6InGEzRSOs9Z-SphyK8A-shx9joIxITrWB92AClA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The location is great. The service was mediocre at check-in (these people can’t speak English) but great during breakfast. The room had very comfortable beds, a decently sized bathroom and a relatively modern TV with Netflix and YouTube. The ventilation system however was lacking at best. The breakfasts are rather unique, but ultimately filling (great fresh fruits, so-so pastries, great bacon and a large selection of eggs prepared in various ways).","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tsvetelina Botcheva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7WmbTokKIeyiUuvifbTF72RFzUJfI_Xts6RGKJF7LhvWeeBtl=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The hotel is absolutely amazing! The beds are super comfortable, the AC is working very nice and can lower the room temperature within minutes. The bathroom is big, but contains everything that you might need - even good quality shower gel and shampoo. The breakfast was great, and it cost only 8,50 euro per person, but it contained - different kinds of breads/croissants, eggs, salami, cheese, fruit, coffee/tea, juice. The staff was extremely nice and kind, the location was good too, as the metro station is 5-mins away from the hotel.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"A1022RZlisav","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QfjHmZg8gr7jpDgKhrh5KsR_Mq7L6pkVedvpKQz-f3LMiOd3OjI90CK4uLtF3wE59zZgA=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"We stayed two nights before flying out of Madrid.  The rooms are not large but are modern and had  everything we needed.  We rented two rooms: one for the two of us and one for our teenager.  It was very reasonably priced. We slept well with a hot shower in the morning.  We didn't prepay for breakfast but purchased coffee and tea one morning and breakfast the next morning.  Again, I felt a good value: three types of bread, cheese, meat, hot beverage, juice, fruit, yogurt, and a choice of a hot entree.  The breakfast staff was so nice that they made the stay memorable. They also have available a limited selection of adult beverages later in the day.  Although not in the tourist area, it is right down the street from a beautiful park and has a selection of restaurants close by. When returning to Madrid, we will definitely stay here again.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Madrid Marriott Auditorium
address: Av. de Aragón, 400, San Blas-Canillejas, 28022 Madrid
descriptions: Modern rooms in a business-focused hotel with restaurants, a pool & a 2,200-seat auditorium.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Alexander Irigoyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJu-HlRtonRTQf693NltvwamynSeFOBuYSQ94wTA-ZcJ_kLb_c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was one of several times we stayed in this hotel. Their customer service is second to none. Beautiful facility, all amenities, close by the airport and fully equipped rooms.
Their breakfast buffet is the most complete and loaded we have ever had in a hotel.
Everyone in this property greets you with a smile and offers to help.
We will be back…! Thanks..!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Will M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2BwqDyQ6GmGQkTA60n6cfOT3dpTOnm09kNnGwAUwXdaclZ-fh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This fantastic hotel is located very near the Madrid airport, it has airport shuttles on the half hour. Just stand in the hotel shuttle pick up area. (I was at terminal 4S.)
Your luggage will be loaded into the rear of the shuttle bus. And within 15 minutes, you’re at your hotel and check in.
It is a beautiful hotel with very nice rooms. The bed was fantastically comfortable. The shower was perfect.
I can say that I was very impressed that there are several employees to act as concierge and security that monitor the lobby.
They can help with shuttle details.
The staff at the front desk was probably the most professional I have ever run into.
The best thing about the hotel was the buffet breakfast. And over 45 years visiting 29 countries, this was the best food that I have ever had. Cooked to order or ready at the buffet was everything you could imagine plus about 20 things more.
The buffet is huge. I thought of the Opryland hotel conference rooms when I was eating. Seriously, hundreds of people could come in at one time.
The only negative thing was I could only stay one day. They were booked the other two I was hoping to stay.
When I go through Madrid, I will have this reserve ahead of time and we’ll stay there again.
Also got a nice email after I gave feedback to the hotel. Not a Robo feedback but from the Guest Experience Coordinator.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDd-LXyF-8aSgDoan-mLKf9&fid=0x0:0x68fa59232f2583cc"],"When":"2026-2-11"},{"Name":"CatherineD614","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeYuXGoFc9HnT35lAJ46cKDIsHY7nNIKUKz_f8yINNlqyrU48jCx-4ctPzihRKgde030w=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"We recently spent a night at this hotel before our flight back to the US.  From the moment we arrived until the moment we left our experience was fabulous.  The gentleman who checked us in was incredible.  As Bonvoy Titanium level we were given access to the executive lounge and free breakfast.  Our room was spacious and the bed was heavenly.  Breakfast next morning was plentiful and the selection extensive.  If I were to fault anything about this hotel it would be the food selection in the lounge.  The hot food served at 5.30pm was very unimpressive compared to other Marriott's we have stayed at in Europe.  Would we return?  Yes and yes again!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aditya dangi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJjaMNXLAwZhPwMxxahekIJDsFbDXSP6lEQE2_wT-u0tszEsvM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is one of the best mid-budget Marriott hotels I’ve stayed in Europe, let alone globally.

The differentiating factor is the focus on outstanding service, which you don’t always get globally. From the check in, to the restaurants/ bar, room-service, facilities and the executive lounge, every single person is welcoming, professional, and kind.

The facilities are new and in excellent condition. The arrival lounge is 3-storied, and other shared spaces 2- storied with ample space. Gym and pool are rather large and comprehensive for a corporate Marriott. As a new hotel, everything is in pristine condition and taken care of well.

The location is close to the airport with 30-60 minute free shuttles. To the city it’s a short bus from opposite the hotel.

As a Tiatnium Elite from UAE, I’m used to excellent hotels, but this one takes the cake in Western Europe. Stayed here 10 nights in 2025 and planning another 10-25

Best people to find are Alejandro at reception, Carolina at the Great room resto/bar, and Ilena at the lounge.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCsh0c3EikivYzJ388mdv1A&fid=0x0:0x68fa59232f2583cc"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Julia Castagnoli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKi7fjUpzPtBgajDqC7yvAkVukuopAY8WRjEa31afJmiOiIHg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Alejandra at the front desk was wonderful!
Attentive, friendly and super professional!
We will definitely return next time we stopover in Madrid.
The Roomservice took a little bit too long for hotels of this standard. And the location is far away from the city center. So 1 star less, everything else was perfect 👌","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bubble Ha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBQ6OBgGqLdNppM4K6PJ759fYleuYvLD6B6cC-TB_G4MvIltwB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great stay at the Madrid Marriott Auditorium! The rooms were clean and comfortable with temperature control and blockout blinds. Breakfast was very extensive and staff very friendly and attentive. The executive lounge offering was exceptional. One of the best I have experienced. Pool, gym and sauna facilities clean and great to stay in shape or just relax. Location is a little bit in the middle of nowhere but there is a complimentary shuttle service to the airport and nearby shops and the public transport bus into Madrid or to the metro line leave from across the road.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"cool 1","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJvg_SD-c8pyYaadTSXm-wzgPErrCj_aI69nLV5yp_KXtx-gw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastically modern facility, with the lovely setup and a very quiet accommodations.

The gym is massive nice little pool, with a sauna is a great compliment to a perfect restful visit.

The quiet block modular system takes up a large footprints and could be considered a little maze.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDmToXpOvVIXPOW_6ZSCZrM&fid=0x0:0x68fa59232f2583cc"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"pup0ne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QfzjVLsS8e-67WTk0n2dtmoLvjFzQd1pnSZl8AzVxF0EXF41tQWWb2Gu3UnsT1rmBrWdQ=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"I stayed at this hotel during an event with over 1,200 guests, in addition to the regular guests. The hotel is very well organised and you don't even notice the presence of all these guests. The dining options are varied and cater to all tastes. I also used the room service, which was provided with courtesy, quality and speed. The level of cleanliness on the floors is generally excellent. The shuttle service to the shopping centre and airport also runs smoothly.","Images":null,"When":""}]

The side seats have a dismissed view of the stage and in the play I went to it was difficult to hear actors in the other side of the stage to the one I was seated (no microphones used). We watched Toc Toc and I highly recommend it!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Eleni Tsechelidou","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUzbOGsLed0ZbrYvhfNyu6vxM7-LtpmPtrIA5W3W49BUgO5WUc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The theater itself is average. However, my experience was HORRIBLE. My iPhone was stolen moments after the end of the show and I realized it near the exit. I run back to check the seats, but I found nothing. I started yelling that my phone is stolen and that I want to call the police, so the stuff thought it was a good idea to KICK ME OUT. I insisted to go back and I was trying to explain that I want help to check and that I want the police. I cannot speak spanish, my sister could, so she was translating. When one of the employees talked to me in English, another one told her that we were in Spain and so she should SPEAK ONLY SPANISH. They forced us out (WITHOUT CALLING THE POLICE) and when I asked to check a last time, they got angry at me. They told me the police is 911 and if I want, I should call them myself (via the stolen phone...).","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"A S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK46-0u899i9E82YHg6Hue_7E__FsNxS1PrpB2X2t0T_ojFZrs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is a cosy theatre and all staff treated us very well. 2021: Brilliant play, 'My old friend Cicero' with superb actor, José María Pau. Less spaced apart than in other theatres, although a constant current of air was noticeable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDLoJju2QE&fid=0x0:0x3ae55088f5585e81"],"When":"2024-6-24"},{"Name":"Jorge Espitia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyNQMon4IiEVUC0wNzlyTTMWuqXsoVuYiWZBb95ASPprIkcvq4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I am not sure if this was a direction from the show I saw, or the theatre itself but once the show starts they are not able to accommodate people in. I enjoyed the performance, nostalgia time for me aside saw the movie when I was 10 years old ❤️
Make sure you are on time!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDA_f7h8QE&fid=0x0:0x3ae55088f5585e81"],"When":"2025-2-11"},{"Name":"杨景贻","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKs2mZ4XmGPeVpWJeqq0m6THyq4sxZO60XCNBeCt6Cvc9jEvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came to see this show during my travels in Madrid because the original version of the musical is very famous in my home country. Even though I don’t speak Spanish, I was deeply moved by the powerful performances and beautiful singing of the cast.

Beyond the excellent production, I want to give special thanks to the staff of the theatre for their incredible kindness and support. Before the show started, I had already taken my seat in the Club section, but due to the excitement and energy in the crowd, I experienced some physical discomfort and had to lie down in the hallway to recover. A gentleman in an orange shirt kindly helped by calling the staff for assistance (I regret not being able to thank him in person afterwards—your help meant a lot to me!).

Staff member Marc, along with another gentleman (whose name I couldn’t confirm but to whom I’m equally grateful), came quickly to check on me. Marc retrieved my belongings from my seat and kept them safe, and stayed with me while I recovered. Even though the show had already started, he told me what was happening on stage to keep me included.

Once I felt well enough to return to my seat, they arranged for me to sit in a more ventilated area with no nearby audience, close to the exit, and reassured me that I could come and go freely if I felt unwell again. Later, when I started feeling cold from sweating while lying down, Carmen Brailio Fer kindly brought me my coat and showed great concern for my well-being.

Thank you so much to everyone at the theatre for your care and support. You turned what could have been a distressing moment into a memory of warmth and compassion. This experience made my trip to Madrid truly unforgettable.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"AnaJulia Perrotti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJpSn9thuzRQOLdXnUOD_vIMl9lUaBkvDUZcZDvIvGdbAUVt79wQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It’s a few meters from the subway station. Nice and comfortable seara. Second floor seats do not have good visibility.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwwvXeoAE&fid=0x0:0x3ae55088f5585e81"],"When":"2025-3-17"},{"Name":"ReachingSpain4Him","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWd4VlidDuLrGeIVEqiJC3tj1xnTi9IKLAzac7OFS61_Wcolys=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time seeing a show like this.  It was well done and the crowd reactions were amazing.  Seats are a little tight but very nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDZlub73QE&fid=0x0:0x3ae55088f5585e81"],"When":"2023-9-30"}]

Light & sound were excellent. The seats need urgent refurbishing. We saw: “Doble O Nada” well performed by an international actor from Argentina Miguel Angel Sola and a talented Spanish actress Paula Cancio. Recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKfLwpO85ZWDdw&fid=0x0:0x2b13ecd9e07060e8"],"When":"2025-6-6"},{"Name":"Scott Cleverdon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxUZ7deQRvQX4lt_BuC2op1f0rMneA3UW6Lqq3Na9TTrLVLOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The noise of the air conditioning in the theatre (number one ) is unacceptable.

I understand that this is Madrid in early summer but shouldn’t that be taken into consideration?

I hate to be a theatrical Karen. But unfortunately, these days, things only improve if you complain.

Other than that, the theatres (I’ve seen a couple of show there) are more than adequate.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juri Redecker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX77lmcv_k72l3VJfre33QZBVwkhCYePuS7bxCsbPvRE2KInInZPw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Teatros Luchana is an exceptional venue in Madrid, perfect for hosting events or enjoying a great cultural experience. I had the pleasure of helping organize an event here, and I was truly impressed by the professionalism and friendliness of the staff. From start to finish, they went above and beyond to ensure everything ran smoothly.

The team was not only incredibly accommodating but also genuinely kind, creating a welcoming atmosphere for both organizers and attendees. Special mention goes to the bar staff, who were just as delightful—efficient, attentive, and always serving with a smile.

The venue itself is versatile, well-maintained, and equipped with everything needed for a successful event. Whether you’re planning something special or just stopping by to enjoy a show, Teatros Luchana is a fantastic choice.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kae16 kae","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHt5mfcg4LsClPR4nKN7BP8l6X30HxKvvygDsVWB_jtN81hdxO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was an an amazing performance about magic. There's a lot of twist in the act. We all had a great time. I wasn't expecting that I am going to enjoy the show since it's for children. But in the end we were all laughing adults and children. There is good balance of magic and fun. Since we arrived early in the area we decided to try the drinks and chips. They have got a great selection of wines, beverages and food too.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Evia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8UaPCLfPppbYm6d0NqZEyBQn0IupCtp98U8vpkf_3lw8D568tTw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great theatre for all the family","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jeremy Newton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJhAWXlQ6LSk-WXPLsWUKcb5WTXilnFv3Rnor2qnljKvKjKbA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great kids theatre performance. Well organised for families with young children. The physical space, service and quality of performance were all top notch and it was probably the best kids theatre experience we’ve had. Worth arriving early to enjoy a coffee and a stomp around before things begin. Lots of space for buggies. Reasonably priced tickets. Will be going back. Well done Teatro Luchana.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Terry Illoh Villagrá","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-Ucnrfpm607VCbQpwkjQrRxbdpBEkzii2JTFzN5RenOj8-wTM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It's well designed for babies and little kids. Entertaining for the little ones and pretty engaging too.

Would recommend it more for kids ages 2 and up.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Thomas Breton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAvSrRsSLTQ9xvUztU6OOA4rPhsBhimeVSRkdhm4o6Pg_IrkEayw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great facility for a business event for 100-150 people, very warm place.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Teatros del Canal
address: C. de Cea Bermúdez, 1, Chamberí, 28003 Madrid
user_reviews: [{"Name":"Tatiana Eman Volodutskaya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAfXF6jc3uu6qt6N1NidtSKHvWQrMx4UpWcLgFV5eOL0Q0jsy5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an opportunity to watch several shows in here plus to participate in workshops offered with love ❤️ Last year Christmas workshops were an enriching and enjoyable experience 😀","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOwy8pFAPB28e63uqXFmqm\u0026fid=0x0:0x63cc9878be6da6b7"],"When":"2026-1-19"},{"Name":"Seokjin Ham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIhtf6A7X2UDP--Xi1vhwXxfhLJk0GUh_pTYJvgqrBOTATbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a modern, multi-purpose performing arts center known for its striking architecture, excellent acoustics, and versatile spaces. Designed by Juan Navarro Baldeweg and completed in 2008, it officially opened in 2009 as a 12-story complex that serves as one of Madrid’s leading cultural hubs. The venue hosts a wide range of performances, including theater, dance, opera, music, flamenco, circus, and shows for children. It also plays a key role in major festivals and international productions, making it a cornerstone of the city’s contemporary cultural scene.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCAYo8lyC5sYq7jmYv4bw8B\u0026fid=0x0:0x63cc9878be6da6b7"],"When":"2025-7-14"},{"Name":"M. H.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVGyYzsmD3uXQOrnZKcP0-y3aka2kN9dBmzQOK1S-lba6gNajY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This venue has been by far my favorite in Madrid and the play we saw “Blaubeeren (Here There are Blueberries)” written by Moises Kaufman and Amanda Gronich and Directed by Sergio Peris-Mencheta is outstanding, presenting a real life story important to see by new generations. The theater by itself is new, high tech and a pleasure to be in. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKX_zrOBkYqdsgE\u0026fid=0x0:0x63cc9878be6da6b7"],"When":"2025-6-8"},{"Name":"Elisabetta Borzini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWW9OaJFHYeOlmWeyc9v25DLabeFhCxN7jRlbMj8RkcjNuLAtMf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ok, I was NOT prepared for how AWESOME this exhibition is: the Freak show connected a circus-like experience (without the cruelty of it) with a memorable modern take on experiential museum visits. You walk through the magnificent setting of the teatro Canal, while being exposed to something different and deeply profound at each step of the way. All of this is done in a colourful and playful way, which creates a pleasant oxymoron between the visuals and the actual experience.\nPrepare to be wowed!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDTpbHkeA\u0026fid=0x0:0x63cc9878be6da6b7"],"When":"2024-5-26"},{"Name":"Cristina Reimers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7nD7Z1KHwvEbB0-Kcn597qvV58mmzT_YoKZqeidIwgMoI1p7wpQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great performances. Lovely area in Madrid","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBbznCR4us6gvbUk_OI_JZW\u0026fid=0x0:0x63cc9878be6da6b7"],"When":"2026-1-27"},{"Name":"Suzanne Ormiston","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJTRHoWtowxfTLfRrLIas2HuGhf9FvRCOLbr5qTPol7H6swEQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great theatre. Good views from all seats","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Lyons Comesaña","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWbN1yp22EpnEAadSrjNRc9V5t_1oTIzDfZx3szjSEHzuf_y84T=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great installations for the people that work there and an amazing space to see what's happening on stage","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"The Experience Explorer!","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCx0s_CqBmZdwTDkTfS1KRmnsttddO-bWfm_V9Odzfnfl8-UY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very well connected to metro and staff is helpful and very organised","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Ivan Gutierrez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRiaWEiu4zGgawSaZP4XUdFB4njsIz2i98wlU7vvVCBqLd2OpX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Theatre is specially for children. There are several plays all for them which is great but we found some problems when we went with our two children.
The scenario is good and high enough but the incline of the floor is really not big enough so if an adult is in the row before the children struggle to see, even with boosters.
The sweet shop at the entrance was closed so you better bring your own treats for your little ones.
I would also recommend being there a bit early as the space between the rows is small and moving around is not that simple, so the earlier you sit , the better.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC1kcb7Sg&fid=0x0:0x610830a9ecb6d093"],"When":"2023-12-31"},{"Name":"José Miko Bonaba","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUokx6g8J2udXJFfY0eKHyanHIOt8Lu2toZN-oj3f9OyJAHh87Brg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The play was great, our children loved it.
