[{"Name":"Maribel Aristy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxQAIQzZgtyNKD2CJWI-Wa5P2lSlkiRGBF-G64ZiSt_SOtlTAj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just saw Aladdin: The Musical, and it completely blew me away! I was so impressed! The entire experience was fantastic!

I opted for the DreamXperience package, and it was worth every penny. Guillermo was absolutely instrumental in making the side activities included in the package extra special for us. Highly recommended!

If you’re on the fence, go for the Dream Xperience—you won’t regret it. I absolutely loved it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDPnbanggE&fid=0x0:0xa2334ba031910a6c"],"When":"2024-12-4"},{"Name":"Jason Boland","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLTc2Gn9Vp16jO8zuU9Es01hUDp6HMiXF-LUMp2cgk6O1CJYbO8Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"What an amazing show! Great preformers, great dancing and choreography all around fantastic show! The theatre is a bit of a tight fit as the seats are pretty small, but it definitely doesn't take away from the show","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICFxaDw0AE&fid=0x0:0xa2334ba031910a6c"],"When":"2023-10-29"},{"Name":"Tyben Jamin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLAoxL3XxFIVlHUiQrMbGn5l9PQQf1-w5x07DEoyMD9ofIKtA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Basic. Set pieces were unimpressive, a lot of cg.

Players were phenomenal of course but the production was just disappointing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luis A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQT34cZhWFkF2b-r4Qf-sdDQlSMpIJDsOcRO9iKclYntzhxfSR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went to see Tina - the Musical. Excellent performance. Comfortable venue with easy entry, well maintained and friendly staff. They even have a snack bar.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICev_HonQE&fid=0x0:0xa2334ba031910a6c"],"When":"2022-9-28"},{"Name":"Beka Affleck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJxl_yD8t4x6hgi3kYgBema5QnbdREoI4HC7e-uGzJ5LDz_g8E=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Omg! Aladdin was the best show ever! I recommened this to everyone! I loved every min of it 😍🥹⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDt94aZxQE&fid=0x0:0xa2334ba031910a6c"],"When":"2024-2-8"},{"Name":"FarRockBabe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtwcY-jVxz60skaU1n8pXyopb5ziFHbUS8TbvXt6mJ-rk7-vI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The show was amazing! We were stunned by the Tina performer Luna Manzanares. She emulated Tina so well it was scary. I also really adored Ike’s actor who I am pretty sure was Rone Reinoso(?). I mean… the man’s voice is like butter. Also, to any foreigners who are considering if they should go or not, if you are a Tina Turner fan and know her whole story, then it’s fine. The dialouge is obviously in Spanish but most songs are sung in English and the story is clear by the way it was directed. Also, for an idea of the seating, this was a “reduced visibilty” seat, which I didn’t know if it would be bad, but it honestly wasn’t that noticeable during the show. Conclusion: as a New York City-Broadway gal, I left very happy and singing “Proud Mary” all the way home :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDG992W3wE&fid=0x0:0xa2334ba031910a6c"],"When":"2021-12-12"},{"Name":"Claire Byrne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWD9l99oSD9pvrHTpE_wNxRRO5IRwuEYGjOMtinmCyrefAnbPDA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I saw La Bohème yesterday. The opera was impressive, but the first 20 minutes were totally ruined by the letting in of late-comers once the performance had started. In fact, I think that they were people who had chosen an upgrade and were being let in to fill empty seats.
The noise was tremendous and so much movement was completely distracting. I was so shocked and angry. More people around us also decided to do the same.
This might be a nice idea when you have a lively musical, but not opera. Every musical piece is important to focus on.
In two weeks I'm returning to see Madame Butterfly, and Im sincerely hoping the same doesn't  happen.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Monica Juarez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU34vIEryBFl77DWiRO_7jR4RanYg9dENItRfATb9mlKVs48cv0pQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing!!! One of the best shows I have ever seen!!! The wardrobe, the music, the genius, the stage, everything has been perfectly looked after... it's was an spectacular night full of talent and professionalism. I hope they can extend the season to delight us with more of this great show.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"iRINA Ya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKfdQdPt5QcRciwrRie-N4Wl-ZotydtoKTy6r7tgOWAKq6kvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It is quite surprising how the culture is mistreated in Spain, and how the theatres are more like an amateur hobby than a serious establishment.
The theater company did it best and it was really nice and funny, while the theatre itself is so small that it was difficult to imagine any play on that stage.
It is smaller than any big school theatre.
After 30 years in Spain, it is still impressing me... so wonderful actors in so small and deficient places, forced to survive.
Spain needs investments in culture, not in football.
Cia Paloma Mejia - very good and impressive job!!!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC56eHS2wE&fid=0x0:0xab6df9ca2618a16"],"When":"2023-10-15"},{"Name":"Lost Dudes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdQXzMB5ZutxeLt6iEao23WW8Qwp2P652ncd_nHfZUu4cT1wU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Totally irresponsible people, the tickets said 20:00 the comedian was here at the time that the show was meant to start, a line of more than 50 people… the people in the theatre just say…. Go away the show will start at 21:00…. Just because they said so

Just be ready to have a very unpleasant night if you come here","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDI6KOP9gE&fid=0x0:0xab6df9ca2618a16"],"When":"2025-4-6"},{"Name":"Ashlee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDNhOe50FCbKPwZku8BKUk0I9BRrI5o6N8Ef3t2J6I4lSM3U4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic experience! It was my first time to this theatre, where we saw Les Miserables - everything was 5 star - from the warm welcome at the entrance, to being seated & then of course the fabulous performance. They really did a great job capturing the essence of the story - it was heart felt & comedic. The theatre itself is lovely! Small but spacious, and very comfortable. Will definitely be back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Manolo Escobar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVba5gNIhJlasgb9lXf1BvbrkR_RC_24c3LG6OVsiRdPKF_FPc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I saw a clasical spanish piece, The Vengeance of don Mendo, with my mother, and we really enjoyed ourselves.  The company iwere really warm and funny. We will return","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gabriela Renée","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJSlfySwcpU74LiJCpX2n4-mgkj-LZdrICDOqEsLQOqaj-UE20=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice, small and cozy.
We went to see Les Miserables and we were just astonished by the great job they did. Considering it is a great and large novel, at first I had doubts about the plot and the representation of it taking into account that the time is limited yet they kept most of the story line and details.
The actors are great and the play is entertaining.
In the short break we had, the actors came to talk to us, made jokes and kept the great atmosphere.
I will definitely be back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"graziella juste","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKr7KQ9cSJXbW7lvKdQ5_Dc4T6NQHL1iPXzyMhuVzc4XYqNug=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great professionals.... I was really impressed with the quality of their work.... !!!
I went with my mother quite aged.... and they treated us really well... emphatic and human attitude.... ! We were delighted.... ! Nice and close staff ... they tried their best to make us feel comfortable.  It is worth it...!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"M. Lynn Sim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW4aAsKA-RDXvD8UhDAzh5KGLJ49wqeKkRIcvjmzBO9r-mbdyZIqw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing experience. I went for a show on Christmas. So authentic. The wine and olives were complimentary with our ticket. Wish we could have bought more.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael Davidov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIIv1FF6-Qbz6nK3BfmnK90iZs01X8x2SqiRCTctXBzR4IxUw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful cosy theatre! Programs yearly (end of April) the Delia Steinberg International Piano Competition, with amazing level pianists and 5* organization!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Katherina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVuUP1KJuSNN-X9JNY0ksIXrqyyIUrDV5WPUZa0qV2PCSCYdiqO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were lucky enough to visit Cabaret musical. I was deeply impressed with the performance, actors and production of the show. Everything was just perfect! Madrid has many great shows but this one is definitely my top! I would like to give my special admiration to Emcee and Sally actors. Such a talented cast. The finale got me in tears. Deserves a standing ovation 👏🏼

I would just like to mention one small thing, the sits are not very comfortable for two hours long show.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQ4PpD_ECnqn1XREaWlVhQ&fid=0x0:0xdb0b8a0bc443290d"],"When":"2025-11-18"},{"Name":"JL","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJdjawdOU1mGJpqpHugH7LJtqTKvHFgck6quOTm6tBBJoq2A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We see "Los Miserables" (Spanish version). It can't be better. High quality excelent show. Can't mention a but to this 5 stars musical. "Teatro Albeniz" is a really good theater at the center of Madrid (Tirso de Molina area). "Los Miserables" has been really well adapted to its dimensions and can even benefit from a still bigger stage.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mida Hardo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV181SdyA_6MDM7V8Ixb1lUnrkOAG4BvFRBu9ddqiMfqXH-axw_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time coming here to see the Phantom of The Opera play. The hotel is very nice, the teatre itself is good and a bit small stage. However, it fits the purpose for a great show.
Good seating arrangement, piazza for pictures, souvenirs and drinks area.
The sound system and lighting is good. Definitely, a good place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICDs-CMGw&fid=0x0:0xdb0b8a0bc443290d"],"When":"2024-4-1"},{"Name":"Graham Edward Parker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWuJMo1Hn1dBGwCdWXu_YyI9M4OZi0AwgAtqecb93AVQLEY_Co=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Concert of Paloma San Basilo. Good acoustics, comfortable seats, and air-conditioning. Theatre incorporates a hotel. Easy wheelchair access with designated area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB1tDPqjn0su1OdJLQco7sX&fid=0x0:0xdb0b8a0bc443290d"],"When":"2025-6-8"},{"Name":"hahparis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6M-H0YeZHXw94yff22xMDDzfd-89iFgSqRtaU4F82AL-8wUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Glad to watch Company during the reopening of this historical theater (a great effort of local people to make it possible!). Very good visibility wherever you sit. The public space is a bit tight though, partly due to the occupation of the hotel (part of the property) restauration space. It is recommended to use the toilet before the show as during the intermission the queue is quite long.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICBq_KvxQE&fid=0x0:0xdb0b8a0bc443290d"],"When":"2023-1-4"},{"Name":"Ian Lester","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUoc_Levhl0GKjYsqHMDQpWqttFJPj90LOYIVsp5vfQeWu9LHNc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An absolutely amazing theatre experience...."Cabaret".
We stayed here in the hotel and we couldn't have had a better time. Well done to the team.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marina Pereira Lima","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpAiTF84Sh4SZSzXdfjg_7vARyexzMLzEZhm04Ipq_4_mCZn3R=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a incredible Theather. Everything was renovated, and reopen 5 days ago. So beautiful the scene, confortable chairs, amazing decoration , friendly staff and what a beautiful restaurant ! We loved discover this beautiful place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID-jPe4wAE&fid=0x0:0xdb0b8a0bc443290d"],"When":"2022-11-23"},{"Name":"Chris Salazar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9kxr0PzKR7l_tKlw68IVET4nA-m9L3Y-8EWpJ1uqa9zawoQHFmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful building in Madrid, great experience to see the Phantom of the Opera.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC38u-hdQ&fid=0x0:0xdb0b8a0bc443290d"],"When":"2024-11-4"}]

Take in consideration that the WC is located in the second flour so you will walk 2 levels of stairs up .
But that is the only downside .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michel Robeers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ8nKBW1IxNze0FzoKkDdw8ssJTj1FC7tiYpu2SMX7PNDNZgQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very fine theatre. We enjoyed "The Lion King".","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDRTQSkI_DEDa9UbpIol--2&fid=0x0:0x9c47c76e1a59edf5"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"Alek Zivkovic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVsvpRyRNluwfF2kVkK4MC4gmUO92cf601UJAn6SlX2fyRkdJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"An Unforgettable Performance, But the Audience Detracted From the Experience

The show itself was truly spectacular — a remarkable artistic achievement that left a strong impression. Unfortunately, the overall experience was affected by the behavior of the audience. There was excessive talking, unnecessary commentary, and general noise throughout the performance, which made it difficult to stay fully immersed in the moment.

I sincerely hope the theater takes steps to improve audience etiquette. A live performance deserves respect and full attention — this is not a football match, nor a playground substitute.

With better audience management, the atmosphere would fully match the excellence of the production on stage.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Charles Staubli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJpLJ9txo2VE7Q2E66cryhCQXuf7wUNBmwAosnzwxSw7gTn7a5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went to The Lion King show in Madrid with our young girls, along with their grandmother, and all three generations found it wonderful. It was well organized, from the entry process to the refreshments.

A spectacular performance with excellent staging and beautifully creative costumes. Our younger daughter, who usually gets bored quickly, was so engaged that she joined the standing ovation, proudly holding the mini Simba keychain above her head that we bought during the intermission.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bernhard Kohli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjjQa5dQqjMrJ-iqH84Ov373Um-jUA78u4obylJImleqQUHIB4tw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Seats were very uncomfortable with no leg space. [{"Name":"Murat Kurnaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXf4YYkZmLbR298wNKcW-1MPUhyh9ohOYCw-HRm_dE7u93O0MWh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"“Stepping into Teatro Calderón is like walking through a century of Madrid’s cultural heartbeat. Originally opened on 18 June 1917 as the Teatro Odeón, the elegant building designed by architect Eduardo Sánchez Eznarriaga rises on the former grounds of the Convent of the Trinitarios.  ￼ In 1927 it adopted its current name, honouring dramatist Calderón de la Barca.  ￼ With over 1,000 seats, beautiful stained-glass panels in the foyer by Maumejean and ceiling murals by Demetrio Monteserín, the venue blends historic grandeur with modern stage productions.  ￼ Shows ranging from musicals to dance-concerts are regularly staged here; ticket prices typically start around €15 for some events.  ￼ Whether you’re a theatre enthusiast or simply exploring central Madrid, this iconic auditorium on Calle de Atocha 18 offers both architectural splendour and vibrant live entertainment.”","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCfe-jAV4uIe1GQGOM2wdeT&fid=0x0:0x532790fe7a68f71f"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"L J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWl7yumBYUimlYOiFYZGSJb1YjrXI10zG0Ui-FCS2_Z6RrU98p8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Incredible experience viewing "La historia interminable, El Musical." I must admit, I do not speak Spanish but the show was exhilarating. Of course there were parts of the story I did not understand but still very enjoyable.

As for the venue, it was good. The view was clear and the area was kept clean. There is one issue which is the leg room. I am average height (5'8") and I felt very uncomfortable during the show. The show lasted two and a half hours. This is a very long time to feel cramped. Therefore, I have dropped a star.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDhq6jtxwE&fid=0x0:0x532790fe7a68f71f"],"When":"2023-3-17"},{"Name":"Nicole Cunningham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9x3i6hs_OpoaEbv5FevvBdCk2ErTm9nzClEO16x0ZRSwsyqR30Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"My partner and I saw Houdini the Musical. It’s a good production but as it’s still new we would say that there are “bugs” to workout.

One of the things they could improve is their ambiance of magic. They tried to have a type of guided tour at the beginning that seemed cool, we got to see various things about Houdini and his life, but in practice was a bit confusing and claustrophobia inducing.

Apart from this we loved the show! Well acted and the music is fun. Spanish is my second language and even though I didn’t understand every word it’s well done that I could understand the plot and still enjoy myself.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"P O","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK1YHysZGv3kGcAwZ-3WwXsmOW96Q3r4Lq60bOTJg0cc7X5WA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was at the matinee performance of "A Chorus Line" yesterday. Hughly disappointed as Antonio Banderas was not in the show! It was a great show with all the performers giving their all.

This theatre is beautifully restored and retained its Italian features. My front stall seat was a squeeze to get in and I'm not big size!

The front of house stall are very friendly and helpful. Definitely worth seeing a show here when you're in Madrid. It's a lovely theatre.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICG_qfSiQE&fid=0x0:0x532790fe7a68f71f"],"When":"2021-10-31"},{"Name":"Jihad Ahmed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvIhXwG2CrPp7tlXAYFTyH7AGUM5Y10ZK_kvrg2nWq8BG9ZA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"🕍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA5ZKVWcFAOqJo9OZd7GGnZ&fid=0x0:0x532790fe7a68f71f"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Sunny Rux","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI0lUs_xuqW8kEWMUWO-6KpLCltnMKMeJpSg75Nf60CxskcAhdk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Comfortable seats ans cozy atmosphere. We saw “La historia interminable” musical and was a great experience, even though Spanish is not our mother tongue. Our 9-year child was thrilled and totally caught by the show, same like us. When we bought the tickets it was mentioned that would last 2 hours and have no breaks, but it lasted 2.5 hours (a 20 minute break was included). Highly recommended both the show and the venue!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICR14OK5QE&fid=0x0:0x532790fe7a68f71f"],"When":"2023-4-12"},{"Name":"Summer A.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkStxgtyPwdVIJ1k6zDUe9ZikrcD65XzzmzgOE4A98xhEtpMT3xw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Charming theatre with beautifully painted high ceilings that originally opened in 1917. I went to see "A Chorus Line" and the musical was excellent. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Erica Fontes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ8WDpF_JMiyYYtIZdcTGosGrK4bBrC0JaVhw-FgyNubEH12Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had a detestable experience there tonight after the show \"Una hermana para tres hermanos\". Before the play and during the play I had a great experience, but I am evaluating the theater staff per se. They basically kick the audience out and all they say is the mantra \"We have to close\". I am from Brazil and normally vacation in Europe every year. I  love Spain and Spanish people and that is the main reason why I am here, of course. I have never had such a negative experience in a theater building in my life in over the 50 countries I have visited. The cherry on top was a very ofensive line I heard from one of the staff members (the younger doorman) when I said that I hoped he would come to my native country (Brazil) and be very well treated there, because that was NOT what he was doing to me. He said he was not interested in my country at all and for anything. However, many Brazilian tourists come to Spain and contribute to the country at least economically. He (this guy) will not of course affect my view of Spanish people, principally because he himself does not sound or look Spanish. Maybe he has an identity crisis (a problem with Latin America?), which I will never be able to solve. All I wanted, as a tourist from abroad and a woman of the theater, was to take a quick selfie inside the theater I went to on my last night in Spain. I understand now they were in a hurry, because about 10 seconds had elapsed after the show was over and they needed everyone to be out. There was a couple outside asking questions about the show, and the staff people did not even treat them nicely because they so had to go. I also tried to talk to the box office lady who was so nice to me BEFORE the show, but she simply ignored me AFTER it was over. Again, the show was great and I would see it again but definitely not at this theater. And when I told the guy (the young doorman) I was going to write a review on Google about the situation, he replied: \"Haga lo que quiera\". I am not writing so he will be fired or anything of the kind, because he looks like someone who REALLY NEEDS the job, even though he is NOT doing it well. I hope that the treatment of the public will significantly improve at this place and offensive stuff will definitely be avoided.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Manos Koutsoukos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWU6OWv3Ot5bdgHzRQTxrI63nFOZHJ2ry4PwHCQdiAz65uVAn4GJw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Small, cozy venue, perfect to convey the intimacy (and chill) of the play. I have seen the west end original twice and read both the book and play but this production did send some shivers down my spine. Highly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Olga Gutierrez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK6t8dp0sFrkn6djJCBiZGRwuB8gIWyxg9d-pObcKDI1KkMFw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The play very good but the theater doesn't have enough inclination and I had a tall person in front of me and couldn't see half of the stage.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jose Cintron","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV1QCm4ufxAarNC6XR1b3gIGD2Brh4wq3b0BMaRIXKmIN01gR9P=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice little theater in the middle of the action. Una de las peores "creaciones humanas" que he visto en mi vida. Ningún humor, ningún arte, ninguna comedia, una maraña de movimientos sin sentido. Ni la voz en off ayuda a atisbar qué intentan contar. Una vergüenza. Si leéis la reseña de la obra y la califican de buena, mienten.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bruce Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7ZwHZwFAz7oGQiiCRnTeGw1mE0t4nGp5ZiI-jZsBc8uTP2D5i=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Junio '24: La última obra que han estrenado, El Enfermo Imaginario de Molière está muy bien; muy graciosa en esta versión española y muy bien actuada….El Corral Cervantes construido con sus bloques de paja es muy original y merece la pena. Las sillas son algo incómodas así que quizás valdría la pena llevar un cojín!

Abril '24; Fue nuestra primera visita al Corral Cervantes y nos encantó: el lugar, la obra, los actores, el montaje e incluso el olor auténtico a paja. Vimos 'El Oso y otros relatos de Chejov'. Una esupenda y sorprendente producción del Teatro Arapiles16.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID9qe6j_QE&fid=0x0:0x45b62ca22622ed8f"],"When":"2024-3-18"},{"Name":"Katy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_nHs7UYN0ZC1zv0VNOiSRZc1t2wMUuRWUECcShAnI5ncqhMo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Un espectáculo al aire libre en Madrid Río, Palacio de Cristal más conocido por el invernadero. Fotos pocas porque había mucho público y atenta contra los derechos de imagen.   Lo visité por primera vez invitada a ver la obra de la Celestina de Fernando Rojas. La verdad es que me sorprendió el teatro y su entorno. Al aire libre pero techado respetando las distancias de seguridad y un orden. Para ser un teatro de verano es estupendo. El recinto en donde está el teatro tiene sus bares, mesas y tomar algo, para pasar la tarde y la noche aunque no asistas al espectáculo. También cuenta con unas pequeñas tiendas de artesanía.
La cartelera cambia  cada día  y se pueden comprar las entradas tanto en taquilla como por Internet
Aprovecho para destacar la actuación de Antonio Campos, añadiendo una foto de un momento de la obra. Un actorazo impresionante, vaya desde aquí mi admiración y aplauso . En la página web del teatro podéis ver las obras en cartelera.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDqj869twE&fid=0x0:0x45b62ca22622ed8f"],"When":"2021-7-18"},{"Name":"Isabel Brea","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKNdCkIzzZMovcMnKaHtDzgdr929uBZcg1_29cuw64daOigFw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"El concepto está bien pero a pesar de recrear una corrala, hay ciertas cosas que se podrían actualizar para mayor comodidad de los espectadores... por ejemplo, la visibilidad es regular en toda la sala","Images":null,"When":""}]

She just doesn't know what she is doing. She would have given my coat to someone else if I hadn't looked. She also didn't put any number on my bag, so I had to beg for her to try to remember where she has put it. A scary experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nurece Gunes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyIHdig1hrRmVl1zmzyeOLBcs6W3u1GeLp43Jg3t_GgBWMNl-MeA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It is a perfect theatre venue to watch zarzuela, opera… The prices of the highest places are low but of course one should know that the visuality is by half reduced. But the zarzuela was excellent, truly beautiful….","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDOmIXHUA\u0026fid=0x0:0xa6446797bd4dab2f"],"When":"2022-6-26"},{"Name":"Jesse Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmSfsD69nIW16Jo97xsejsarQeF7BzlbUjkDS7J7eZ07--1cX3=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The show was one of the most incredible displays of theatre we have ever seen. The Spanish opera was a true delight. We were thrilled that they had English subtitles on the screen, along with Spanish. The more advanced, for purchase, program had an English synopsis of the opera. The theatre is incredible, beautiful, and plush red velvet and gold throughout the space. Our box seats were only 50€.  The singing was excellent and the acting was awesome. The live orchestra was a delight and the choreography was modern and amazing. The opera felt new and fresh, despite being  an old storyline. This is because of the great work of the choreographer,  the set designer, and the director.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"S O","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5Uc3qYRTJfYUCKO0wQ_7Jv9QNoRebRujETDNywf926R7zeoU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The vibe of the theater was very good.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin Arkins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIAwXC_jlc2GDIq-N_PNTtr3FCrjWsNTD2jrw4hXcVYBpxvpA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful venue, getting a new house lighting system in. Can't wait to see it glow.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Erin Jackson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3AfzWnMiNzvE0iEoIG0yBtajwN9FJEZ0S-BAexIYdR45NsBf8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The theater is gorgeous, and the performance was an incredible experience. The costumes were colorful and detailed.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"David S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJnU9dphxbl4EubrzfSMzW7wcMlMjLy45938XX2zpqfF_DYkA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An excellent venue offering a first-floor balcony and a raised stage. We saw a techno dj there; the sound system was fantastic, and the ground attracted to that night was welcoming and fun.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAv8AF3ipDGM0qhkiX-ogWW&fid=0x0:0x7a731def889d4532"],"When":"2025-7-27"},{"Name":"Inday Love Daily Living","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_Ec-orR2crLrO258ZdD6fA1iFGccxk5XNbqCqq3-QRS8EOId7aQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An Unforgettable Experience!

We absolutely love this place! From the moment we arrived, we felt so welcomed. The staff went above and beyond to help us, which we truly appreciated.

And then we stepped inside... wow! We were completely blown away. Each room had its own vibe, with incredible DJs spinning unique beats. It felt like stepping into a whole new world every time we entered another room.

The venue is massive, vibrant, and so full of energy. Every corner of it is designed to amaze and keep the good times rolling. We couldn’t stop smiling the entire night!

Highly recommended – we can’t wait to come back in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDPpo2hkwE&fid=0x0:0x7a731def889d4532"],"When":"2024-12-1"},{"Name":"Anita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK9-n9JxrutvtsYJOHbzl4gr4ook99wgAzIhf2buLeR4DJ17g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"What a disappointment is this club. No good vibe, music not loud enough, very stressful bartenders. All about selling drinks. Soda water is 10 euros! Lots of reserved seating areas. Not enough reggaeton music. Very young people. Too much light due to large tv screens with drink commercials on it. Very unpleasant. I would not recommend this place","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICzpNHVqQE&fid=0x0:0x7a731def889d4532"],"When":"2024-5-31"},{"Name":"Diego.K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX2UlzXTRKTN-XWLV8YvQSG78RWXWroQmAUu5QqiUVsP2QgCNI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very good club, but as a Swiss guy who doesn’t really enjoy Spanish music that much (reggaeton). I would recommend going somewhere else, but none other the less this is a great club with a great vibe. One last comment would be the pretty cocky bouncers, but to be honest that’s normal in a club nowadays.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-k8zclAE&fid=0x0:0x7a731def889d4532"],"When":"2022-11-12"},{"Name":"ARANCHA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6wa9XeNnva0IqIbP-jse6Wm3sgDMYcpDfHevJAOFzNcr9D3X1tg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Amazing. We had some starters and then the paella valenciana. The service was very good although they did not have several desserts. If the weather is nice you can perfectly eat with a sea view. I recommend booking a table beforehand.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICRhMe6YA&fid=0x0:0x7a731def889d4532"],"When":"2023-3-25"},{"Name":"Michael Aldrete","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJEhiDtoIZ1Jy8jm_wTkHcaXDzXrs7F6EXuqglgG5xJcY1iTw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Teatro Barcelo is one of the top nightclubs in Madrid. It has a huge first floor and a smaller second floor. They make strong drinks, so the €20 euro cover charge is a little justified.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC4zY_DogE&fid=0x0:0x7a731def889d4532"],"When":"2018-2-7"},{"Name":"Daniel Giray","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7fch86cCFiJpUnoOZUurdgeo_LJCCdP7O7a00sPGAV-uDQeKZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"DRY CLEANING are amazing
Song way too low but great gig!!
Really cool venue","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Barbara Marini Siecola","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFu8KZvunXVl7MP8q3kwFw221BeSdkXJjWoGp2WKNRbS0KlpFwyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This is an anwfull place. I have never been treated like that.
THIS GUY, so unrespectful was SCREAMING with one girl on the line. After 2 minutes, he called my friend, and just told him he could not go into the club. Besides being ABUSIVE in this situation where he was screaming and being offedent, in front of everyone, he also touched him, saying was something wrong with his pant (jeans) and hair (???).  People like that shouldn’t be working in clubs!! RIDICULOUS place, best to avoid!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDW2PHOqgE&fid=0x0:0x7a731def889d4532"],"When":"2022-3-14"}]

It was so beautiful and stunning to watch. You can tell that all the performers are very passionate. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD3lBEAPp00GWGoO1BtAW25&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"Ionut Ionescu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9NQsKcGxNOVXPemlaS1mBdvu71OMNXMxZe7YjvXwNSFEYRDpT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Experience the fiery passion of flamenco in a breathtaking show where every moment bursts with emotion and energy. The atmosphere is simply fantastic — a performance you absolutely can’t miss!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOM3xe-o9xDXUtl_PMc9pG&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2026-2-13"},{"Name":"Alison Holden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdWAHXlqWJ5BgbZXSoYCXVQ_8nHFEsttMsirEXbFzy6EJTzF6_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow what a beautiful show!! I first went to a flamenco show in a small theater in Sevilla which I think was a great introduction to flamenco but this show was spectacular! Everything is so well thought out from the costumes to the music to the fog and lighting. You can really see that passion for the art is in every aspect of the show. However, I was often distracted during the performance. People were allowed late entry which flooded the theater with light from the street, 15 minutes into the show. As an often late person myself, I appreciate letting people in who are a tad behind but maybe try finding a way to let less light in would be appreciated. Similarly, at the past show I went to, photos and videos were not allowed, but here they were which I also found distracting from the art. Flash isn’t allowed of course but many people use it accidentally and again, it distracting the magnificent artistry of the performance. At a different show I went to, they o my allowed photos and videos at the end which allows for people to create memories and enjoy the show more presently which may be a good rule of thumb to use here. Again, absolutely stunning performances. Would absolutely recommend to anyone looking for flamenco in Madrid!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBAh0zc1bUxsle6CifV8GUJ&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Oofrish V Contractor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVI3dFxp6kSwMj92KN7E6vKsZ7_SQBY9sN9EAbCL0LZCYWyD7E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A trip to Spain is not complete without the Flamenco experience. This theater was cozy with a reasonable size stage and the performances were very intense and authentic.

Best not to go there by car and stay with other transport as parking is very challenging to find even in paid parking garages.

Enjoyed the performances and would recommend them highly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDk1iAQFCH9mfoHEng8mFoh&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"Noel Craven","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFhrqCkqzgZARzXW7vSAXWBb3hEk5FZTog71qIzK4-5gSbDg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was expecting it to be a real tourist trap and not feel like a real flamenco but it was very good . The theatre isn't so big and although doesn't have the Tablao feeling it's still a great atmosphere . The show is very good with plenty of both male and female dancers . One of the guys voices was really great . A real gypsy sounding voice . So yes overall a great show for everyone . The theatre staff were great and accommodated my disabled auntie with a wheel chair without any fuss . You get a free drink with your entry ticket which is good too .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCvBqL6JpxZeNJ-w0ziRH9&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Rasim Yildiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZIqID782Es5zwKoOMtphG64N5GarUP9roukxiisWYOVwGuFM_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We decided to experience local culture by attending a live Flamenco show for the very first time during our first visit to Madrid. We purchased premium tickets for the 19:00 show, which cost us 49 Euros per person, including a drink.

Theater hall was small, and despite weekday, it was crowded.

Our seats were in the first row, giving us a fantastic view of the performers. We couldn't help but capture the mesmerizing moments on video and took plenty of photos to remember the night. The show was absolutely fantastic, and we had a lovely time watching it for an entire hour.

The Flamenco show was such a highlight of our trip that I firmly believe it should be at the top of anyone's 'To Do' list when visiting Madrid. We enjoyed every moment of it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAJ9jaGqJg8vTm3UEJOY4qU&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"IOANNIS N. PEDIOTIS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOKfGv6IXnTSDz9RXP9a6IvJcMeApCTXnGqsc7Dh0kAxNV9CbtYw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing show.....
Congratulations to everyone who tried hard for that unbelievable job.... Especially congratulations to everyone, 3 amazing singers,  3 fantastic dancers and a guitarist with an excellent performance.....!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA7vwnXIo0toUwsZnIOleYd&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2026-2-15"},{"Name":"Annaliese Morris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPQ4l4ieBwHz4uiLjIauqaJX4YuKoWbTm_-jwyW-YR6HTzq6veCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went to a few different flamenco shows while in Madrid and this was by far the best one. [{"Name":"Into the wild","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJ4tdDogI88h5-zDEAzSOrDcOLjNakGNX1WKDhcGgOxCQ1d-I=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Walking into Teatro Real feels like stepping into the cultural core of Madrid. The setting opposite the Royal Palace gives it natural gravitas, and the auditorium’s red and gold elegance mixes smoothly with the modern engineering hidden beneath its 19th century look. The renovation in the 1990s delivered the clean, balanced acoustics the house is known for, and the stage machinery is advanced enough to handle ambitious productions with real precision.

Programming is confidently international, with major opera titles, top-tier casts, ballet, and contemporary projects that keep the theatre anchored in Europe’s leading circuit. Operations are polished without being stiff, and the overall experience feels refined from entrance to curtain call.

There is also a modern edge. The photovoltaic installation on the roof has turned the building into a reference point for sustainability in historic venues. It is a subtle but telling contrast to the classical architecture.

Teatro Real is one of those places where tradition, technology, and artistic ambition come together, creating nights that feel genuinely special.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBVP3-MYh0WYdlswNpQ6fuo&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2025-12-11"},{"Name":"Jack Rowan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUj44WCbMr4sud9dVIxWrbyIfnuNVsl9-WLR-YROdDAOFXyqGq35Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wonderful backstage tour in English by Timothy. Very knowledgeable, generous with his time and gave us a tremendous insight into a pretty mind-blowing theatre.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCYr-l-RwX7Ro-UHy10zRNr&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"Miriam Noyola","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgVIsUixO8fM_KsCIn71tKnKA89l1kvfxvNVIy384yY1fglsC2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stopped by Teatro Real and loved the energy, beautiful building, amazing surroundings, and spontaneous performances happening in the Plaza de Oriente. One of those places where culture, history, and everyday Madrid all meet.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBeTnWJDLoZl-_EO73qAWrC&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Sveto Rakovic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXELv1h6KNSxjLBZ4irfEkGKjzrypoUHg3izpRjZZ_yFLu388A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Certainly nice to see, but in my opinion not necessary if you are in the city as a tourist. in front is statue of Isabelle II, also not a must see as a tourist.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAb65lscm-oMU27MSlmJGEr&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"Zygmunt G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKNkLPL5Gp69yUUiKsMmnW4VmZBUipJsIYlzaV1IffHmDNofg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It is very nice opera house, and important one on the world's operatic map. Casts are usually very good, and producers like stage and music directors are always better than average. Theatre is modern, accessible for disabled. Ushers & people serving directly to public are nice, friendly and helpful. I had a bad side seat, and I moved to better section. While I was waiting for last moment to take an empty seat, no one was bothering me (not like in Vienna - where to do such switch would be like almost a crime...)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDvv8_XWA&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2024-12-25"},{"Name":"Мария Винюкова","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVM9e1S363yEckbJibL-ZXDgT3sOXVCEcB4RZVObQFfsYK-27s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent theater. I saw the National Ballet of Madrid perform and really enjoyed it. Tickets need to be purchased well in advance, and it's best to arrive 15 minutes before the show.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAlKYyQNBDoHE03GFNMBsf-&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2025-10-22"},{"Name":"S Madani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocISVAMLLdVIr741j0lMNHfJjaWt4i9olBnCFD7OEFB8-IVFPg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Carmen at the Teatro Real
Madrid, 13 December 2025

Don José did not impress me at first. Too swiftly he recognized Micaëla — as if the long and perilous journey of a woman alone meant nothing — and too swiftly he uttered “my mother,” with the distracted reflex of someone suddenly reminded of laundry to be picked up. The moral gravity of the moment barely had time to settle.

Then there was the small but telling detail of the arrest papers: José typing them, only for his superior to present them as if they were his own. It felt oddly Kafkaesque — reminiscent of the Barnabas brothers in The Castle, who insist they are K.’s assistants despite the fact that he has clearly never seen them before. Authority without authorship; responsibility without agency.

And yet — it grew on me.
José grew on me.
By the end, he made me cry.

The card-player with the curly blond hair — Frasquita (or perhaps Mercedes) — played her role to perfection. There was an irrepressible joy in her presence, a love of life that at times seemed even greater than Carmen’s own, lighter and more instinctive, less burdened by fate.

Micaëla’s spectacles and Escamillo’s trousers were striking choices: small visual decisions that subtly anchored character. And when Micaëla leaps from the building with a gun, the moment flirts with simple amusement — but only on the surface. Beneath it lies something far darker: a woman fighting for her life against impossible odds, courage mistaken for naïveté.

This will probably be my last Carmen of the year — after Prague in January, Lausanne in the spring, and London and Würzburg over the summer.

What a work Carmen is.

Muchas gracias.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDlPmbdxFBmgwT0E0i_0kGP&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"Mario Ovalle (Dito Ovalle)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVsNi48C5vFzKSe7iBLjus1BgklqVEs5EJzsRS4mPt3I2fQL2vYAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow, wow, WOW! The building is very well managed, very nice. Seats are comfy, sound was great! I saw la traviata and it was worth it!
You have to buy ticket in advance","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBi0lUqkLKj2D-qnq1SEOht&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2025-7-24"}]

Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD3lBEAPp00GWGoO1BtAW25&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"Ionut Ionescu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9NQsKcGxNOVXPemlaS1mBdvu71OMNXMxZe7YjvXwNSFEYRDpT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Experience the fiery passion of flamenco in a breathtaking show where every moment bursts with emotion and energy. The atmosphere is simply fantastic — a performance you absolutely can’t miss!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOM3xe-o9xDXUtl_PMc9pG&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2026-2-13"},{"Name":"Alison Holden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdWAHXlqWJ5BgbZXSoYCXVQ_8nHFEsttMsirEXbFzy6EJTzF6_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow what a beautiful show!! I first went to a flamenco show in a small theater in Sevilla which I think was a great introduction to flamenco but this show was spectacular! Everything is so well thought out from the costumes to the music to the fog and lighting. You can really see that passion for the art is in every aspect of the show. However, I was often distracted during the performance. People were allowed late entry which flooded the theater with light from the street, 15 minutes into the show. As an often late person myself, I appreciate letting people in who are a tad behind but maybe try finding a way to let less light in would be appreciated. Similarly, at the past show I went to, photos and videos were not allowed, but here they were which I also found distracting from the art. Flash isn’t allowed of course but many people use it accidentally and again, it distracting the magnificent artistry of the performance. At a different show I went to, they o my allowed photos and videos at the end which allows for people to create memories and enjoy the show more presently which may be a good rule of thumb to use here. Again, absolutely stunning performances. Would absolutely recommend to anyone looking for flamenco in Madrid!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBAh0zc1bUxsle6CifV8GUJ&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Oofrish V Contractor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVI3dFxp6kSwMj92KN7E6vKsZ7_SQBY9sN9EAbCL0LZCYWyD7E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A trip to Spain is not complete without the Flamenco experience. This theater was cozy with a reasonable size stage and the performances were very intense and authentic.

Best not to go there by car and stay with other transport as parking is very challenging to find even in paid parking garages.

Enjoyed the performances and would recommend them highly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDk1iAQFCH9mfoHEng8mFoh&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"Noel Craven","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFhrqCkqzgZARzXW7vSAXWBb3hEk5FZTog71qIzK4-5gSbDg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was expecting it to be a real tourist trap and not feel like a real flamenco but it was very good . The theatre isn't so big and although doesn't have the Tablao feeling it's still a great atmosphere . The show is very good with plenty of both male and female dancers . One of the guys voices was really great . A real gypsy sounding voice . So yes overall a great show for everyone . The theatre staff were great and accommodated my disabled auntie with a wheel chair without any fuss . You get a free drink with your entry ticket which is good too .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCvBqL6JpxZeNJ-w0ziRH9&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Rasim Yildiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZIqID782Es5zwKoOMtphG64N5GarUP9roukxiisWYOVwGuFM_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We decided to experience local culture by attending a live Flamenco show for the very first time during our first visit to Madrid. We purchased premium tickets for the 19:00 show, which cost us 49 Euros per person, including a drink.

Theater hall was small, and despite weekday, it was crowded.

Our seats were in the first row, giving us a fantastic view of the performers. We couldn't help but capture the mesmerizing moments on video and took plenty of photos to remember the night. The show was absolutely fantastic, and we had a lovely time watching it for an entire hour.

The Flamenco show was such a highlight of our trip that I firmly believe it should be at the top of anyone's 'To Do' list when visiting Madrid. We enjoyed every moment of it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAJ9jaGqJg8vTm3UEJOY4qU&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"IOANNIS N. PEDIOTIS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOKfGv6IXnTSDz9RXP9a6IvJcMeApCTXnGqsc7Dh0kAxNV9CbtYw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing show.....
Congratulations to everyone who tried hard for that unbelievable job.... Especially congratulations to everyone, 3 amazing singers,  3 fantastic dancers and a guitarist with an excellent performance.....!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA7vwnXIo0toUwsZnIOleYd&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2026-2-15"},{"Name":"Annaliese Morris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPQ4l4ieBwHz4uiLjIauqaJX4YuKoWbTm_-jwyW-YR6HTzq6veCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went to a few different flamenco shows while in Madrid and this was by far the best one. I loved it, thank you!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_Hrb-plsJ7g_ZbxN4_Kdr&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-9-29"}]

Maravillosa adaptación de una película que marcó un antes y un después en el cine. Nos deleitaron con sus voces cantando las diferentes canciones en un musical de excelencia. El vestuario muy ajustado al original y la escenografía estupenda. La sala es ideal. Muy recomendable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCH4huDRIn-QTEGAdpOGCj4&fid=0x0:0x290f271f750dd674"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"M. Teresa G.R.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdNu2uP-KFLB4wnDuKzQndXjWr89Q4KWUxB_SQ3RkvPUGrTbTp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Buena visibilidad, buena acústica y butacas cómodas.
En invierno los frioleros no estarán muy a gusto porque la calefacción está baja, además hay que hacer cola en el exterior porque abren puertas con poca antelación. Yo asistí a la función de las 20:30 de un sábado.
No hay servicio de bar ni máquinas de vending.
A unos cinco minutos andando hay un parking gratuito de un centro comercial.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paula Pascual Sánchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDRnRqda4J4nDUrnct6GdxKoRD1W2e2ljsUsw0UgpktB1oC5xy=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Mi reseña no puede ser más negativa debido a la absoluta falta de sensibilidad y profesionalidad que experimentamos hoy.

Viajamos desde Los Molinos (unos 70 km) con un grupo de personas con discapacidad intelectual para ver la función de Tarzán de las 17:00 h. Salimos a las 15:15 h, pero debido a un atasco inesperado y a una equivocación con la dirección del teatro, llegamos allí a las 17:10 h.

Para nuestra incredulidad, se nos prohibió la entrada de forma tajante y se nos echó del edificio. No hubo consideración alguna, ni un minuto de flexibilidad, a pesar de las circunstancias especiales y el gran esfuerzo de logística y coste económico que supuso movilizar al grupo (autobús, acompañantes, entradas).

El resultado es que el grupo de personas con discapacidad intelectual se quedó sin ver la obra de teatro.

La única "solución" que se nos ofreció fue esperar hora y media en la calle para ver la última media hora después del descanso. Esto es una ofensa para cualquier grupo, pero especialmente para uno con estas necesidades.

Es totalmente vergonzoso. Hemos visitado numerosos teatros, cines y salas de conciertos y jamás hemos recibido un trato tan cruel e inflexible. Además, es indignante que en su página web presuman de ser un teatro accesible para todas las personas cuando la realidad de su trato demuestra lo contrario.

Ya hemos decidido poner una reclamación formal en el Ayuntamiento de Coslada. Este tipo de comportamiento no se puede tolerar.

Cero recomendable. Una experiencia desoladora.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Fernando F","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0VVCtPR_YiJDCp1hAAia2yFZt8M4HZzGzebyPMSW4R10K7smh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Moderno, con mucho contenido cultural y grandes planes. En mi caso estuvimos viendo Romeo y Julieta. Un musical precioso, muy bien ejecutado y cantan de maravilla. Se aparca relativamente bien, aunque no sea en la misma puerta claro. Es un buen centro cultural y teatro en Coslada.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID6mubHzQE&fid=0x0:0x290f271f750dd674"],"When":"2021-9-26"},{"Name":"A. title: Municipal Cultural Center Federico García Lorca
address: Av. de Eibar, s/n, 28830 San Fernando de Henares, Madrid
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"JOSE LUIS Lopez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlAs5EsTF3RdsdhTpk1DiQSBNVZC_JbAFCRxYp-d5HjQdhfBCu7A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Sunbre lo indica","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marcos Fernández Mendoza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbyUgEAvQXFzrYFjLEMYjZD8xbuoAysxEqOVXVgfpCNKjRnzsL=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Todp","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jose Jalai","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSkT0fRRyCxBvOUJH7qRyT3v8U6HftAFSrBG7mYKMGJJgo8Ys4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Una única estrella ⭐️
Lo principal es UNA AUTÉNTICA VERGÜENZA que con el calor que hace en la calle, nos metan allí a un montón de personas y no tengan la dignidad de poner el aire acondicionado.

Valoración crítica sobre el Centro Municipal de Cultura Federico García Lorca de San Fernando de Henares, basada en la experiencia reciente y en las características más relevantes para los visitantes, aunque el centro destaca por su buena acústica y accesibilidad para personas con movilidad reducida, presenta importantes inconvenientes para el público: la climatización es deficiente en días de calor intenso, lo que dificulta la estancia; el aparcamiento resulta complicado; la cafetería permanece cerrada desde hace tiempo, restando opciones de comodidad; y las butacas, demasiado juntas, pueden resultar incómodas en eventos largos. Estos aspectos afectan negativamente la experiencia general, especialmente en jornadas calurosas o para quienes buscan mayor confort y servicios durante su visita.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDKrsPyzoGI3rA4y50Kpo35&fid=0x0:0x461cffe17964f6cf"],"When":"2025-6-24"},{"Name":"yolanda rubio heredia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUtRXa3OGvsNoMhG5iwhGQfTyi5le5G7nuvSD1tq4dy13BxX12i=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"El sábado 26 / 6 /25 actuamos en este teatro.   Y fue lamentable. ¿ y el aire ?, ¿ dónde está el aire ?  En estas fechas con la calor que hace que este teatro no tenga aire acondicionado me parece vergonzoso. El teatro lleno de gente y de personas mayores , abuelos que van a ver a sus nietos y que tenga que pasar el calor que pasamos. Ellos desde butacas y nosotros en los minis camerinos. Alquilar el teatro es una pasta y por tanto tiene que estar en condiciones de poder alquilarlo. Suerte que a nadie le dio un golpe de calor. ¡¡Ayuntamiento De San Fernando de Henares!! Con el dinero que se recauda al año en general de todos los vecinos ya podríais poner aire acondicionado . No tenéis vergüenza ninguna . Para prueba un botón ,aquí os dejo un vídeo de cómo la gente se quejaba antes de empezar el espectáculo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDXM4Ky5_UvWYUHMLgWQRw4&fid=0x0:0x461cffe17964f6cf"],"When":"2025-7-1"},{"Name":"cuentosdeazucar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJlOCGAtLnwKnvUmK0cMEChvLAY4WkNjvoU8YdbanVqt3aNa6a=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Esto es una vergüenza . Contratamos este teatro y tanto bailarines como espectadores vivimos un terror con el calor! Hubo gente que se mareó. Nos quejamos y nos dijeron que tenían el aire roto hace un año y no lo arreglaban pero ocultaron esa información a la hora de contratarlo . Fue un tremendo horror . Una absoluta vergüenza .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Beac","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKLbb88vJZyyB_9rO9K5bYbVobQok-RfIRx5xh3KnPAUzY5QA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un Centro con multitud de actividades para todos los públicos. A note about the theatre: it is beautiful and comfortable and there is ample leg room especially if you’re a tall guy like me. Reduced mobility seats are available but I didn’t see any elevators. Note: I didn’t see them. They could be hidden somewhere

La función que vimos ayer fue una demostración de entrega, técnica y sensibilidad. Cada actor consiguió que el texto de Lorca respirara con una intensidad pocas veces vista, haciendo que el público quedara completamente inmerso en la tragedia y en la belleza poética de la obra.

La interpretación fue impecable: poderosa cuando debía serlo, contenida en los momentos precisos y siempre profundamente humana. Se notaba el trabajo, la pasión por el oficio y el respeto por el texto. Es un privilegio encontrar espectáculos en los que la cercanía del teatro se convierte en pura emoción.

Gracias por una noche inolvidable y por recordarnos el valor de un teatro hecho con rigor y verdad. Enhorabuena a todo el equipo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Katy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_nHs7UYN0ZC1zv0VNOiSRZc1t2wMUuRWUECcShAnI5ncqhMo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Teatro con encanto, pequeño casi familiar, ya que cuenta solo con 60 butacas. Lo frecuentamos bastante. La última puesta en escena es la de “Melocotón en almíbar. Divertida a más no poder y con un buen reparto de actores. Nos ha encantado. Variados carteles con buena crítica de obras clásicas y contemporáneos.
Está en la zona centro cerca del Museo Reina Sofia y del centro musical del mismo nombre. Obras clásicas y contemporáneas para adultos, y cuentos y magia para niños, en una sala acogedora e íntima. bien comunicado y con un buen servicio de cafeterías, bares de tapeo y restaurantes.
Enhorabuena a todo el equipo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDR1fD8Bw&fid=0x0:0xb3357320f2433cd4"],"When":"2023-4-30"},{"Name":"Amaro Vigil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLMGD16a4vFFSKiF_TNeMEtSPcgVcUE1407kQzjFTvlKeSOcig=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un pequeño teatro en Lavapiés tan acogedor como el propio barrio.

Hay que apoyar estás iniciativas y que mejor manera de hacerlo que ir a ver sus representaciones.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:

Great staff, went for lunch, brought friends back for dinner! Lots of food, really good!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCU9MuA62R5Ng2qfVJlDOW6&fid=0x0:0x109f2a7e6cc425a3"],"When":"2025-10-16"},{"Name":"Scott Cleverdon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxUZ7deQRvQX4lt_BuC2op1f0rMneA3UW6Lqq3Na9TTrLVLOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful, elegant and classy.

Teatro Español is a must-visit for theatre lovers in Madrid. Located in the heart of the city in Plaza de Santa Ana, it offers a rich program of classic and contemporary plays, often with top-tier Spanish actors and directors. The venue itself is stunning—intimate yet grand, with impeccable acoustics and a beautifully preserved interior. Its blend of tradition and innovation makes it one of Spain’s most respected cultural institutions.

Brief History
Teatro Español traces its origins back to 1583, when it began as the Corral del Príncipe, one of the first permanent public theatres in Spain. In 1745, it was rebuilt and became known as Teatro del Príncipe, and eventually Teatro Español. Over the centuries, it has premiered works by Spanish literary giants like Lope de Vega, Calderón de la Barca, and García Lorca. Despite fires and political upheavals, it has remained a cornerstone of Spanish theatre for over 400 years, continuously evolving while honoring its dramatic heritage.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA1F7syW8vvx6wGkVxfspFN&fid=0x0:0x109f2a7e6cc425a3"],"When":"2025-7-13"},{"Name":"Steve Evans","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWk5ZRt-8L_M3EkHywFbiwf9816YRJHSWa8vUstUmKqqh01n1AV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Charming old theatre with character. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Teresa Salazar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLtJheAWm46QLW6PeTsEtbRfpevsy4JdjypiWUgPJBWMHLmbg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We went to the Noche Flamenca. Even though the website, promotional material and tickets prominently featured flamenco dancing, there was no dancing, just singing and people playing guitars. One of the singers didn't know the lyrics of the song and kept looking at his phone during the show. Very unprofessional. The drinks were also super pricy. Very disappointing!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cris Martín","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVe6zcBksusX9RcpixLLoMzTSYvmN61BTeFEF1HVS-Xk0J5KO0i=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"¡¡Se ha convertido sin duda en uno de mis lugares favoritísimos de Madrid!!

Es cierto que fue curioso investigar por donde era la entrada al teatro, pero su nombre lo indica claramente “Clandestino”.

Chuli (el portero) espera a los espectadores en la puerta e indica amablemente por donde se accede. Es un tío majísimo y da gusto comentar con él las funciones!!

El bar es precioso y sus camareros un cielo, muy atentos y muy agradables con los clientes. Alejandro, gracias por hacerme sentir como en casa!! Es maravilloso ver cómo disfrutas de tu trabajo y lo bien que lo haces!!

En cuanto al teatro, pues un espectáculo!! Tuve la oportunidad de ver a Raul Fernandez (el mago) que me divirtió muchísimo y me mantuvo embobada con su magia todo el espectáculo!!! Después pude disfrutar de los monólogos de Enrique el Grande y es que su propio nombre lo indica “es un grande” un crack!!! Y por último Aryel Altamar…lo suyo no es normal!! Absolutamente increíble!!

Estoy deseando volver al local porque tanto en espectáculos como en ambiente la calidad es evidente!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDZt6i4eQ&fid=0x0:0xf147b298ffaf6ce0"],"When":"2023-10-8"},{"Name":"Maria Luisa Gonzalez Atienza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbpmCnegduRSdDI-QqHIbI1wPVv82vsED8QWN-uwZLm6ioyUqE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cómo su nombre indica teatro escondido dentro del sótano de un edificio de viviendas...

Muy divertido y original.

Multitud de actuaciones, espectáculos y artistas en diferentes horarios y días. (Precio 10 euros!!)

Tiene bar y mesitas en el recinto de las actuaciones.

Vimos anoche un monólogo de Nicolás Biffi, buenísimo, no paramos de reírnos!!

En definitiva, un sitio fantástico para pasar una velada genial  y encima a unos precios increíbles!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICx0uW_4gE&fid=0x0:0xf147b298ffaf6ce0"],"When":"2023-5-14"},{"Name":"Danny Hinsch","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1dvl5ljSw1U7ZxC-u9gXedCwI71kHz7b_7BfyhjI6Wpq0x_I=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nos encanto a mis amigas y a mi.
Vimos MILF, unos monólogos interpretados por mujeres fantásticas, que nos hicieron reír mucho, sobre todo me reí con Laura del Val, buenísima!
Es un lugar algo difícil de encontrar, porque se encuentra dentro de un edificio, al cual debes acceder a la sala por un portal y en la fachada no hay indicaciones de ningún tipo, debes de entrar a dicho portal hasta el fondo y lo encontrarás bajando unas escaleras.
Como su nombre indica es Clandestino 🙂
Puedes tomar algo mientras ves el espectáculo 😏
Te recomiendo que lo visites.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChp9OOyAE&fid=0x0:0xf147b298ffaf6ce0"],"When":"2023-2-23"},{"Name":"Sofia Victoria Gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUEXuHYTnhVk__V-mSomC88Wxa18yRh1vLFXCClHcVXyoU30HVMag=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El sitio es precioso antiguamente era un cabaret y también donde hacían los after party hace tiempo atrás. Disfrutamos el monólogo! volveremos seguro.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDr7oGAyQE&fid=0x0:0xf147b298ffaf6ce0"],"When":"2024-7-17"},{"Name":"A.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJTswSiWoqDPcKuCwpX2QTElw-dpSGwbUohifbv-kXycuy7nw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"¡RECOMENDABLE!
Fuimos el jueves 8/3 a las 20:00 y el espectáculo muy bien y nos dejaron quedarnos al siguiente sin pagar más. Las entradas son económicas aunque si no las coges con un poco de anticipación te cuestan y si las coges en el mismo bar cuestan el doble. Lo único malo la zona donde esperas tomando algo antes de entrar al monólogo un poco fea, descuidada. Por lo demás trabajadores atentos y amables. El cómico que nos tocó estuvo a la puerta para despedirse, muy simpático.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDhiZ6rxAE&fid=0x0:0xf147b298ffaf6ce0"],"When":"2023-3-11"},{"Name":"hefziba Pineda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWWfLQcsL82Jns5NkvinZTVyB01UFVz2w67AdgkkRARvtfcSKM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fui a pasar unos días en Madrid y sin duda descubrir este lugar fue lo mejor de mi viaje,poder ver en una misma tarde magia, hipnosis, y comedia no te lo ofrece cualquier lugar.
Si vuelvo a Madrid será una parada obligatoria, MUY RECOMENDADO!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJ1v3sjwE&fid=0x0:0xf147b298ffaf6ce0"],"When":"2023-7-16"},{"Name":"Estrella Sánchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXT9YvPykF1CXerdXXHUmaGsGMqrmjxN0TYWMCtCVzPiEXjOF39GQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pequeño teatro escondido en un portal en el sótano con decoración preciosa y el personal súper amable. Fuimos a ver el Humor de los 90 hoy y nuestras felicitaciones para Angelito el largo, nos reímos un montón y lo haces genial!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC11uyz1gE&fid=0x0:0xf147b298ffaf6ce0"],"When":"2023-12-29"}]

title: URBAN Teatro
address: C. de Emilio Ferrari, 33, Cdad. Lineal, 28017 Madrid
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Carlos “K2” Hernández","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUHoZmTR0rTE82TqAiBJluKWTE3F_TBlI80pU6dnryk-87xP1mi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Una obra muy bonita y hay que estar muy atentos para no perder el hilo. Muy aconsejable y solo para adultos por la compresión.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"M M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIunr99oS45Rf6uGT-rBSgvUiGyDKQSyqUE-yXhY3Luc8eJmoD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Fui a ver Romeo el pasado domingo. Me ha impresionado como tres actrices pueden llenar un escenario prácticamente vacío de múltiples personajes y lugares. Lo que al principio me resultó "extraño" .. en poco tiempo me capturó. No notaba las transiciones y me vi "cosida" a sus interpretaciones.. mujeres que hacen papeles de hombres y de mujeres. Sin género. Todos emotivos. Me encantaron las "dos voces de Julieta".
Es una obra muy curiosa. Rara para lo que veo habitualmente...pero me ha impresionado. Las actrices...estupendas (las tres) y el teatro está bastante bien. Pequeño pero agradable.  Merece la pena.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Javier Caravaca Torres","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWbXNAgkYJSV5HTiP3qDiyuPio43O5nJt5oh2Ej__yvM4xjwboAFA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un espacio único y absolutamente acogedor. Las clases y los ensayos en Urban Teatro son fantásticas, son otro nivel, muy dinámicas, entretenidas y divertidas. Adolfo, el director y unos de los profesores, te contagia su pasión por el teatro y aumentan tus ganas de vivirlo, de vivir la experiencia. Lo recomiendo totalmente.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Judith Romero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXD5Y18PyCDu0kgD8pKnQHcOwY64yU8m5XaXr5RsJh6e9c8Pp70AA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Iba a asistir a la obra de “incendios” el 26 de Septiembre a la sesión de las 19:00, con mis dos entradas compradas y cuando llegó a la puerta a las 19:03 me encuentro la puerta cerrada. Hasta ahí bien, dado que es culpa mía el llegar tarde, intente contactar con el teatro para ver si había posibilidad de entrar pero estaba el teléfono apagado por tanto me fui. Al día siguiente me devuelve la llamada un señor que de forma mal educada, al explicarle los motivos de la llamada, me empieza a injuriar por haber llegado tarde y discutiendo y debatiendo el que en ningún teatro dejan entrar más tarde de la hora. Acepto que no pude ver la obra pero no acepto las formas de este hombre con muy poca educación.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sergio Ángulo Rodríguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXEn7Nh_72itwfC1SDM5FMmbpmeQR_xzcavnjFtnLclOe2UsP9F=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Quizäs el exterioe no es un o no lo parece un Teatro al uso, siempre los hubo y los habrá con mayores lujos, más poderío y pomposidades varias.
Urban Teatro, tengo para mi, es divertido, marcado desde el minuto uno de buen rollo. Transmiten el verbo en presente de indicativo, como ha de hacerse en Teatro, seguro que os suena, comunicar, ¿si?
Salgo de la sala con sensaciones, he vibrado en ella, no me ha dejado indiferente, de aquello que te dices - bahh, una obra más -, no , ¡percepción equivocada!...hoy sí ha merecido la pena. " Fuga de cuerpos ", me lo he pasado bien, buenos actores,  con ellos he llorado y emocionado y reído, les estoy amuy agradecido. A sus luces, su sonido, sus maquillajes, sus cuatro muebles o montaje o se llame como quiera dios se llame; la organización, la separación por seguridad Covid, el apreciado público que me acompañaba.
Feliz como una perdiz.
Enhorabuena equipo Urban Teatro.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elisa M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL4qq27IuctEN-RF8SoptlQG1pbq80EGkQPK-NfPBvh3kKRQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Teatro estupendo. La obra que está en cartel actúalmente, los sábados está fenomenal. Divertida, amena, actrices en estado de gracia y con un clásico renovado. Muy recomendable. No os la perdáis.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mayte León","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV2YQxgpfwH-IxizasqAjb4DL2EQOgUoWb4OqtU_ibKU7VJceZovw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"ROMEO
Un espectáculo "redondo",  donde pude disfrutar de tres grandiosas actrices que me transportaron a los jardines de Verona, y participar de la dramática historia de amor de Romeo y Julieta.  Espléndido trabajo de Dirección y adaptación del texto.
!Felicidades a todos!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"José Rondón","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-bPfzYhONiVlcMLPVlzMpFQA0Rd-ASp9XQwDA3QkItVXGMHk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Hola buenos días.
Por favor, moderad el volumen de vuestra música.
Tened en cuenta que el local está en el interior de una comunidad y vuestro techo de asbesto o material parecido, claramente NO INSONORIZADO deja salir todo el volumen de la música, causando una contaminación acústica incompatible con el derecho al descanso.

Esta mañana a las 9.45 habéis puesto la música a tal volumen que me ha retumbado la ventana de la habitación, sin exagerar. Así, todos los días que estáis abiertos.","Images":null,"When":""}]
