user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Daniel Lobo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWP7EtNH8nWsJ_7-rcmcycS2S2SFrJbzMn-Q7X9OwsbXNcNwMlS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fun historic visit to the decommissioned Chamberí Metro station. Wonderful care has been taken to offer the opportunity to access the old station. The free visit is somewhat brief but insightful. The first part is guided by knowledgeable staff, which adds robust historic context. And it ends with some time to linger and photograph.

Lifetime iconic as it can be seen from the passing trains of Metro Line 1, it was fun to visit after so many years and enjoy how well preserved it is. Reservations are best to ensure timed access with one of the small tour groups. But folks without a ticket can also wait in an open queue at the street entrance. And if the group is not full they are invited to join the slot.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZnC13iSo3BOd_38wbjPSR&fid=0x0:0xc68f8606de845e2d"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Raluca Chirita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI520GJb2nosTLbyFObR6VpPrEVUChv4XKd7CDwcMIdrGFZkw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The station is in really great shape and is really interesting to see how metro stations looked in the beginning. The museum is free of charge and there is a free guide, but it is only in spanish. You cannot visit the station on your own and you have to wait for the tour guide. If you don't speak Spanish is quite boring to wait for the tour guide to speak. There is a qr code at the beginning with a brief information guide in English, but I feel like it did not contain everything that tour guide explained in person.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD44tZlXYHq7jGJf4sjj9Z4&fid=0x0:0xc68f8606de845e2d"],"When":"2025-11-29"},{"Name":"Rinor Zejna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvvIekDoiakC0lcbOFvJQGN4mjdoSd_J6yW7G_q8jDxJDZekMP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was one of the best places to visit in Madrid, especially that is free and with a guide that tells you the history of the Metro (you need to speak and understand Spanish tho). But it is an amazing experience to try, make sure to reserve the spot in advance as there are only a small number of groups that can enter, although you may enter without a reservation but it is risky and the waiting time can be a lot.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDQb2_vTQ-T1qoP2HUrxwr9&fid=0x0:0xc68f8606de845e2d"],"When":"2025-11-6"},{"Name":"TravelingDave","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPCrljDYhlOATfCbyYZ9A7VQbXiacTlndePDddXXJdRhME57CL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Old station preserved. Highly recommend a visit. Only complaint is I wish it was opened more days.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD2cQnA3b5ms8af-bEwihpt&fid=0x0:0xc68f8606de845e2d"],"When":"2026-2-20"},{"Name":"Ruben Perfetto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2uggQ_5xKUD5-hkwA03izN3qimvpvvIWnQlkHkl1U6fgnf4Kcxg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent guide tour, full of history and incredible work for the 1900th.
Free admission, last week of the month you can reserve your spot, what it is highly recommended. They reserved 25 spot and tree for walk ins.
Tour run from 4:00pm every 1/2 and hour.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKnSrJLHyLSo7wE&fid=0x0:0xc68f8606de845e2d"],"When":"2025-5-24"},{"Name":"Ivo Driesser","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIciPniOzcbLK9IFEiJhdmfNrwnHpZemYdTRmQ68X9Aq62_JQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice opportunity to travel in time.
It’s a pity that there wasn’t an English tour. Nevertheless they offer information in PDF format in English.

[{"Name":"Jai Arr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6oGFmfWzsps2Ux3EaJ9qeSYQGJp6-IDoJdjmuF679ew0iuukA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As an Pinoy I had to check it out. It’s a great monument for Dr Rizal.  Commemorating the diplomatic relations between the Spanish Kingdom and the Republic of the Philippines.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCg0pHJlQE&fid=0x0:0xc5da4a1a6d075063"],"When":"2025-2-15"},{"Name":"Bon Salinas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjViqqrKvJioc0TQjAxptdC16_YoIS5bL7tUuTDNTs7DuGFRKzhUIg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"**A Monument of Reconciliation: Spain Honors José Rizal in Madrid**

In a powerful gesture of reconciliation and historical reflection, the Spanish government has unveiled a monument dedicated to José Protasio Rizal, the Philippines' national hero, in the heart of Madrid. This act of recognition comes over a century after Rizal's execution by Spanish colonial authorities in 1896, a moment that marked a turning point in the Philippines' struggle for independence.

The monument, a striking bronze sculpture of Rizal, stands tall in a prominent Madrid plaza, symbolizing a bridge between two nations with a shared, albeit complex, history. Rizal, a polymath, writer, and revolutionary, advocated for reform and peaceful resistance against colonial oppression. His writings, particularly *Noli Me Tangere* and *El Filibusterismo*, exposed the injustices of Spanish rule and inspired a movement for freedom.

The Spanish government's decision to honor Rizal reflects a commitment to acknowledging the past while fostering a spirit of mutual respect and understanding. Spanish officials emphasized that the monument is not just a tribute to Rizal's legacy but also a recognition of the enduring ties between Spain and the Philippines. "This monument is a symbol of our shared history and a step toward healing," said a spokesperson during the unveiling ceremony.

For Filipinos, the monument is a poignant reminder of Rizal's enduring influence and a testament to the power of forgiveness and progress. It also serves as a reminder that history, though often painful, can be a foundation for building stronger, more respectful relationships.

As the sun sets over Madrid, the monument to José Rizal stands as a beacon of hope, reminding us that even the most divided histories can find common ground in the pursuit of truth and reconciliation.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDAlNj81QE&fid=0x0:0xc5da4a1a6d075063"],"When":"2025-2-9"},{"Name":"Chelsea Janes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVi5RYgdJVjosZ1bfo8yRHkVR5BmsCP-H6gForcoflp1a0oA-8B=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very interesting to see Rizal in Spain, especially since it was the Spanish colonists who murdered him. Obviously, though, there is no mention of that anywhere on the monument... ugh. Still, glad this Filipino hero is finally being recognized by the Spanish, even if it was nearly 100 years after they assassinated him...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICfp_jazwE&fid=0x0:0xc5da4a1a6d075063"],"When":"2025-1-2"},{"Name":"Mocmoc P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUzTfPVUkeKNOWiuxPr3HITdaAOuQcK7LhUSFGEwliKKM8XWGfG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was a sunny Sunday afternoon in September 2023 when I finally visited the Jose Rizal Monument in Madrid. I had been wanting to see it for a long time, as I am a Filipino and Jose Rizal is our national hero. I highly admire him for his courage, his intellect, and his commitment to fighting for freedom and justice.

The monument is located in the Parque de Santander, a small park in the Chamberí district of Madrid. It is a replica of the Rizal Monument in Manila.

I left the monument feeling inspired and uplifted. I knew that I would never forget my visit to this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZzrTSZQ&fid=0x0:0xc5da4a1a6d075063"],"When":"2023-9-10"},{"Name":"Tristan Dwyte","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNU-MmGLiN_irpQ8N6sJKS4R7F3MdDG2ibBmdnaiG0IEIZzdY0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is a must-see for every Filipino who visits Madrid. It’s are reminder how our National Hero and his legacy for independence have come a long way from the bitter events of history.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Londoner R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXi_4XSDCHP3WzP-Y1dw4U6wOZ78VcsWT9ebtFENvxONLFho0C0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"National hero of the Philippines. He sacrificed a lot, even his life, to better the lives of his countrymen.
This monument is open to the public 24 hours a day. It is a replica of the monument in Luneta Park in Manila.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDhpuOYDA&fid=0x0:0xc5da4a1a6d075063"],"When":"2023-3-7"},{"Name":"alexander valera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-nzGxVAVwlxNwSNOT_l-7YiLO-H30yjuaGYuC6cxJsV0Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The place is properly maintained even though he was a foreign dignitaries , the place also is in a great location.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEMvzuo3Dm5rnWg&fid=0x0:0xc5da4a1a6d075063"],"When":"2025-6-5"},{"Name":"Jonas Paolo Corpuz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuysJsvIT0DW9ifKZXv_YK_83dknaFp680GAZc6V0bkkAIsf0e=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A must visit for every Filipino. Highly recommend to visit other places where Dr. Jose Rizal has been like Ateneo De Madrid and the publication building/office of La Solidaridad.","Images":null,"When":""}]

The monument is located in the middle of a small pond and is quite tall and overall located on the north east part of the El Retiro park.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICnhsKfhQE&fid=0x0:0xa38c1fc3e6fe2f94"],"When":"2024-9-25"},{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This statue stands in tribute to Arsenio Martínez-Campos y Antón, a Spanish officer who distinguished himself in various wars of the late Spanish Empire as well as the part he played in the restoration of the Bourbon dynasty.

The statute is located Parque Retiro, amongst the many fine statues, fountains and monuments inside the park. The equestrian statue of Martinez Campo shows him on horseback, wearing his military uniform. The bronze statue sits atop a stone pedestal, on which is inscribed with the date and named of the wars in which he distinguished himself.

title: Monumento a Emilio Castelar
address: P.º de la Castellana, 39, Salamanca, 28046 Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["Open 24 hours"],"Monday":["Open 24 hours"],"Saturday":["Open 24 hours"],"Sunday":["Open 24 hours"],"Thursday":["Open 24 hours"],"Tuesday":["Open 24 hours"],"Wednesday":["Open 24 hours"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This monument stands in tribute to Emilio Castelar, a Spanish politician, and president of the First Spanish Republic. Not only was he a national leader, he was a noted writer and journalist and left a legacy in print of political science such as a history of the Republican Movement in Europe amongst other works.

The monument features a stone base with figures on all four sides. On the main side, facing southwards, is the bronze figure of Emilio Castelar, and at his feet lies a marble Venus, an allegory to the truth. Flanking him on either side are two classical public speakers, Cicero and Demosthenes who observe and listening to Castelar.

Like many great monuments in Madrid, this sits in the middle of a roundabout in a very busy road. I didn't even try to get closer. The monument is really out of the way of the main tourist areas. While it's definitely worth a look, only do so if you have a bit of time in Madrid","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE1Iabaw&fid=0x0:0x234303e313ffeb9d"],"When":"2019-4-22"},{"Name":"Kelloggs Frosties","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9AE8vHKv8U3ElHYJOz7qZMynWG1jbYGPapp07kCS_RDg75Ys=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Located in the middle of a roundabout on the Paseo de la Castellana, this monument is dedicated to the historian, journalist, academic, public speaker and politician from Cadiz, Emilio Castelar Ripoll.

It is a complex work by Mariano Benlliure. It is a stone base that allows figures to be placed on each of its sides. On the main side, facing southwards, we can find the bronze figure of Emilio Castelar, and at his feet lies a marble Venus, an allegory to the truth, towards which the bronze figures of a worker, a soldier and a student rise, representing Work, Effort and Study. On the opposite side, there are two classical public speakers: Cicero and Demosthenes who observe and listen to Castelar. Finally, at the rear, there is a bronze relief dedicated to Castelar’s speeches in favour of the abolition of slavery in the former Spanish colonies.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Francisco Arteaga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXNEsluXXj7svw9Md2msUadIeb26Fz6d4eNqB3ac_6CM9FnE81BOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A must see. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ferhat Yildiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWV6W2gfwUqAFIDgffx1HATO6JsIPotrLYKf7X6lAbflWpp-7tw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A charming tribute to one of Spain’s literary greats! The Statue of Jacinto Benavente, located in the peaceful Parque del Retiro in Madrid, is a simple yet elegant monument that beautifully honors the Nobel Prize-winning playwright.

The statue blends seamlessly into the park’s serene atmosphere, making it a lovely spot to pause, reflect, and appreciate Spanish culture.

Whether you’re a fan of literature or just strolling through Retiro, this statue is worth a quick visit for its historical significance and picturesque surroundings.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCom53nWQ&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2025-4-20"},{"Name":"Manuel Urquidi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVb3NqeqLMbUnMDHCCGqfKIrXOgRZeGLl7N3nZOPBiM7Lx4le2p=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This statue of the 1922 Nobel Prize in Literature winner, Jacinto Benavente, was funded through a public appeal that raised over one million pesetas. The statue, created by sculptor Victorio Macho, aims to immortalize the soul of the artist, as mentioned by Macho himself. It was inaugurated in April 1962. The area is also home to some oddly shaped trees like yew trees and horse chestnuts.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID_0_SrGQ&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2025-1-26"},{"Name":"Jim De Mauro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYTq70wrnbeJxNH8_FvCSQjFCURTl0uZJE-ekM3hY8Wvk5v9dy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"One of the most exotic trees we have been able to find was near this statue.  The shapes are exotic and intriguing.  We were not able to determine if they grew this way or they were pruned to look so unreal.  We spent a half an hour just sitting and taking photographs.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE0r-Kaw&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2017-12-31"},{"Name":"david howells","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXv00dm90sqOsiG9tuO5orrJOqUEDS-SlSH6CFfk8dmCBLrELi0Jw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice area of Retiró park, very pretty with some lovely quirky trees and a cool monument.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChsorPDA&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2023-2-9"},{"Name":"Geovanny","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpba9fybFOGKARgiQWJJKLXixzY6BzcQ8Id_v0GFsgkaMSRfk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jacinto Benavente, a highly influential Spanish playwright born in Madrid in 1866 and who died there in 1954, significantly revitalized Spanish theater with his realistic comedies and social satires, earning him the Nobel Prize in Literature in 1922; his prolific output of plays, which explored the moral complexities of Spanish society, cemented his legacy as a key figure in 20th-century Spanish drama","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIzOWHWA&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2025-4-7"},{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This monument stands in tribute to Jacinto Benavente, considered to be the foremost Spanish writer of the 20th century and was awarded the Nobel Prize for Literature in 1922.

The monument features a bronze classical sculpture featuring a woman (presumably an actress), hold a theatre mask as if about to place it onto her face. The sculpture stands atop a plinth, which a rectangular stone block bearing the name of Jacinto Benavente and a bronze relief sculpture of the writer.

A beautiful classical statue and all the more so for it's easy to understand reference to a Nobel winning writer.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICc_L-c-gE&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2020-2-17"},{"Name":"A V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZBqTmmYT3Q0x4e4TLC7rAKSnv94GL00nBaa9xzXt_6PhbxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very well maintained and gorgeous area surrounding statue to famous Spanish dramatist.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID44KroBg&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2017-11-10"},{"Name":"Miguel P.C.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPDy8QrAcFWEOFTkH4s_QD0aosAntu-Z4gpRrjANDg-25LaA6qXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful garden, well kept and nice to walk around.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICO_oKtngE&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2022-6-11"}]

While not atypical, the statue is slightly unusual for having the general sitting on a prancing horse. The monument is a bit out of the way and not that close to the tourist circuit in Madrid. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Doncelador","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnewNEbYYaXdHD0epgVByIWzW2jKqBZMPTzU18-HYzM_sBuOGCqw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Es una donación de la Asociación de  descendientes del Exilio Español, obra del escultor Julián Martínez en 1.983, representa a Lázaro Cárdenas de cuerpo entero y vestido de traje de chaqueta y con sus brazos cruzados. Está sobre un pedestal en el cual podemos leer su nombre y ubicada en una plazoleta por la que se accede por cuatro escalinatas.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICqwvr1tgE&fid=0x0:0x888abd6f8b72f544"],"When":"2021-5-31"},{"Name":"Marcos Cabrera García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWyOBiJvQHy8TN38eB5aq8FnksAylW07cNTllWUTeQp5Q6m66Sb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"La estatua de Lázaro Cárdenas es un monumento conmemorativo ubicado en Madrid. Erigida en el Parque Norte, sirve como homenaje al presidente mexicano Lázaro Cárdenas, destacado por acoger a miles de exiliados republicanos españoles llegados a México escapando de la Guerra Civil española y la posterior dictadura franquista.

La aprobación de un homenaje en Madrid a Lázaro Cárdenas, el presidente mexicano que acogió a aproximadamente 30 000 exiliados republicanos españoles que huyeron de la Guerra Civil española y la posterior dictadura franquista, fue una de las primeras decisiones tomadas por la corporación democrática resultante de las elecciones municipales de 1979 Madrid, aprobada en la primera sesión plenaria del Ayuntamiento de Madrid. Los costes de la estructura fueron financiados por el consistorio,[1] mientras la estatua fue financiada mediante suscripción popular entre el colectivo republicano español en México. Aunque la pretensión inicial era simplemente erigir un busto, recabaron tanto dinero que se pudo encargar una estatua de tamaño completo.

El diseño del proyecto fue adjudicado al escultor mexicano Julián Martínez, un exiliado español que llegó a México de joven. Con una altura de 3,5 metros, la estatua de cuerpo completo resultó demasiado grande para su ubicación tentativa en la plaza del Presidente Cárdenas (dedicada en honor de Cárdenas en 1982), por lo que el Ayuntamiento acabó decantándose por una nueva ubicación en el Parque Norte. Fundida en bronce en México, los costes de cara al transporte del monumento a Madrid fueron también financiados por el colectivo republicano español en México. Joaquín Roldán y Santiago Cubero desempeñaron un papel en la erección del monumento como arquitectos.

El monumento fue inaugurado el 16 de noviembre de 1983 durante una ceremonia a la que asistieron Enrique Tierno Galván (alcalde de Madrid), Ramón Aguirre Velázquez (jefe de departamento de México DF), Amalia Solórzano (viuda de Cárdenas), Cuauhtémoc Cárdenas (hijo de Cárdenas), Enrique Barón, Joaquín Leguina y José Federico de Carvajal, entre otros.

Las dos placas que se añadieron inicialmente rezaban «el pueblo de madrid / a lázaro cárdenas / presidente de méxico (de 1934 a 1940)» y «el exilio republicano / español / con honda gratitud / y reconocimiento / a lázaro cárdenas / presidente de méxico».

En octubre de 2005, a raíz de una iniciativa de la Asociación de Descendientes del Exilio Español, se añadió una nueva placa que rezaba «padre de los españoles sin patria y sin derechos, perseguidos por la tiranía y desheredados por el odio», un fragmento de una cita dedicada a Cárdenas por parte de Álvaro de Albornoz en la época en la que este llegó a México como exiliado.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDRx-XK2AE&fid=0x0:0x888abd6f8b72f544"],"When":"2023-5-5"},{"Name":"ANTONIO JESÚS MARTIN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKub6pNKeczKmOp0H0-jV6Losp_GxbKHrk-bLGNbe_wHDuI52wrw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Es una de las esculturas que más me ha gustado de este parque, y está ubicada en la zona más alta del mismo.

Representa a Lázaro Cárdenas del Río, que fue presidente de México entre los años 1934 y 1940. Este presidente acogió desde el año 1937 a diversos grupos de exiliados españoles, siendo los primeros un grupo de 500 niños denominados "los niños de Morelia", en alusión a la ciudad de México que los acogió.

Este monumento tiene su origen en una donación de la Asociación de Descendientes del Exilio Español, en agradecimiento a la cálida acogida que recibieron los exiliados españoles del pueblo mexicano.

Por último, comentar que el autor de esta escultura es Julián Martínez, quien fue uno de los niños exiliados españoles, y se inauguró en el año 1983.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Raúl Peñalver","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK20oIYuFwpwExn31O8Sz2BRCewwVlPbnB3ko3xbUJ_UHEVLQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Por ahí anda paseando la soberanía popular de España aún hoy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matteo Allegri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXbUaK-QYAR-ngKNRctF8GsNrx2fntAqNxYB3WYWq3Rrq1tcwAAw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Grande estatua que se encuentra en el punto más alto del parque","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Norlan Orozco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYcALmck_BYFTDzIO3qfFF3gCj4GEiXcQE5dWE6KMI1EBwE_sO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pi Dalpe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIiuRQ6Ru5HAjK-9HIgbd6TBwavZ6rz8K1fYwcIXkyvMAe-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Silent","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMfd87lI2A2TJw5KirO1a-PCbTs-BBDwVaJXfk-t14WNzFJig=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]

Está ubicada en el acceso al parque desde el aparcamiento principal y es una de las piezas (concretamente la nº 18) que integra la llamada Senda de las Esculturas.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJwOvadg\u0026fid=0x0:0xfc996347687c236e"],"When":"2023-6-18"},{"Name":"Fernando Vicente Perez Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6wGdM99zZLynhF8i2zFY---iX3UA_Bk_aEGSGhuxaRdZiE4w3zg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Una escultura dedicada a la Paz, a la conferencia de Paz entre Israelis y Palestinos de Madrid en 1992, es triste escribir esta reseña en un momento que el conflicto entre Israelis y árabes esta en un punto álgido, haciendo de esta conferencia y este escultura un sueño roto.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Doncelador","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnewNEbYYaXdHD0epgVByIWzW2jKqBZMPTzU18-HYzM_sBuOGCqw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"El conjunto escultórico data de noviembre de 1.992 siendo obra de Yolanda D'Ausburg, se creó para conmemorar la conferencia de paz entre palestinos e israelíes celebrada en Madrid un año antes. Está formado por tres elementos, el cuerpo más grande de acero llamado Las Raíces de España, otros dos elementos de acero inoxidable llamados Los Lazos y por último una columna de acero llamada La Raíz de la Paz. Todo el conjunto descansa sobre un gran bloque de hormigón en cual una placa de bronce nos cuenta la historia del monumento. Se patrocinó por el Corte Inglés.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Meeth56","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXP6S8BKpPOY2pIU4eiz0sTCVOBYiUbDy6hpje2Np5U7BqfROXWtg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Enorme parque - en general con buen mantenimiento. Velázquez is seated holding a paintbrush and palette. The monument was inaugurated at the end of the 19th century and is a not so subtle indication of the building it stands before - art inviting one to enter to see more art.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICj55f8-wE&fid=0x0:0xefe8c386d9255a3b"],"When":"2024-4-26"},{"Name":"BradinHK","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWh6zDfP2gQdpxFs5vZrrUNYezD0Dpnk56YFX0OBmXdNJCxRY4DFg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"One of the interesting things to see before or after visiting Prado is the statue of Spanish Old Master, Diego de Velázquez situated in front of the museum, facing Paseo del Prado.

Here you will see a bronze statue sculpted by Aniceto Marinas in 1899. The statue is of Velázquez dressed in courtly attire and seated. He is posing with a palette in his left hand, resting upon his leg and with a brush in his right hand. Not an unexpected depiction of Velázquez given his role as the lead artist in the Spanish Royal Court during the early 17th century.

This is a nice statue to see, particularly if you are fan of Diego de Velázquez. It is conveniently located and easy to stop by to see before or after your visit to Prado.

Note: If you enjoy statues like these, there is also a nice monument to Francisco Goya situated just outside the north entrance to the museum. This monument is also worth finding as part of your Prado visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDE3LzFyAE&fid=0x0:0xefe8c386d9255a3b"],"When":"2018-9-4"},{"Name":"M L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI05vNbPAnc0aUyyeFtCkXzdPULPhOhSOgFuwwtNzpM7LGXVg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This monument located at the front of Prado museum is a tribute to Spanish artist Diego

[{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This monument stands in tribute to Blas de Lezo y Olavarrieta, a Spanish Naval Admiral. He is best known in Spain for the Battle of Cartagena de Indias in modern day Columbia, where Spanish forces under his command defeated a the British fleet under Admiral Edward Vernon. Such is his legacy that several Spanish and Columbian warships have been named after him, the latest being the a Spanish frigate "Blas de Lezo"

The statue depicts Don Blas de Lezo as a middle aged man in dress uniform standing over ropes in reference to his naval career. In place of his left leg is a wooden leg in reference to his many injuries including the amputation and as a reminder of his nickname, Captain Pegleg. Not a must see, but it is in Plaza de Colon and next to the Monument to the Discovery of America.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE1JqehQE&fid=0x0:0x4d2d5a0254182efd"],"When":"2019-4-22"},{"Name":"Andrew Long","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVnkf_iIbTm2PF-dbMrniOgT0l_U_D9szDSuX1QTb0SfVpriGMM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Massive Spanish flag blowing in the wind. Set in a pleasant open space surrounded by water.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"angel ruiz de pablo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyH2gRwrhwgfdJaKNan_OpAsSYLvgFMnEh-vnb0KCHODFSO90=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kyle OLeary","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIaTrK0JmGvueDLuQr1F1nZ0Lcr2f3huxNuO-YZQo8OUWy6WMjP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice place to walk around","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Evgeny Lesovskiy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbaby2bBUZNFuwcEJJw3vNWssGEFj-Qc8tCNIKug6b0Eim9wk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Памятник адмиралу флота Испании Бласу де Лесо-и-Олаварриете.
Памятник расположен в садах, прилегающих к площади Колумба (Plaza de Colón) в Мадриде.
Блас де Лесо (1687–1741) был одним из самых выдающихся моряков в истории военно-морского флота Испании.
Он потерял левую ногу, глаз и правую руку в различных сражениях на протяжении своей военной карьеры, за что получил прозвище «Медиохомбре» (Полчеловека).
Надпись на постаменте гласит, что он был «героем Испании вчерашнего, сегодняшнего и завтрашнего дня».","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD2Jlz7uWuIxKjTnsWY7gtm&fid=0x0:0x4d2d5a0254182efd"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Francisco Lucena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXAnbPEgO38IAgd5mIrYHf4QXKfnMypv1751f6z9U8cL9E_HQHDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Monumento a Blas de Otero y olavarrieta(1689 1741)fue teniente general de la armada española por don Felipe 6 el 15 de noviembre de 2014,realizada en bronce pesa 35.000 kilogramos y está situada en un pedestal de granito y realizada por qintana de la serna.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA5dy42VW8-Pj0MjlH09OM6&fid=0x0:0x4d2d5a0254182efd"],"When":"2025-8-16"},{"Name":"Jörge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXeWEXqdr5t3OlbRokb_Dhsg38mDGwuZo9JWUkx-spF0MuHs0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Monumento realizado en el año 2014 por el escultor Salvador Amaya en honor a Blas de Lezo y Olavarrieta, oficial de la Marina Española que participó en la Guerra de Sucesión española, los conflictos hispano-otomanos y la Guerra del Asiento, especialmente conocido por la defensa de Cartagena de Indias en el año 1741. La estatua, realizada en bronce, representa al personaje sobre un pedestal de granito","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDpTl9yDDR5TC5OkbCogaWm&fid=0x0:0x4d2d5a0254182efd"],"When":"2026-1-6"}]

title: Monument to Federico Rubio
address: Av. de Séneca, 118, Moncloa - Aravaca, 28008 Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["Open 24 hours"],"Monday":["Open 24 hours"],"Saturday":["Open 24 hours"],"Sunday":["Open 24 hours"],"Thursday":["Open 24 hours"],"Tuesday":["Open 24 hours"],"Wednesday":["Open 24 hours"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This monument stands in tribute to Federico Rubio y Gali, a Spanish doctor and politician. His legacy was the creation of many free hospitals for the poor and medical teaching schools. His outstanding career as a surgeon was embodied in the creation of the "Free School of Medicine and Surgery of Seville", the "Institute of Operative Technique at the Hospital de la Princesa de Madrid". The "Rubio Institute", the "School of Nurses of St. Elizabeth of Hungary" among other outstanding academic institutes.

This monument is made of ivory limestone and shows the figure of the distinguished doctor sitting in a chair. On the right of Rubio, is another sculpture of bronze, of a young woman presenting her children to him. The whole set in itself impresses fragility, subtlety, grace and refinement despite the different consistencies of the materials used to achieve it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICM2pPNIQ&fid=0x0:0x28fb1ca935eb4ff1"],"When":"2019-8-12"},{"Name":"Marcos Cabrera García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWyOBiJvQHy8TN38eB5aq8FnksAylW07cNTllWUTeQp5Q6m66Sb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Se inauguró en 1906, se realizó en piedra caliza Murcia el grueso de la escultura y una parte en bronce que representa a una mujer presentando sus hijos al médico por el escultor Miguel Blay. Quedó muy dañado despus de la Guerra Civil, posteriormente fué restaurado.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICRsOO5PQ&fid=0x0:0x28fb1ca935eb4ff1"],"When":"2023-3-23"},{"Name":"Agustín Gordillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvM6sDG8qgYHlSBFaBAJ5u8Voh_-CP3J9Qz27-eVH4OhDIRrma=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Monumento Federico Rubio Y Galí (1872-1902)

Eminente médico que no solo pasó a la historia por sus hallazgos médicos, sino también por su intensa participación en la política y en la literatura. Fundó la primera Escuela Profesional de Enfermería en España, en 1896, y fue elegido miembro del prestigioso Real Colegio de Cirugía de Londres y de la Real Academia de Medicina Española.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID7m7v2pgE&fid=0x0:0x28fb1ca935eb4ff1"],"When":"2024-8-28"},{"Name":"Germán Pulvett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8ZcKYThU18A7REiYDsdEtDwbqb0fi0y3qDIyf_-N1y6UGEdl0-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un bonito monumento en honor a este ilustre médico y diplomático español. Esta bien conservado, es de fácil acceso. Aunque las ramas de los árboles están comenzando a cubrir parte del monumento. Está ubicado en el centro de esta parte del parque.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDjxLe-eg&fid=0x0:0x28fb1ca935eb4ff1"],"When":"2024-4-29"},{"Name":"Doncelador","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnewNEbYYaXdHD0epgVByIWzW2jKqBZMPTzU18-HYzM_sBuOGCqw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Se inauguró en 1906, se realizó en piedra caliza Murcia el grueso de la escultura y una parte en bronce que representa a una mujer presentando sus hijos al médico por el escultor Miguel Blay. Quedó muy dañado despus de la Guerra Civil, posteriormente fué restaurado.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICkta_HBQ&fid=0x0:0x28fb1ca935eb4ff1"],"When":"2018-9-17"},{"Name":"José Julio Melgares","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPlI3_WxZ-JbiFDSG6A1n_aKR_BFRpvuYb0hLgejNuccGQun5Z=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Conjunto escultórico obra del escultor gerundense Miguel Blay Fábregas. Inaugurada en 1906. Durante la Guerra Civil Española sufrió grandes daños, ya que el Parque del Oeste fue frente de batalla a lo largo de todo el conflicto. Ahora el monumento está restaurado.
Federico Rubio y Galí (1827-1902) fue un destacado médico y político nacido en el Puerto de Santa María. Como médico alcanzó gran popularidad en Sevilla entre las clases más desfavorecidas. Como político llegó a diputado y senador.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE88OmiQE&fid=0x0:0x28fb1ca935eb4ff1"],"When":"2017-12-23"},{"Name":"Pablo Hernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLj4FTgZkLsbNgqRitG2OQgLgYMNLdrw9-LPXOgZbqs6ezKng=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ánimo a todos a conocer a Federico Rubio, un Grande con palabras mayores que dio enormes avances en cirugía médica y un gran político con ideas avanzadas de desarrollo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Fatares","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXFtES0b0_d227NaRy9Njsxyrww1C2OW-DyIdif-ri93rA6ZSR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Escultura que lleva más de cien años en el Parque del Oeste y en el mismo lugar ( se inauguró en 1906) . Es de un escultor catalán, Miquel Blay.
Lo más interesante, amén de la propia escultura, es su historia. En ningún sitio de Madrid cómo en el Parque del Oeste, para poder ver rastros de la Guerra Civil. Así, tenemos a unos  200 metros  de aquí, los bunquers o nidos de ametralladoras  y en la propia escultura del Dr. Federico Rubio se observa la huella ,agujereada, de centenares de disparos . El frente que separaba ambos bandos estuvo aquí ( Parque del Oeste-Ciudad Universitaria-Hospital Cínico) durante toda la guerra. A la escultura del Dr. le volaron la cabeza de un cañonazo, así que el busto actual es totalmente reconstruido. Dejo fotos del monumento cuando se estrenó,  después  de cómo quedó en la Guerra y en la actualidad...","Images":null,"When":""}]

I can't say it wasn't well-presented, but really it's something you read about and then when you get there you are left thinking "...that's it?".","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDtucWs3wE&fid=0x0:0x4a65ed8a4f9e5e5b"],"When":"2024-2-5"},{"Name":"Colm Linehan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRY7gUCcWDEQqVH8ExgYcZZDrxnIJaduGMOiwqYfMFCsh-ryf9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful Plaza a short walk from Plaza Mayor.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB5SMb8O7wLiSSwVAZvAqQs&fid=0x0:0x4a65ed8a4f9e5e5b"],"When":"2025-9-29"},{"Name":"Shachar Pinkas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUVYVspz8gYvP4HGpvWBh3dx5xChbutZlN9phIsbbwU8-uisR8Hog=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A statue of a famous general who was trusted on the attempted invasion of England in the 16th century. Unfortunately for the empire, he died a few months before the invasion was supposed to happen, and the guy who replaced him was not that successful and even suffered from seasickness. Therefore,  the invasion failed, and some historians today say that if he had not died, he would have succeeds in conquering England, and the world would speak Spanish today, as the Spanish empire would have replaced the English one","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDBh8nYuwE&fid=0x0:0x4a65ed8a4f9e5e5b"],"When":"2023-1-30"},{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This statue stands in tribute to Álvaro de Bazán, the 1st Marquess of Santa Cruz de Mudela, a Spanish Naval Admiral. He is noted for his contribution to the expansion of the Spanish Empire and said to have never been defeated in battle. A remarkable feat considering his fifty year long naval career. At the Battle of Lepanto, his intervention prevented the Ottomans from turning the tide of the battle.

The bronze sculpture depicts the admiral dressed in half armour. He has a serious and energetic expression, looking slightly to the left. His left hand rests on the hilt of his sword, while the right is holding a general's baton. At the foot of the figure is a turkish helmet, a spear topped with crescent moon and a captured flag, alluding to the victory against the Ottomans.

Also worth noting the the tremendous attention the sculptor put into showing the details of the Bazan's uniform and clothing. Sadly, the monument is a bit out of the way from the main tourist sights, but not too from the Basilica of San Fernando El Grande","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE1I7O7QE&fid=0x0:0x4a65ed8a4f9e5e5b"],"When":"2019-4-22"},{"Name":"Nanita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1WkY_Ny7h3fesnK9Wwb_uCyiC1c3ef1NfxwC1shFMBfUpfcKT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Monumento a Don Alvaro de Bazán is located between major stops on the Madrid tourist map - the royal palace & cathedral and plaza mayor - making it very probable that you’ll pass by. While the sculpture itself is well done, it and that square where the monument resides commands a few minutes. If you’re lucky, you arrive during part of the day when there’s shade from one of the buildings.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDD24PAGQ&fid=0x0:0x4a65ed8a4f9e5e5b"],"When":"2024-4-14"}]

descriptions: Memorial obelisk honoring those slain during the May 2 rebellion against French troops in 1808.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This Monument to the Fallen for Spain, colloquially known as the 'Obelisk' is the Madrid equivalent to the tomb of the unknown soldier. Originally intended to honour those who died in the Mayo uprising during the French occupation, it was re-dedicated to all fallen soldier of Spain, except for the aforementioned uprising.

Like many such monuments, this also has an eternal flame. A worthy tribute to all of Spain's fallen.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE1IbjNw&fid=0x0:0xdcaa7153d2243b83"],"When":"2019-4-22"},{"Name":"david howells","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXv00dm90sqOsiG9tuO5orrJOqUEDS-SlSH6CFfk8dmCBLrELi0Jw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This memorial (Monumento a los Caídos por España), also known as the "Obelisco", commemorates the victims of the uprising on 2 May 1808 (Dos de Mayo) in Madrid against the French occupation. After the uprising, numerous Spaniards were executed here by the French.
It is also the national memorial for all Spaniards who have been killed in war. It is similar to the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier in the UK/US but I’m unsure if it contains such a tomb? English sources vary 🤷
It also has a permanent eternal gas flame. This might explain the lack of access by a high sided railing fence.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICh8rKCfg&fid=0x0:0xdcaa7153d2243b83"],"When":"2023-2-9"},{"Name":"Diego Caicedo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeT5xPIRir96hdnD_9IOq5jnKEpMQWtEqH7_ZC1x6B6XABBI5G=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Incredible zone. title: Monument to Christopher Columbus
address: Pl. de Colón, Centro, 28001 Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["Open 24 hours"],"Monday":["Open 24 hours"],"Saturday":["Open 24 hours"],"Sunday":["Open 24 hours"],"Thursday":["Open 24 hours"],"Tuesday":["Open 24 hours"],"Wednesday":["Open 24 hours"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mark M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUS9xWFdqeoIGM48SlGzqRbIUYckO5GoiKaVUECu7qOA5BWOej9UQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Monumento a Cristóbal Colón stands as a majestic sentinel in the heart of Madrid, anchoring the vibrant Plaza de Colón with its neogothic elegance. Designed by Arturo Mélida and sculpted by Jerónimo Suñol, this 17-meter-tall landmark is a masterpiece of late 19th-century artistry. The intricate white marble statue of Columbus, draped in a cloak and holding the flag of Castile, gazes eastward, evoking a sense of timeless adventure and maritime legacy.
What makes a visit truly special is the seamless blend of history and modern urban beauty. The monument is situated within the Jardines del Descubrimiento, where the roar of the massive cascading fountain provides a soothing soundtrack to the city’s bustle. Standing at its base, you can appreciate the intricate carvings on the pedestal that detail the famous voyages.
The surrounding area is a cultural treasure trove; the square also hosts the world’s largest Spanish flag and the fascinating "Julia" sculpture by Jaume Plensa. Whether you are a history enthusiast or simply looking for a picturesque spot to relax between visits to the nearby National Archaeological Museum and the upscale shops of Serrano, the Columbus Monument is an essential, uplifting stop on any Madrid itinerary.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCp8sd7f9KzUU38ZsT7oiCW&fid=0x0:0x33d1b8829355e4a"],"When":"2025-12-23"},{"Name":"snarkyguy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpLEkMbqQ117vEXR5NomvRhhZgkwVvVtKfHyjAnrI4JKwbnhs2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Super detailed monument in a cool part of town. It sits opposite the Bronze statue of a Fat Lady by Fernando Botero and is really cool to view at sundown. Every angle of this square looks good and is well-displayed. The monument itself is on a tall dais with outstretched arms near Centro Colon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICdjtqvMg&fid=0x0:0x33d1b8829355e4a"],"When":"2024-2-15"},{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This monument stands in tribute to Christopher Columbus, the explorer who discovered the Americas for Spain. The monument consists of a statue of columbus atop a 17m high plinth which is built in the Gothic style. It's located in the centre of a roundabout in a very busy road and because it's so high up and so far from the pedestrian pavement, it's pretty difficult to get a good view of it.

One good thing about it's location is that the Torre Colon provides an interesting backdrop if taking photos from Plaza Colon. It's good to see the statue for it's historical value, but thumbs down for the difficulty in getting good views of the monument.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE1IaT5AE&fid=0x0:0x33d1b8829355e4a"],"When":"2019-4-22"},{"Name":"George Messinia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLCxA8R_mO15QqKHTo8jPP0_YjV-KgANNdlMxoMmbA5sKi-qQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Columbus Square was originally called 'Plaza de Santiago', but was renamed in 1893 in honor of the famous explorer who discovered America. The square is dominated by the statue of Columbus, Monumento a Cristóbal Colón, standing on a tall column, looking in the direction of the new world. The square is also home to the Jardines del Descubrimiento, a park first opened in 1970 where you can admire various sculptures as well as a monument dedicated to the discovery of America. Just in front of Columbus Square is the National Archaeological Museum of Spain and the National Library.
On the north side of the square are the twin skyscrapers Torres de Colón which are two 117m high office skyscrapers with 23 floors. They were built between 1967 and 1976 by architect Antonio Lamela. Today the towers are being renovated.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJudW1Ng&fid=0x0:0x33d1b8829355e4a"],"When":"2023-6-30"},{"Name":"Seokjin Ham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIhtf6A7X2UDP--Xi1vhwXxfhLJk0GUh_pTYJvgqrBOTATbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It is a neo-Gothic monument built between 1881 and 1885. Not only the statue, but also the base and pillars are elaborately decorated.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDL7sjfcg&fid=0x0:0x33d1b8829355e4a"],"When":"2024-6-27"},{"Name":"Anitha Shree","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWmSJgqpLoJyhJzzKLLH65ZR1ErvZRP6Iq1iAyjFjX_V2_mKvxt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It is a nice monument along side the walk. It is outdoors","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"TRAVELLING {, TO BE PRECISE}","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2XI7Bceq8YlhpLEOAM8c5APSRc5srNS-yjYkvFw85ZLpZqzcqXw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Monument to Christopher Columbus, in the midst of the Plaza de Colón traffic. Looks nice with the Torres de Colón as a backdrop. The large adjoining square is the Jardines del Descubrimiento (Gardens of Discovery), also honouring the explorer. At the Calle de Serrano side of the square is a beautiful monumental sculpture by Joaquín Vaquero Turcios, "Monumento al Descubrimiento de América"","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC4v6T7HQ&fid=0x0:0x33d1b8829355e4a"],"When":"2016-12-14"},{"Name":"Tom","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKPb4EhTcqNz52s5UvaH3KfCt2wg_M3Qxc3x1RyEBRzwWSoIA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful statue next to the famous towers","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDgpJOF9wE&fid=0x0:0x33d1b8829355e4a"],"When":"2025-2-22"}]

title: Monumento al Marqués del Duero
address: P.º de la Castellana, 70, Chamberí, 28046 Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["Open 24 hours"],"Monday":["Open 24 hours"],"Saturday":["Open 24 hours"],"Sunday":["Open 24 hours"],"Thursday":["Open 24 hours"],"Tuesday":["Open 24 hours"],"Wednesday":["Open 24 hours"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This statue stands in tribute to Manuel Gutiérrez, the Marquess del Duero and a Spanish general during the Carlist War of succession to the Spanish throne. His is honoured for his victories that eventually lead to the defeat of the rebellion and restoration of the Bourbons to the Spanish throne.

This monument is an equestrian statue and depicts Marquess del Duero on horseback (obviously). That's about all I can say about it since the statue sits in the middle of a busy roundabout and I just didn't feel like getting run over for a better view, especially for someone who is likely unknown outside of Spain. Nothing wrong with the statue, but I wouldn't go out of the way.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE1Ib-rQE&fid=0x0:0x34b59cbdb431c889"],"When":"2019-4-22"},{"Name":"Cristian Carrero Roca","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjruhZF37hpNlAGlHA2lb53Nh4Ou54GL3vwMRClIc0F5LEdFk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un monumento elegante y con mucho encanto, perfecto para descubrirlo paseando sin prisas. La estatua y el conjunto transmiten un aire clásico y solemne, con buenos detalles que se aprecian al acercarse. Me gustó especialmente cómo encaja en el entorno: es de esos puntos que dan carácter al lugar y que, aunque no seas un apasionado de la historia, te invitan a parar, mirar y hacer una foto.

Es una visita rápida pero agradable, ideal para completar una ruta por la zona y sumar un toque histórico al paseo. Si vas con buena luz, se disfruta aún más, porque la composición y el entorno hacen que el monumento luzca mucho.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Julio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIWBBpBXlKk7PFYHuZWo-TDvrSDTT2o-LEU5Z_BZdCLGammIA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El Monumento al Marqués del Duero en Madrid es una escultura majestuosa que homenajea al militar Manuel Gutiérrez de la Concha. El caballo y el realismo de la figura destacan por su detalle, y la base muestra sus victorias más importantes. Ideal para amantes de la historia y la fotografía.

Dato curioso: Fue inaugurado en 1885 y es obra del escultor Andrés Aleu.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBI68t15q0eIylhq3jDXBhR&fid=0x0:0x34b59cbdb431c889"],"When":"2025-9-1"},{"Name":"Vivo Vázquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvUyRyXlZBRb-TT4BhrnwZ8T78FNkcDjPnfNdsrNdFZg9teg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un monumento ecuestre majestuoso dedicado a Manuel Gutiérrez de la Concha, Marqués del Duero, distinguido militar español del siglo XIX. La escultura representa con gran detalle y elegancia al general montado a caballo, transmitiendo la dignidad y el carácter de este importante personaje histórico. Ubicado en el Paseo de la Castellana, el monumento se integra perfectamente en uno de los ejes principales de Madrid, siendo un testimonio pétreo de la historia militar española. La calidad de la obra escultórica es notable, con una excelente ejecución de los detalles tanto del jinete como del caballo. Es un lugar ideal para los amantes de la historia y la fotografía, ofreciendo una oportunidad para conocer más sobre las figuras que marcaron el devenir de España. Un monumento que merece reconocimiento y visita dentro del patrimonio madrileño.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJx8P9QtFBqT70yfr20sndE3yc6uVKBLBLsJKBg7XJPrGKrGQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Estatua ecuestre clásica dedicada al general  Manuel Gutiérrez de la Concha e Irigoyen, general destacado en la lucha contra el carlismo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAeuNL39kHoukZCkfD4aXxO&fid=0x0:0x34b59cbdb431c889"],"When":"2025-11-22"},{"Name":"Doncelador","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnewNEbYYaXdHD0epgVByIWzW2jKqBZMPTzU18-HYzM_sBuOGCqw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Obra del escultor Andrés Aleu en 1885, fué sufragada por suscripción nacional con un coste de 143.000 pesetas, la estatua se fundió en Sevilla con el bronce procedente de cañones donados por el cuerpo de artillería. El Marqués está vestido con traje de campaña y espada tirando de las tiendas con la mano izquierda y levantando la derecha indicando un objetivo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICktbeUNQ&fid=0x0:0x34b59cbdb431c889"],"When":"2018-11-21"},{"Name":"Victoria Senaty","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDqI6YcQt-mtmIGFFLGaGy-ebJ3tEwmyjjrN0PDXKEpEamT1h0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"En homenaje a este ilustre, que fue también político 5 veces presidente del senado; como luchador en las guerras carlistas, y por lo tanto isabelino. Haciendo esta defensa llegó a ser capitán general.
La Reina Isabel II le otorgó este título de marquesado. Era también buen empresario, tuvo muchos cultivos de caña de azúcar en Málaga, San Pedro Alcantara.
Por esta época no solo el don de la palabra valía, que hizo buen uso de ello, sino que hacia falta destreza en el campo de batalla, hablamos de finales del 1800, que había que lidiar con cercana Portugal, para conquistar terrenos. En el monumento ecuestre señala con el brazo a la Castellana?","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICKgM3cuAE&fid=0x0:0x34b59cbdb431c889"],"When":"2021-3-24"},{"Name":"Domingo González Gálvez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKO2KxJdpJVDbrQSvbdw4QaNKZSuSbFt8HzF9XA7rpbrUBWGHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Bonita escultura en el paseo de la castellana
Foto y reseña en agosto del 2025","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBUEkwk7du3fd4bOM8IIi5m&fid=0x0:0x34b59cbdb431c889"],"When":"2025-8-6"}]

title: Monumento al Descubrimiento de América
address: Pl. de Colón, Salamanca, 28004 Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["Open 24 hours"],"Monday":["Open 24 hours"],"Saturday":["Open 24 hours"],"Sunday":["Open 24 hours"],"Thursday":["Open 24 hours"],"Tuesday":["Open 24 hours"],"Wednesday":["Open 24 hours"]}
user_reviews: [{"Name":"Ana S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJ4_CG1a6wKdn5BLuWHuXaaHualGaWpY6clLZYh4xqbBZ2IkpENQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This monument is dedicated to the Discovery of America and the historical encounter between Europe and the Americas. Designed by Joaquín Vaquero Turcios, it’s divided into three large concrete groups that symbolize different moments and perspectives: the pre‑Columbian world, the voyage of Christopher Columbus, and the meeting of the two continents.\nI came across it by chance, and it made me stop to find out more. A surprising and interesting stop in the middle of the city.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCTi8K57KakkIaKQ3tmtRv4\u0026fid=0x0:0x67cdbc4c0292a24a"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"alex bonick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXkPghn8i7xhpHglppxQsvurVbfn5dPGMviaRBf6zBGml_SbTTbNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It's not the \"prettiest\" piece of public art in Madrid by far - but aesthetically that is what makes it interesting. I could see a lot of debate about how this piece fits into national discussions about Spain's post-imperial age and reckoning with the legacy of New World interactions (compare with the Museum of the Americas and the MAN). I found it worth the stop - esp. when I learned it was constructed in the 1880s - it looks newer. The monument is in the Plaza de Colón, which is a park right near the National Archeological Museum (MAN) - which is not to be missed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJ06-R9QE\u0026fid=0x0:0x67cdbc4c0292a24a"],"When":"2023-7-4"},{"Name":"Georges Younes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1af_MnotjZ8yBIdT9rPJYbzM4SW-WSjOmDsOKhwb6iDjgoVaIUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Monumento al Descubrimiento de América is one of the most challenging public works of art in Madrid, not necessarily in a good way. At the time that it was conceived, it might have been a good idea to use huge slabs of stone that look like poured concrete as the main decorative element of the monument. Time has not been kind to this concept. In the future, this kind of heavy-handed approach might again find favor with the public. But at this juncture, the Plaza de Colón sits empty most of the time, abandoned by a public that's in quest of a gentler and less imperialistic art form.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICavfWu0AE\u0026fid=0x0:0x67cdbc4c0292a24a"],"When":"2021-8-7"},{"Name":"TRAVELLING {, TO BE PRECISE}","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2XI7Bceq8YlhpLEOAM8c5APSRc5srNS-yjYkvFw85ZLpZqzcqXw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"4 Huge concrete structures carved with figures, texts and key names in the history of the discovery of America. They represent The Prophecies, The Genesis (two blocks) and The Discovery. Made by Joaquín Vaquero Turcios and inaugurated in 1977. Worth a detour.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC4v6Q3\u0026fid=0x0:0x67cdbc4c0292a24a"],"When":"2016-12-14"},{"Name":"ドンシクルカ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUAA_D8_GnbMKdVKKLEeDyf5UfA_uaj4_DRJusk6dhl48sopXM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Iconic.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICDjZL5VA\u0026fid=0x0:0x67cdbc4c0292a24a"],"When":"2024-3-31"},{"Name":"Bryan Chiang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfd2AEjpVxsYI2kB8jbPXqH6BSYmko28fbDHJgacCwdS6hE6Km6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good place to visit along with the museum","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Eduardo Antonio Molinari Novoa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWL2J83hI-JKTGWir9WP8QrpQV2nI86fDXlHLYl8Un6AHIen3A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un monumento ecléctico y moderno en su diseño. Definitivamente no es el lugar más bello o clásico de Madrid, pero sí toca muy de cerca a aquellos americanos que, como yo, sienten a España muy dentro del corazón. ¿Cómo no emocionarse al ver en esta plaza representada la gesta que involucró a dos mundos que se unieron por España, representada en tantas esculturas y placas? La más grande empresa de la humanidad con ramificaciones que aún repercuten en el mundo, eso se celebra aquí, un vínculo indisoluble entre los millones que de España recibimos lengua, fe y cultura.\nViva España, viva el Rey.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQiduuEw\u0026fid=0x0:0x67cdbc4c0292a24a"],"When":"2025-3-11"},{"Name":"Luchi Dorian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLcKqWzESzn-2VaRilfxcCKlTM5pk91sY9DvaLVLhEh96Z5Qw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Impresionante monumento ecléctico y moderno que conmemora el Descubrimiento de América en 1492. Ubicado en la emblemática Plaza de Colón, este conjunto escultórico destaca por su diseño único y contemporáneo. La obra combina elementos arquitectónicos con grandes bloques de hormigón y frases grabadas de Cristóbal Colón. Inaugurado en 1977, representa un homenaje audaz y diferente a otros monumentos tradicionales. Es una pieza fundamental del paisaje urbano de Madrid, perfecta para fotografiar tanto de día como de noche cuando está iluminada. Un monumento que refleja la conexión histórica entre España y América.","Images":null,"When":""}]

En la base emerge del suelo una punta piramidal como símbolo de resistencia. La ejecución de la escultura y del monumento tuvo un coste de 10 millones de pesetas, de los cuales ocho fueron invertidos por el Ayuntamiento y dos por la Comunidad de Madrid.
El monumento se inaugura en marzo de 1985.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDE5KrcpwE&fid=0x0:0x3597519d46babcb3"],"When":"2017-9-2"},{"Name":"Rosas en Almíbar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfUFWIA5U-cA6nDO86JQTULSIPZDT--I2zgfbxJTK8QTObvFY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"No está mal. Un poco soso y feo. La iniciativa es bonita, pero a Miguel Hernández casi ni se ve.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDeu9bOgwE&fid=0x0:0x3597519d46babcb3"],"When":"2022-10-20"},{"Name":"José Julio Melgares","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPlI3_WxZ-JbiFDSG6A1n_aKR_BFRpvuYb0hLgejNuccGQun5Z=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Monumento en homenaje al poeta alicantino Miguel Hernández obra del arquitecto Enrique Dominguez Uceta. Destaca un medallón en bronce, realizado por el escultor Miguel Ángel López Calleja, con la cara del poeta que es una reproducción del retrato que le hizo Antonio Buero Vallejo en 1940, cuando estuvieron encarcelados juntos.

"MADRID... esta ciudad no se aplaca con fuego,
este laurel con rencor no se tala.
Este rosal sin ventura, este espliego...
júbilo exhala"
Miguel Hernández

Miguel Hernández escribió un precioso poema dedicado a Federico García Lorca, tras la muerte del poeta granadino, con el que había tenido una lucha de egos:

"Qué sencilla es la muerte qué sencilla
pero qué injustamente arrebatada.
No sabe andar despacio y acuchilla
cuando menos se espera su turbia cuchillada"

Miguel Hernández","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE84Pq5AE&fid=0x0:0x3597519d46babcb3"],"When":"2017-12-22"},{"Name":"Arturo Villacañas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJFDq7wmxmLUqgAL1EUzdv1pu_WF5qpBvDo_51XwQ27UIEKo5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Monumento difícil de evitar si se viene caminando desde la Casa de Campo. Se levanta en honor a Miguel Hernández, poeta de la Generación del 36, quien fue separado de su familia e impedido de ver crecer a sus hijos después de ser arrestado por el franquismo con 28 años, debido a sus "simpatías con ideas anti-fascistas".

Amigo de sus amigos (nos conmociona especialmente la "Elegía" que dedicó a la muerte de su íntimo amigo Ramón Sijé); pastor de ovejas de profesión; autodidacta que nunca necesitó de grandes credenciales para aprender a leer por su cuenta y firmar una de las mejores producciones poéticas en castellano.

Moriría en la cárcel de tuberculosis con apenas 32 años. Esto, unido a las penosas condiciones de tortura física y psicológica a la que sus captores lo sometieron durante meses, lo convirtieron en una importante figura de la libertad de expresión y las garantías procesales en España, ya bastante antes de la caída del Régimen (cuando España todavía era una dictadura, hace escasos 46 años). Hernández recuerda a lo peor de Franco; la insensibilidad vulgar del nacionalismo, la inexcusable entrega a sus ideales totalitarios, y su desprecio al significado real y concreto de las causas de "compasión" y "protección de la familia" con las que originalmente justificó su pronunciamiento militar.

El monumento, obra del arquitecto Enrique Domínguez y realizado en piedra pulida, se compone de cuatro columnatas de piedra en forma de V, y un pilar central con medallón que refleja el grabado facial realizado por Antonio Buero Vallejo durante sus visitas a la cárcel. Además, en su parte inferior este pilar se abre para adoptar la forma de un triángulo invertido 🔻, que es el símbolo con el que se "marcaba" a los prisioneros comunistas en los campos de concentración del nazismo (que ahora ha quedado resignificado a símbolo de los perseguidos por ideas políticas).

Todo el complejo escultórico se conserva relativamente bien y se integra perfectamente en un escenario, la Casa de Campo, que todavía alberga fosas comunes de "desaparecidos" y muertos sin nombre, asesinados durante el asalto a Madrid en la Guerra Civil española.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JPB Auteur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVv0_EgnAIWUQHeX31_sSm5IZQi5QrXWitM_fwfM8xy5NbB1xWg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Monument dédié au poète Miguel Hernández. 0 voir aussi le parc qui est magnifique","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC41-7TNA&fid=0x0:0x3597519d46babcb3"],"When":"2017-11-25"},{"Name":"Lucy Isabel De Los Reyes Tovar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7XRhTemAolYyAV4u1hspfARbNwnggRBmZb0EEKNuXgQVNxdK1dw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Los monumento se levantan como recordatorio, de aquellas personas que han pasado y han dejado huella. [{"Name":"Ferhat Yildiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWV6W2gfwUqAFIDgffx1HATO6JsIPotrLYKf7X6lAbflWpp-7tw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Monument to Santiago Ramón y Cajal is a tribute to one of Spain’s most brilliant scientists, located in El Retiro Park in Madrid. Santiago Ramón y Cajal was a pioneering neuroscientist, often called the father of modern neuroscience.

He was awarded the Nobel Prize in Physiology or Medicine in 1906, shared with Camillo Golgi, for his groundbreaking work on the structure of the nervous system.

Cajal’s research helped reveal that the nervous system is made up of individual cells, called neurons, rather than being a continuous network — a discovery that shaped modern biology and medicine.

The monument honors both his scientific genius and his contribution to global knowledge.

The statue itself shows a thoughtful and respectful design, symbolizing the deep curiosity and dedication Cajal had for his work. It’s a fitting tribute to a man who not only advanced science in Spain but also worldwide.

If you visit Retiro Park, it’s definitely worth stopping by to appreciate the history and impact of this remarkable figure.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCom_n5Rw&fid=0x0:0xa08fe02fe9e2bae3"],"When":"2025-4-20"},{"Name":"Miroslav Kolar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6qjEGZp-vN1fQSPGj5GahaioSaBVm1P9QDg0U_atkoGUbm0qp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Located in the Retiro park close to the great pond, this monument is erected in honour of Santiago Ramón y Cajal, a renowned physician, neurologist and Nobel prize winner.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDomdrF4QE&fid=0x0:0xa08fe02fe9e2bae3"],"When":"2025-4-26"},{"Name":"Chris Sirinop","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWDdYBcz6fbO7chHh4DViQpsLIpTKEBdWd1TbYhd5A7c1AWS-qcHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Just passing by this monument of Ramon Y Cajal. title: Monumento al Cabo Noval
address: Pl. de Ote., 9, Centro, 28013 Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["Open 24 hours"],"Monday":["Open 24 hours"],"Saturday":["Open 24 hours"],"Sunday":["Open 24 hours"],"Thursday":["Open 24 hours"],"Tuesday":["Open 24 hours"],"Wednesday":["Open 24 hours"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This monument stands in tribute to Corporal Luis Noval, a Spanish who served in the Spanish Colonial wars in Morocco. He was taken prisoner by the Rif forces, who forced him to take them to the entrance of the Spanish camp. The Spanish soldiers did not shoot when they saw Noval coming, but he shouted out a warning to his comrades that it was an ambush and died in the following firefight. After his death, he was awarded the second class cross of the Military Order of San Fernando.

This monument depicts Noval in uniform, marching with his rifle on his shoulder. Behind his is a Spanish women, holding up the Spanish flag to encourage Noval onwards. At the base of the monument you can see the Rif rebels scattering at the sight of Noval.

The monument stands in Plaza de Oriente, near the royal palace and worth a visit to get the bit of history. It's lovely to see a nice monument honouring and otherwise ordinary soldier instead of some rich aristocrat.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICcgsLI7gE&fid=0x0:0xa91041363b237a25"],"When":"2020-2-17"},{"Name":"Francisco Leung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrsCUuLOU9HZpwdyFGCYf97VlwByAtR-r9wMwJl9ZmusLoiqhB=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a nice monument that remembers Luis Noval Ferrao, who was a soldier in the Spanish army. It's located in the Gardens of Cabo Noval, which appears to be a smaller sub-section of Plaza de Oriente.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJ3OmvOQ&fid=0x0:0xa91041363b237a25"],"When":"2023-6-22"},{"Name":"BradinHK","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWh6zDfP2gQdpxFs5vZrrUNYezD0Dpnk56YFX0OBmXdNJCxRY4DFg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"One of the interesting things to see at Plaza De Oriente is the monument to Luis Noval Ferrao, a heroic Spanish soldier who fought and died during battle in Morocco in 1909.

Ferrao was noted for his bravery and heroic fighting, becoming a symbol of national pride and nationalism during the early part of the 20th century. A product of that movement was this bronze statue was created by Spanish sculptor Marino Benlliure in 1912.

Here you find a bronze figure, fully dressed in soldiery attire and gear, walking forward in front of a large scale stone flag being held by a female figure. The statue is atop a decorative stone pedestal, with inscription in Spanish.

It is a nice war memorial, located at the northern end of Plaza De Oriente in an area referred to locally, and in travel books, as Jardines Del Cabo Noval. It is worth having a quick look if you enjoy seeing monuments during your travels.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDE3LDGZQ&fid=0x0:0xa91041363b237a25"],"When":"2018-9-8"},{"Name":"Jonathan Canales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0mSyJjLzsV21q79054K1crJ8IayiaCW_8ZyC9epoh-RVDEDgvdg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tucked away statue with beautiful detail regarding a national hero.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Francisco Lucena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXAnbPEgO38IAgd5mIrYHf4QXKfnMypv1751f6z9U8cL9E_HQHDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Monumento homenaje al cabo Noval, muerto en la guerra de África en 1909 por avisar a sus compañeros de una emboscada enemiga, inaugurado en 1912 con la asistencia del rey Alfonso 13 el monumento es obra del escultor valenciano mariano benlliure,genio responsable de muchas obrad instaladas por todo Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDRtSGrZd1m2Qae-nit1Yjv&fid=0x0:0xa91041363b237a25"],"When":"2025-9-26"},{"Name":"Vivo Vázquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvUyRyXlZBRb-TT4BhrnwZ8T78FNkcDjPnfNdsrNdFZg9teg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El Monumento al Cabo Noval en la Plaza de Oriente es un tributo a un soldado heroico que salvó la vida del rey Alfonso XIII. La estatua en bronce muestra al Cabo Noval en una pose valiente y decidida. Se encuentra en un entorno privilegiado, muy cerca del Palacio Real, lo que permite admirar varios monumentos históricos en un mismo paseo. Es una obra que recuerda actos de valentía y lealtad. Un lugar de gran valor histórico en Madrid.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Davide Pizzi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWz7eu3ngE_5MLgmwkNyqP8hPmJcrBxnXxnIhpnQ2Sc3MTiZvpl8g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Il monumento in onore del caporale Noval , morto nella guerra in Africa nel 1909 per aver avvertito i suoi compagni dell'imminenza di un'imboscata nemica.
L'eroismo del soldato ha dato origine a questo tributo. Il monumento si trova nei Giardini di Cape Noval, che costituiscono la parte settentrionale di Plaza de Oriente. A metà strada tra il Palazzo Reale e il Monastero di La Encarnación, il posto è uno dei più silenziosi dell'ambiente.
Inaugurato nel 1912 con l'assistenza del re Alfonso XIII , il monumento è opera dello scultore valenciano Mariano Benlliure.
L'artista valenciano è responsabile di molte altre opere installate a Madrid, come il monumento a Don Álvaro de Bazán , la figura di Goya di fronte al Museo del Prado, alcune sculture sulla facciata del Metropolis Building o alcune delle incredibili opere funebri del Pantheon di uomini illustri.
Il gruppo rappresenta Luis Noval in marcia con il suo fucile in spalla. Una bandiera tenuta da una donna vola dietro di lui.
Il suo prezzo è stato pagato con un tributo popolare grazie all'impulso di un numerose di donne. La regina Vittoria Eugenia era una dei benefattori, i cui nomi sono incisi sul retro.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDsqsLl6QE&fid=0x0:0xa91041363b237a25"],"When":"2020-2-29"},{"Name":"Sylvia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVOWq9WYcCoOzNqXTQwC4axJG5Si91HKepVCCpOlBLrxjAg7NVFbA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"En la plaza de Oriente, en unos jardines que llevan su nombre está el monumento del Cabo Noval, heroico soldado que aviso a sus tropas de un emboscada en la guerra de África. Es obra del escultor valenciano Mariano Benlliure. Zona tranquila y muy bonita para pasear.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICyiYKZSA&fid=0x0:0xa91041363b237a25"],"When":"2021-2-3"}]

title: Monumento a Largo Caballero
